# Quản lý khuyến mãi mở rộng

**Updated:** 07/07/2026 07:04  
**Exported:** 07/09/2026 21:15  
**Link:** [https://chat.deepseek.com/a/chat/s/70a0b5e2-275a-4a70-a685-25bb731bc7c8](https://chat.deepseek.com/a/chat/s/70a0b5e2-275a-4a70-a685-25bb731bc7c8)  

## User:
07/06/2026 22:44

<script setup>
import { ref, computed } from 'vue';
import AdminLayout from '@/Layouts/AdminLayout.vue';
import { Head, router } from '@inertiajs/vue3';

// Nhận dữ liệu từ Controller qua props
const props = defineProps({
    initialPromotions: {
        type: Array,
        default: () => []
    }
});

// Filter state
const activePromoType = ref('all');
const searchQuery = ref('');

// Promotion types
const promoTypes = [
    { value: 'all', label: 'Tất cả', icon: '📦' },
    { value: 'retail', label: 'Bán lẻ', icon: '🛒' },
    { value: 'wholesale', label: 'Bán sỉ', icon: '🏭' },
    { value: 'preorder', label: 'Pre-order', icon: '⏳' }
];

// Promotions data
const promotions = ref(props.initialPromotions.length > 0 ? props.initialPromotions : [
    { 
        id: 1, 
        code: 'BIGBAG50', 
        targetType: 'retail', 
        discountType: 'fixed', 
        discount: '50.000₫', 
        discountValue: 50000,
        minOrder: 500000, 
        desc: 'Giảm 50k cho đơn từ 500k', 
        expiry: '30/06/2025', 
        used: 45, 
        limit: 100, 
        active: true 
    },
    { 
        id: 2, 
        code: 'WHOLESALE10', 
        targetType: 'wholesale', 
        discountType: 'percent', 
        discount: '10%', 
        discountValue: 10,
        minOrder: 5000000, 
        desc: 'Giảm 10% cho đơn sỉ từ 5tr', 
        expiry: '31/07/2025', 
        used: 12, 
        limit: 50, 
        active: true 
    },
    { 
        id: 3, 
        code: 'PREORDER5', 
        targetType: 'preorder', 
        discountType: 'fixed', 
        discount: '100.000₫', 
        discountValue: 100000,
        minOrder: 1000000, 
        desc: 'Ưu đãi đặt trước 100k', 
        expiry: '15/06/2025', 
        used: 28, 
        limit: 200, 
        active: true 
    },
    { 
        id: 4, 
        code: 'FREESHIP', 
        targetType: 'all', 
        discountType: 'freeship', 
        discount: 'Miễn phí ship', 
        discountValue: 0,
        minOrder: 300000, 
        desc: 'Miễn phí vận chuyển cho đơn từ 300k', 
        expiry: '31/12/2025', 
        used: 156, 
        limit: 999, 
        active: true 
    }
]);

// Modal state
const showModal = ref(false);
const editingPromo = ref(null);
const isSubmitting = ref(false);

// Form data
const form = ref({
    code: '',
    targetType: 'all',
    discountType: 'fixed',
    discount: '',
    discountValue: 0,
    minOrder: 0,
    limit: 100,
    expiry: '',
    active: true
});

// Computed: filtered promotions
const filteredPromotions = computed(() => {
    let filtered = promotions.value;
    
    // Filter by type
    if (activePromoType.value !== 'all') {
        filtered = filtered.filter(p => p.targetType === activePromoType.value);
    }
    
    // Filter by search
    if (searchQuery.value) {
        const query = searchQuery.value.toLowerCase();
        filtered = filtered.filter(p => 
            p.code.toLowerCase().includes(query) ||
            p.desc.toLowerCase().includes(query)
        );
    }
    
    return filtered;
});

// Get target type label
const getTargetTypeLabel = (type) => {
    const labels = {
        retail: 'Bán lẻ',
        wholesale: 'Bán sỉ',
        preorder: 'Pre-order',
        all: 'Tất cả'
    };
    return labels[type] || type;
};

// Get target type class
const getTargetTypeClass = (type) => {
    const classes = {
        retail: 'bg-orange-100 text-orange-700',
        wholesale: 'bg-green-100 text-green-700',
        preorder: 'bg-blue-100 text-blue-700',
        all: 'bg-purple-100 text-purple-700'
    };
    return classes[type] || 'bg-gray-100 text-gray-600';
};

// Get status class
const getStatusClass = (active) => {
    return active ? 'bg-green-100 text-green-700' : 'bg-red-100 text-red-700';
};

// Get status label
const getStatusLabel = (active) => {
    return active ? 'Đang hoạt động' : 'Đã tắt';
};

// Get used percentage
const getUsedPercentage = (used, limit) => {
    return (used / limit) * 100;
};

// Format currency
const formatPrice = (value) => {
    if (!value) return '0₫';
    return value.toLocaleString('vi-VN') + '₫';
};

// Open modal for add/edit
const openModal = (promo = null) => {
    editingPromo.value = promo;
    
    if (promo) {
        form.value = { ...promo };
    } else {
        form.value = {
            code: '',
            targetType: 'all',
            discountType: 'fixed',
            discount: '',
            discountValue: 0,
            minOrder: 0,
            limit: 100,
            expiry: '',
            active: true
        };
    }
    showModal.value = true;
};

// Edit promotion
const editPromo = (promo) => {
    openModal(promo);
};

// Save promotion
const savePromo = async () => {
    // Validate
    if (!form.value.code) {
        alert('Vui lòng nhập mã giảm giá');
        return;
    }
    if (!form.value.discount && form.value.discountType !== 'freeship') {
        alert('Vui lòng nhập giá trị giảm giá');
        return;
    }
    
    isSubmitting.value = true;
    
    try {
        if (editingPromo.value) {
            // Update existing promotion
            const index = promotions.value.findIndex(p => p.id === editingPromo.value.id);
            if (index !== -1) {
                const discountText = form.value.discountType === 'percent' 
                    ? form.value.discount + '%' 
                    : form.value.discountType === 'freeship' 
                        ? 'Miễn phí ship' 
                        : formatPrice(form.value.discountValue);
                
                promotions.value[index] = {
                    ...form.value,
                    id: editingPromo.value.id,
                    discount: discountText,
                    desc: `${discountText} cho đơn từ ${formatPrice(form.value.minOrder)}`,
                    used: editingPromo.value.used
                };
            }
            
            // Call API update
            await router.put(`/admin/promotions/${editingPromo.value.id}`, form.value, {
                preserveScroll: true,
                onSuccess: () => {
                    alert('Cập nhật mã giảm giá thành công!');
                },
                onError: (errors) => {
                    console.error('Lỗi cập nhật:', errors);
                    alert('Có lỗi xảy ra khi cập nhật');
                }
            });
        } else {
            // Add new promotion
            const discountText = form.value.discountType === 'percent' 
                ? form.value.discount + '%' 
                : form.value.discountType === 'freeship' 
                    ? 'Miễn phí ship' 
                    : formatPrice(form.value.discountValue);
            
            const newPromo = {
                ...form.value,
                id: Date.now(),
                discount: discountText,
                desc: `${discountText} cho đơn từ ${formatPrice(form.value.minOrder)}`,
                used: 0
            };
            promotions.value.push(newPromo);
            
            // Call API create
            await router.post('/admin/promotions', form.value, {
                preserveScroll: true,
                onSuccess: () => {
                    alert('Thêm mã giảm giá thành công!');
                },
                onError: (errors) => {
                    console.error('Lỗi thêm mới:', errors);
                    alert('Có lỗi xảy ra khi thêm mã');
                }
            });
        }
        
        showModal.value = false;
    } catch (error) {
        console.error('Lỗi:', error);
        alert('Có lỗi xảy ra');
    } finally {
        isSubmitting.value = false;
    }
};

// Delete promotion
const deletePromo = async (id) => {
    const promo = promotions.value.find(p => p.id === id);
    if (!confirm(`Bạn có chắc chắn muốn xóa mã "${promo?.code}"?`)) {
        return;
    }
    
    try {
        await router.delete(`/admin/promotions/${id}`, {
            preserveScroll: true,
            onSuccess: () => {
                promotions.value = promotions.value.filter(p => p.id !== id);
                alert('Xóa mã giảm giá thành công!');
            },
            onError: (errors) => {
                console.error('Lỗi xóa:', errors);
                alert('Có lỗi xảy ra khi xóa mã');
            }
        });
    } catch (error) {
        console.error('Lỗi:', error);
        alert('Có lỗi xảy ra');
    }
};

// Toggle promotion status
const toggleStatus = async (promo) => {
    try {
        await router.put(`/admin/promotions/${promo.id}/toggle`, {
            active: !promo.active
        }, {
            preserveScroll: true,
            onSuccess: () => {
                promo.active = !promo.active;
                alert(promo.active ? 'Đã kích hoạt mã!' : 'Đã tắt mã!');
            }
        });
    } catch (error) {
        console.error('Lỗi:', error);
        alert('Có lỗi xảy ra');
    }
};

// Close modal
const closeModal = () => {
    showModal.value = false;
};
</script>

<template>
    <Head title="Quản lý khuyến mãi - BigBag Admin" />
    
    <AdminLayout>
        <div class="p-4 md:p-8">
            <!-- Header -->
            <div class="flex justify-between items-center mb-6">
                <div>
                    <h1 class="text-2xl md:text-3xl font-bold text-gray-800">Khuyến mãi & Mã giảm giá</h1>
                </div>
                <button 
                    @click="openModal()" 
                    class="bg-orange-600 text-white px-5 py-2 rounded-xl flex items-center gap-2 hover:bg-orange-700 transition-colors"
                >
                    <span class="material-symbols-outlined text-lg">add</span>
                    Thêm mã
                </button>
            </div>

            <!-- Search Bar -->
            <div class="mb-4">
                <div class="relative max-w-md">
                    <span class="material-symbols-outlined absolute left-3 top-1/2 -translate-y-1/2 text-gray-400 text-lg">search</span>
                    <input 
                        v-model="searchQuery" 
                        type="text" 
                        placeholder="Tìm mã giảm giá..." 
                        class="pl-10 pr-4 py-2 bg-white border border-gray-300 rounded-full w-full focus:outline-none focus:border-orange-500 focus:ring-2 focus:ring-orange-500/20 text-sm"
                    >
                </div>
            </div>

            <!-- Tab loại khuyến mãi -->
            <div class="flex gap-2 mb-6 border-b border-gray-200">
                <button 
                    v-for="type in promoTypes" 
                    :key="type.value" 
                    @click="activePromoType = type.value" 
                    class="px-5 py-2.5 text-sm font-medium transition-all"
                    :class="activePromoType === type.value ? 'text-orange-600 border-b-2 border-orange-600' : 'text-gray-500 hover:text-gray-700'"
                >
                    {{ type.icon }} {{ type.label }}
                </button>
            </div>

            <!-- Danh sách khuyến mãi -->
            <div class="grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-2 lg:grid-cols-3 gap-6">
                <div 
                    v-for="promo in filteredPromotions" 
                    :key="promo.id" 
                    class="bg-white rounded-xl p-5 border border-gray-200 hover:shadow-md transition-all"
                >
                    <div class="flex justify-between items-start">
                        <div>
                            <span 
                                class="text-xs px-2 py-1 rounded-full"
                                :class="getStatusClass(promo.active)"
                            >
                                {{ getStatusLabel(promo.active) }}
                            </span>
                            <h3 class="font-bold text-xl text-gray-800 mt-2">{{ promo.code }}</h3>
                        </div>
                        <div class="flex gap-1">
                            <button 
                                @click="editPromo(promo)" 
                                class="p-1.5 text-green-600 hover:bg-green-100 rounded-lg transition-colors"
                                title="Sửa"
                            >Sửa
                            </button>
                            <button 
                                @click="deletePromo(promo.id)" 
                                class="p-1.5 text-red-600 hover:bg-red-100 rounded-lg transition-colors"
                                title="Xóa"
                            >Xóa
                            </button>
                        </div>
                    </div>
                    
                    <p class="text-sm text-gray-500 mb-3">{{ promo.desc }}</p>
                    
                    <div class="grid grid-cols-2 gap-2 text-sm">
                        <span class="flex items-center gap-1">
                            <span class="text-gray-500">🎯</span>
                            <span 
                                class="text-xs px-2 py-0.5 rounded-full"
                                :class="getTargetTypeClass(promo.targetType)"
                            >
                                {{ getTargetTypeLabel(promo.targetType) }}
                            </span>
                        </span>
                        <span class="flex items-center gap-1">
                            <span class="text-gray-500">💰</span>
                            <span class="text-orange-600 font-semibold">Giảm: {{ promo.discount }}</span>
                        </span>
                        <span class="flex items-center gap-1">
                            <span class="text-gray-500">📅</span>
                            <span>HSD: {{ promo.expiry }}</span>
                        </span>
                        <span class="flex items-center gap-1">
                            <span class="text-gray-500">📊</span>
                            <span>Đã dùng: {{ promo.used }}/{{ promo.limit }}</span>
                        </span>
                    </div>
                    
                    <!-- Progress bar -->
                    <div class="mt-3 pt-3 border-t border-gray-100">
                        <div class="w-full h-1.5 bg-gray-100 rounded-full overflow-hidden">
                            <div 
                                class="h-full bg-orange-500 rounded-full transition-all"
                                :style="{ width: getUsedPercentage(promo.used, promo.limit) + '%' }"
                            ></div>
                        </div>
                    </div>
                    
                    <!-- Toggle switch -->
                    <div class="mt-3 pt-2 flex justify-end">
                        <button 
                            @click="toggleStatus(promo)"
                            :class="promo.active ? 'bg-green-100 text-green-700' : 'bg-gray-100 text-gray-500'"
                            class="text-xs px-3 py-1 rounded-full transition-colors"
                        >
                            {{ promo.active ? 'Kích hoạt' : 'Đã tắt' }}
                        </button>
                    </div>
                </div>
                
                <!-- Empty state -->
                <div v-if="filteredPromotions.length === 0" class="col-span-full text-center py-12 text-gray-500">
                    <span class="material-symbols-outlined text-5xl mb-2">local_offer</span>
                    <p>Không có mã giảm giá nào</p>
                    <button 
                        @click="openModal()" 
                        class="mt-3 text-orange-600 hover:underline"
                    >
                        Thêm mã giảm giá đầu tiên
                    </button>
                </div>
            </div>
        </div>

        <!-- Modal Thêm/Sửa mã giảm giá -->
        <div 
            v-if="showModal" 
            class="fixed inset-0 bg-black/50 flex items-center justify-center z-50 p-4" 
            @click.self="closeModal"
        >
            <div class="bg-white rounded-xl max-w-lg w-full p-6 shadow-xl max-h-[90vh] overflow-y-auto">
                <div class="flex justify-between items-center mb-4">
                    <h3 class="text-xl font-bold text-gray-800">{{ editingPromo ? 'Sửa mã' : 'Thêm mã giảm giá' }}</h3>
                    <button 
                        @click="closeModal" 
                        class="text-gray-400 hover:text-gray-600 transition-colors text-xl"
                    >
                        ✕
                    </button>
                </div>
                
                <div class="space-y-4">
                    <div>
                        <label class="text-sm block mb-1 text-gray-700 font-medium">Mã code</label>
                        <input 
                            v-model="form.code" 
                            class="w-full border border-gray-300 rounded-lg px-3 py-2 uppercase focus:outline-none focus:border-orange-500 focus:ring-2 focus:ring-orange-500/20"
                            placeholder="NHAPMA"
                        >
                    </div>
                    
                    <div>
                        <label class="text-sm block mb-1 text-gray-700 font-medium">Áp dụng cho</label>
                        <select 
                            v-model="form.targetType" 
                            class="w-full border border-gray-300 rounded-lg px-3 py-2 focus:outline-none focus:border-orange-500 focus:ring-2 focus:ring-orange-500/20"
                        >
                            <option value="retail">🛒 Bán lẻ</option>
                            <option value="wholesale">🏭 Bán sỉ</option>
                            <option value="preorder">⏳ Pre-order</option>
                            <option value="all">📦 Tất cả</option>
                        </select>
                    </div>
                    
                    <div>
                        <label class="text-sm block mb-1 text-gray-700 font-medium">Loại giảm giá</label>
                        <select 
                            v-model="form.discountType" 
                            class="w-full border border-gray-300 rounded-lg px-3 py-2 focus:outline-none focus:border-orange-500 focus:ring-2 focus:ring-orange-500/20"
                        >
                            <option value="fixed">Giảm trực tiếp (₫)</option>
                            <option value="percent">Giảm theo %</option>
                            <option value="freeship">Miễn phí ship</option>
                        </select>
                    </div>
                    
                    <div v-if="form.discountType !== 'freeship'">
                        <label class="text-sm block mb-1 text-gray-700 font-medium">Giá trị giảm</label>
                        <input 
                            v-model="form.discount" 
                            class="w-full border border-gray-300 rounded-lg px-3 py-2 focus:outline-none focus:border-orange-500 focus:ring-2 focus:ring-orange-500/20"
                            :placeholder="form.discountType === 'percent' ? '10' : '50000'"
                        >
                        <p class="text-xs text-gray-500 mt-1">
                            {{ form.discountType === 'percent' ? 'Nhập số phần trăm (VD: 10)' : 'Nhập số tiền (VD: 50000)' }}
                        </p>
                    </div>
                    
                    <div>
                        <label class="text-sm block mb-1 text-gray-700 font-medium">Điều kiện (đơn tối thiểu)</label>
                        <input 
                            v-model="form.minOrder" 
                            type="number" 
                            class="w-full border border-gray-300 rounded-lg px-3 py-2 focus:outline-none focus:border-orange-500 focus:ring-2 focus:ring-orange-500/20"
                            placeholder="500.000"
                        >
                    </div>
                    
                    <div>
                        <label class="text-sm block mb-1 text-gray-700 font-medium">Số lượng mã</label>
                        <input 
                            v-model="form.limit" 
                            type="number" 
                            class="w-full border border-gray-300 rounded-lg px-3 py-2 focus:outline-none focus:border-orange-500 focus:ring-2 focus:ring-orange-500/20"
                            placeholder="100"
                        >
                    </div>
                    
                    <div>
                        <label class="text-sm block mb-1 text-gray-700 font-medium">Ngày kết thúc</label>
                        <input 
                            v-model="form.expiry" 
                            type="date" 
                            class="w-full border border-gray-300 rounded-lg px-3 py-2 focus:outline-none focus:border-orange-500 focus:ring-2 focus:ring-orange-500/20"
                        >
                    </div>
                    
                    <label class="flex items-center gap-2 cursor-pointer">
                        <input type="checkbox" v-model="form.active" class="w-4 h-4 text-orange-600 rounded">
                        <span class="text-sm text-gray-700">Kích hoạt ngay</span>
                    </label>
                </div>
                
                <div class="flex justify-end gap-3 mt-6">
                    <button 
                        @click="closeModal" 
                        class="px-4 py-2 border border-gray-300 rounded-lg text-gray-600 hover:bg-gray-50 transition-colors"
                    >
                        Hủy
                    </button>
                    <button 
                        @click="savePromo" 
                        class="px-4 py-2 bg-orange-600 text-white rounded-lg hover:bg-orange-700 transition-colors"
                        :disabled="isSubmitting"
                    >
                        {{ isSubmitting ? 'Đang lưu...' : 'Lưu' }}
                    </button>
                </div>
            </div>
        </div>
    </AdminLayout>
</template>

<style scoped>

</style>

project của tôi có cả bán pre-order nên tôi muốn quản lý cả những khuyến mãi cho pre dưới dạng số lượt người mua mà tự động có giá chứ không phải dạng nhập mã (vd: 10 người đầu tiên được giảm 20% giá bán , 11-20 giảm 10% , 21-30 giảm 5%) và tôi muốn có thêm cả các chương trình khuyến mãi để có thể kết nối với banner và news


## Assistant:
07/06/2026 22:44

Tôi sẽ giúp bạn mở rộng hệ thống quản lý khuyến mãi để hỗ trợ cả pre-order và các chương trình khuyến mãi đặc biệt. Dưới đây là code cập nhật:

```vue
<script setup>
import { ref, computed } from 'vue';
import AdminLayout from '@/Layouts/AdminLayout.vue';
import { Head, router } from '@inertiajs/vue3';

// Nhận dữ liệu từ Controller qua props
const props = defineProps({
    initialPromotions: {
        type: Array,
        default: () => []
    },
    initialCampaigns: {
        type: Array,
        default: () => []
    }
});

// Filter state
const activePromoType = ref('all');
const searchQuery = ref('');
const activeCampaignTab = ref('all'); // all, active, ended, scheduled

// Promotion types
const promoTypes = [
    { value: 'all', label: 'Tất cả', icon: '📦' },
    { value: 'voucher', label: 'Mã giảm giá', icon: '🎫' },
    { value: 'preorder_tier', label: 'Pre-order theo lượt', icon: '⏳' },
    { value: 'campaign', label: 'Chiến dịch', icon: '🎯' }
];

// Campaign status
const campaignStatuses = [
    { value: 'all', label: 'Tất cả' },
    { value: 'active', label: 'Đang diễn ra' },
    { value: 'ended', label: 'Đã kết thúc' },
    { value: 'scheduled', label: 'Sắp diễn ra' }
];

// Dữ liệu khuyến mãi
const promotions = ref(props.initialPromotions.length > 0 ? props.initialPromotions : [
    { 
        id: 1, 
        code: 'BIGBAG50', 
        type: 'voucher',
        targetType: 'retail', 
        discountType: 'fixed', 
        discount: '50.000₫', 
        discountValue: 50000,
        minOrder: 500000, 
        desc: 'Giảm 50k cho đơn từ 500k', 
        expiry: '30/06/2025', 
        used: 45, 
        limit: 100, 
        active: true,
        createdAt: '2025-01-01'
    },
    { 
        id: 2, 
        code: 'PREORDER_TIER_1', 
        type: 'preorder_tier',
        targetType: 'preorder',
        tiers: [
            { from: 1, to: 10, discount: 20, label: 'Top 10' },
            { from: 11, to: 20, discount: 10, label: 'Top 20' },
            { from: 21, to: 30, discount: 5, label: 'Top 30' }
        ],
        currentBuyers: 8,
        desc: 'Giảm giá theo số lượt đặt trước',
        startDate: '2025-01-01',
        endDate: '2025-06-30',
        active: true,
        createdAt: '2025-01-01'
    }
]);

// Dữ liệu chiến dịch khuyến mãi
const campaigns = ref(props.initialCampaigns.length > 0 ? props.initialCampaigns : [
    {
        id: 1,
        name: 'Sale Tết 2025',
        type: 'seasonal',
        description: 'Chương trình khuyến mãi Tết Nguyên Đán 2025',
        startDate: '2025-01-20',
        endDate: '2025-02-10',
        status: 'active',
        banner: '/images/campaigns/tet-2025.jpg',
        products: [101, 102, 103],
        discount: '20%',
        priority: 1,
        featured: true
    },
    {
        id: 2,
        name: 'Flash Sale Pre-order',
        type: 'flash_sale',
        description: 'Giảm giá đặc biệt cho sản phẩm pre-order',
        startDate: '2025-02-01',
        endDate: '2025-02-05',
        status: 'scheduled',
        banner: '/images/campaigns/flash-preorder.jpg',
        products: [201, 202],
        discount: '15%',
        priority: 2,
        featured: false
    },
    {
        id: 3,
        name: 'Big Bag Anniversary',
        type: 'anniversary',
        description: 'Kỷ niệm thành lập Big Bag',
        startDate: '2024-12-01',
        endDate: '2024-12-31',
        status: 'ended',
        banner: '/images/campaigns/anniversary.jpg',
        products: [301, 302, 303, 304],
        discount: '25%',
        priority: 3,
        featured: false
    }
]);

// Modal state
const showModal = ref(false);
const showCampaignModal = ref(false);
const editingPromo = ref(null);
const editingCampaign = ref(null);
const isSubmitting = ref(false);
const selectedTab = ref('vouchers'); // vouchers, preorder, campaigns

// Form data cho voucher
const form = ref({
    code: '',
    type: 'voucher',
    targetType: 'retail',
    discountType: 'fixed',
    discount: '',
    discountValue: 0,
    minOrder: 0,
    limit: 100,
    expiry: '',
    active: true
});

// Form data cho pre-order tier
const preorderForm = ref({
    id: null,
    name: '',
    targetType: 'preorder',
    tiers: [
        { from: 1, to: 10, discount: 20, label: 'Top 10' },
        { from: 11, to: 20, discount: 10, label: 'Top 20' },
        { from: 21, to: 30, discount: 5, label: 'Top 30' }
    ],
    startDate: '',
    endDate: '',
    active: true,
    productId: null,
    minOrder: 0
});

// Form data cho campaign
const campaignForm = ref({
    name: '',
    type: 'seasonal',
    description: '',
    startDate: '',
    endDate: '',
    status: 'scheduled',
    banner: null,
    products: [],
    discount: '',
    priority: 1,
    featured: false
});

// Computed: filtered promotions
const filteredPromotions = computed(() => {
    let filtered = promotions.value;
    
    // Filter by type
    if (activePromoType.value !== 'all') {
        filtered = filtered.filter(p => p.type === activePromoType.value);
    }
    
    // Filter by search
    if (searchQuery.value) {
        const query = searchQuery.value.toLowerCase();
        filtered = filtered.filter(p => 
            (p.code && p.code.toLowerCase().includes(query)) ||
            (p.desc && p.desc.toLowerCase().includes(query)) ||
            (p.name && p.name.toLowerCase().includes(query))
        );
    }
    
    return filtered;
});

// Computed: filtered campaigns
const filteredCampaigns = computed(() => {
    let filtered = campaigns.value;
    
    if (activeCampaignTab.value !== 'all') {
        filtered = filtered.filter(c => c.status === activeCampaignTab.value);
    }
    
    if (searchQuery.value) {
        const query = searchQuery.value.toLowerCase();
        filtered = filtered.filter(c => 
            c.name.toLowerCase().includes(query) ||
            c.description.toLowerCase().includes(query)
        );
    }
    
    return filtered;
});

// Get target type label
const getTargetTypeLabel = (type) => {
    const labels = {
        retail: 'Bán lẻ',
        wholesale: 'Bán sỉ',
        preorder: 'Pre-order',
        all: 'Tất cả'
    };
    return labels[type] || type;
};

// Get target type class
const getTargetTypeClass = (type) => {
    const classes = {
        retail: 'bg-orange-100 text-orange-700',
        wholesale: 'bg-green-100 text-green-700',
        preorder: 'bg-blue-100 text-blue-700',
        all: 'bg-purple-100 text-purple-700'
    };
    return classes[type] || 'bg-gray-100 text-gray-600';
};

// Get status class
const getStatusClass = (active) => {
    return active ? 'bg-green-100 text-green-700' : 'bg-red-100 text-red-700';
};

// Get status label
const getStatusLabel = (active) => {
    return active ? 'Đang hoạt động' : 'Đã tắt';
};

// Get campaign status class
const getCampaignStatusClass = (status) => {
    const classes = {
        active: 'bg-green-100 text-green-700',
        ended: 'bg-gray-100 text-gray-600',
        scheduled: 'bg-blue-100 text-blue-700'
    };
    return classes[status] || 'bg-gray-100 text-gray-600';
};

// Get campaign status label
const getCampaignStatusLabel = (status) => {
    const labels = {
        active: 'Đang diễn ra',
        ended: 'Đã kết thúc',
        scheduled: 'Sắp diễn ra'
    };
    return labels[status] || status;
};

// Get used percentage
const getUsedPercentage = (used, limit) => {
    return (used / limit) * 100;
};

// Format currency
const formatPrice = (value) => {
    if (!value) return '0₫';
    return value.toLocaleString('vi-VN') + '₫';
};

// Format date
const formatDate = (date) => {
    if (!date) return '';
    const d = new Date(date);
    return d.toLocaleDateString('vi-VN', { day: '2-digit', month: '2-digit', year: 'numeric' });
};

// Get current tier for preorder
const getCurrentTier = (promo) => {
    if (!promo.tiers || !promo.currentBuyers) return null;
    return promo.tiers.find(t => promo.currentBuyers >= t.from && promo.currentBuyers <= t.to) || null;
};

// Get discount for preorder
const getPreorderDiscount = (promo) => {
    const tier = getCurrentTier(promo);
    return tier ? `${tier.discount}%` : '0%';
};

// Get progress for preorder
const getPreorderProgress = (promo) => {
    if (!promo.tiers || promo.tiers.length === 0) return 0;
    const maxBuyers = promo.tiers[promo.tiers.length - 1].to;
    return (promo.currentBuyers / maxBuyers) * 100;
};

// Modal functions
const openModal = (promo = null) => {
    editingPromo.value = promo;
    
    if (promo && promo.type === 'preorder_tier') {
        // Mở modal pre-order
        preorderForm.value = {
            id: promo.id,
            name: promo.code || '',
            targetType: promo.targetType || 'preorder',
            tiers: promo.tiers || [
                { from: 1, to: 10, discount: 20, label: 'Top 10' },
                { from: 11, to: 20, discount: 10, label: 'Top 20' },
                { from: 21, to: 30, discount: 5, label: 'Top 30' }
            ],
            startDate: promo.startDate || '',
            endDate: promo.expiry || '',
            active: promo.active !== undefined ? promo.active : true,
            productId: promo.productId || null,
            minOrder: promo.minOrder || 0
        };
        showModal.value = true;
        return;
    }
    
    if (promo && promo.type === 'voucher') {
        form.value = {
            code: promo.code || '',
            type: 'voucher',
            targetType: promo.targetType || 'all',
            discountType: promo.discountType || 'fixed',
            discount: promo.discountValue ? promo.discountValue.toString() : '',
            discountValue: promo.discountValue || 0,
            minOrder: promo.minOrder || 0,
            limit: promo.limit || 100,
            expiry: promo.expiry || '',
            active: promo.active !== undefined ? promo.active : true
        };
    } else {
        // Reset form cho voucher
        form.value = {
            code: '',
            type: 'voucher',
            targetType: 'all',
            discountType: 'fixed',
            discount: '',
            discountValue: 0,
            minOrder: 0,
            limit: 100,
            expiry: '',
            active: true
        };
    }
    showModal.value = true;
};

// Save promotion
const savePromo = async () => {
    isSubmitting.value = true;
    
    try {
        // Xử lý lưu voucher
        if (form.value.type === 'voucher') {
            if (!form.value.code) {
                alert('Vui lòng nhập mã giảm giá');
                return;
            }
            
            const discountText = form.value.discountType === 'percent' 
                ? form.value.discount + '%' 
                : form.value.discountType === 'freeship' 
                    ? 'Miễn phí ship' 
                    : formatPrice(parseInt(form.value.discount) || 0);
            
            const promoData = {
                ...form.value,
                discountValue: parseInt(form.value.discount) || 0,
                discount: discountText,
                desc: `${discountText} cho đơn từ ${formatPrice(form.value.minOrder)}`
            };
            
            if (editingPromo.value) {
                // Update
                const index = promotions.value.findIndex(p => p.id === editingPromo.value.id);
                if (index !== -1) {
                    promotions.value[index] = {
                        ...promoData,
                        id: editingPromo.value.id,
                        used: editingPromo.value.used || 0,
                        type: 'voucher'
                    };
                }
                await router.put(`/admin/promotions/${editingPromo.value.id}`, promoData);
                alert('Cập nhật mã giảm giá thành công!');
            } else {
                // Create
                const newPromo = {
                    ...promoData,
                    id: Date.now(),
                    used: 0,
                    type: 'voucher'
                };
                promotions.value.push(newPromo);
                await router.post('/admin/promotions', promoData);
                alert('Thêm mã giảm giá thành công!');
            }
        }
        
        // Xử lý lưu pre-order tier
        if (preorderForm.value.id || editingPromo.value?.type === 'preorder_tier') {
            const tierData = {
                name: preorderForm.value.name,
                targetType: 'preorder',
                tiers: preorderForm.value.tiers,
                startDate: preorderForm.value.startDate,
                endDate: preorderForm.value.endDate,
                active: preorderForm.value.active,
                productId: preorderForm.value.productId,
                minOrder: preorderForm.value.minOrder,
                type: 'preorder_tier'
            };
            
            if (editingPromo.value) {
                const index = promotions.value.findIndex(p => p.id === editingPromo.value.id);
                if (index !== -1) {
                    promotions.value[index] = {
                        ...tierData,
                        id: editingPromo.value.id,
                        code: preorderForm.value.name,
                        currentBuyers: editingPromo.value.currentBuyers || 0,
                        desc: `Giảm giá theo số lượt đặt trước`
                    };
                }
                await router.put(`/admin/promotions/${editingPromo.value.id}`, tierData);
                alert('Cập nhật chương trình pre-order thành công!');
            } else {
                const newPromo = {
                    ...tierData,
                    id: Date.now(),
                    code: preorderForm.value.name,
                    currentBuyers: 0,
                    desc: `Giảm giá theo số lượt đặt trước`
                };
                promotions.value.push(newPromo);
                await router.post('/admin/promotions/preorder', tierData);
                alert('Thêm chương trình pre-order thành công!');
            }
        }
        
        showModal.value = false;
    } catch (error) {
        console.error('Lỗi:', error);
        alert('Có lỗi xảy ra');
    } finally {
        isSubmitting.value = false;
    }
};

// Delete promotion
const deletePromo = async (id) => {
    const promo = promotions.value.find(p => p.id === id);
    if (!confirm(`Bạn có chắc chắn muốn xóa khuyến mãi này?`)) {
        return;
    }
    
    try {
        await router.delete(`/admin/promotions/${id}`);
        promotions.value = promotions.value.filter(p => p.id !== id);
        alert('Xóa thành công!');
    } catch (error) {
        console.error('Lỗi:', error);
        alert('Có lỗi xảy ra khi xóa');
    }
};

// Toggle promotion status
const toggleStatus = async (promo) => {
    try {
        await router.put(`/admin/promotions/${promo.id}/toggle`, {
            active: !promo.active
        });
        promo.active = !promo.active;
        alert(promo.active ? 'Đã kích hoạt!' : 'Đã tắt!');
    } catch (error) {
        console.error('Lỗi:', error);
        alert('Có lỗi xảy ra');
    }
};

// Campaign functions
const openCampaignModal = (campaign = null) => {
    editingCampaign.value = campaign;
    
    if (campaign) {
        campaignForm.value = { ...campaign };
    } else {
        campaignForm.value = {
            name: '',
            type: 'seasonal',
            description: '',
            startDate: '',
            endDate: '',
            status: 'scheduled',
            banner: null,
            products: [],
            discount: '',
            priority: 1,
            featured: false
        };
    }
    showCampaignModal.value = true;
};

const saveCampaign = async () => {
    if (!campaignForm.value.name) {
        alert('Vui lòng nhập tên chiến dịch');
        return;
    }
    
    isSubmitting.value = true;
    
    try {
        if (editingCampaign.value) {
            const index = campaigns.value.findIndex(c => c.id === editingCampaign.value.id);
            if (index !== -1) {
                campaigns.value[index] = { ...campaignForm.value, id: editingCampaign.value.id };
            }
            await router.put(`/admin/campaigns/${editingCampaign.value.id}`, campaignForm.value);
            alert('Cập nhật chiến dịch thành công!');
        } else {
            const newCampaign = { ...campaignForm.value, id: Date.now() };
            campaigns.value.push(newCampaign);
            await router.post('/admin/campaigns', campaignForm.value);
            alert('Thêm chiến dịch thành công!');
        }
        showCampaignModal.value = false;
    } catch (error) {
        console.error('Lỗi:', error);
        alert('Có lỗi xảy ra');
    } finally {
        isSubmitting.value = false;
    }
};

const deleteCampaign = async (id) => {
    if (!confirm('Bạn có chắc chắn muốn xóa chiến dịch này?')) return;
    
    try {
        await router.delete(`/admin/campaigns/${id}`);
        campaigns.value = campaigns.value.filter(c => c.id !== id);
        alert('Xóa chiến dịch thành công!');
    } catch (error) {
        console.error('Lỗi:', error);
        alert('Có lỗi xảy ra khi xóa');
    }
};

const toggleCampaignStatus = async (campaign) => {
    const newStatus = campaign.status === 'active' ? 'ended' : 'active';
    try {
        await router.put(`/admin/campaigns/${campaign.id}/status`, { status: newStatus });
        campaign.status = newStatus;
        alert(`Chiến dịch đã chuyển sang trạng thái: ${getCampaignStatusLabel(newStatus)}`);
    } catch (error) {
        console.error('Lỗi:', error);
        alert('Có lỗi xảy ra');
    }
};

const closeModal = () => {
    showModal.value = false;
    showCampaignModal.value = false;
};

// Add tier to preorder form
const addTier = () => {
    const tiers = preorderForm.value.tiers;
    const lastTier = tiers[tiers.length - 1];
    const newFrom = lastTier ? lastTier.to + 1 : 1;
    const newTo = newFrom + 9;
    preorderForm.value.tiers.push({
        from: newFrom,
        to: newTo,
        discount: 5,
        label: `Top ${newTo}`
    });
};

const removeTier = (index) => {
    if (preorderForm.value.tiers.length > 1) {
        preorderForm.value.tiers.splice(index, 1);
    }
};
</script>

<template>
    <Head title="Quản lý khuyến mãi - BigBag Admin" />
    
    <AdminLayout>
        <div class="p-4 md:p-8">
            <!-- Header -->
            <div class="flex flex-col sm:flex-row justify-between items-start sm:items-center gap-4 mb-6">
                <div>
                    <h1 class="text-2xl md:text-3xl font-bold text-gray-800">Khuyến mãi & Chiến dịch</h1>
                    <p class="text-sm text-gray-500 mt-1">Quản lý mã giảm giá, pre-order và chiến dịch</p>
                </div>
                <div class="flex gap-2 flex-wrap">
                    <button 
                        @click="openModal()" 
                        class="bg-orange-600 text-white px-4 py-2 rounded-xl flex items-center gap-2 hover:bg-orange-700 transition-colors text-sm"
                    >
                        <span class="material-symbols-outlined text-lg">add</span>
                        Thêm khuyến mãi
                    </button>
                    <button 
                        @click="openCampaignModal()" 
                        class="bg-blue-600 text-white px-4 py-2 rounded-xl flex items-center gap-2 hover:bg-blue-700 transition-colors text-sm"
                    >
                        <span class="material-symbols-outlined text-lg">campaign</span>
                        Thêm chiến dịch
                    </button>
                </div>
            </div>

            <!-- Search Bar -->
            <div class="mb-6">
                <div class="relative max-w-md">
                    <span class="material-symbols-outlined absolute left-3 top-1/2 -translate-y-1/2 text-gray-400 text-lg">search</span>
                    <input 
                        v-model="searchQuery" 
                        type="text" 
                        placeholder="Tìm kiếm..." 
                        class="pl-10 pr-4 py-2.5 bg-white border border-gray-300 rounded-full w-full focus:outline-none focus:border-orange-500 focus:ring-2 focus:ring-orange-500/20 text-sm"
                    >
                </div>
            </div>

            <!-- Tabs chính -->
            <div class="flex gap-1 border-b border-gray-200 mb-6">
                <button 
                    @click="selectedTab = 'vouchers'" 
                    class="px-4 py-2.5 text-sm font-medium transition-all"
                    :class="selectedTab === 'vouchers' ? 'text-orange-600 border-b-2 border-orange-600' : 'text-gray-500 hover:text-gray-700'"
                >
                    🎫 Mã giảm giá
                </button>
                <button 
                    @click="selectedTab = 'preorder'" 
                    class="px-4 py-2.5 text-sm font-medium transition-all"
                    :class="selectedTab === 'preorder' ? 'text-orange-600 border-b-2 border-orange-600' : 'text-gray-500 hover:text-gray-700'"
                >
                    ⏳ Pre-order Tier
                </button>
                <button 
                    @click="selectedTab = 'campaigns'" 
                    class="px-4 py-2.5 text-sm font-medium transition-all"
                    :class="selectedTab === 'campaigns' ? 'text-orange-600 border-b-2 border-orange-600' : 'text-gray-500 hover:text-gray-700'"
                >
                    🎯 Chiến dịch
                </button>
            </div>

            <!-- Tab nhỏ cho voucher và preorder -->
            <div v-if="selectedTab !== 'campaigns'" class="flex gap-2 mb-6 border-b border-gray-200">
                <button 
                    v-for="type in promoTypes" 
                    :key="type.value" 
                    @click="activePromoType = type.value" 
                    class="px-4 py-2 text-sm font-medium transition-all"
                    :class="activePromoType === type.value ? 'text-orange-600 border-b-2 border-orange-600' : 'text-gray-500 hover:text-gray-700'"
                >
                    {{ type.icon }} {{ type.label }}
                </button>
            </div>

            <!-- Tab campaign status -->
            <div v-if="selectedTab === 'campaigns'" class="flex gap-2 mb-6 border-b border-gray-200">
                <button 
                    v-for="status in campaignStatuses" 
                    :key="status.value" 
                    @click="activeCampaignTab = status.value" 
                    class="px-4 py-2 text-sm font-medium transition-all"
                    :class="activeCampaignTab === status.value ? 'text-orange-600 border-b-2 border-orange-600' : 'text-gray-500 hover:text-gray-700'"
                >
                    {{ status.label }}
                </button>
            </div>

            <!-- Danh sách khuyến mãi (Voucher + Pre-order) -->
            <div v-if="selectedTab !== 'campaigns'" class="grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-2 lg:grid-cols-3 gap-6">
                <div 
                    v-for="promo in filteredPromotions" 
                    :key="promo.id" 
                    class="bg-white rounded-xl p-5 border border-gray-200 hover:shadow-md transition-all"
                >
                    <!-- Voucher Card -->
                    <template v-if="promo.type === 'voucher'">
                        <div class="flex justify-between items-start">
                            <div>
                                <span 
                                    class="text-xs px-2 py-1 rounded-full"
                                    :class="getStatusClass(promo.active)"
                                >
                                    {{ getStatusLabel(promo.active) }}
                                </span>
                                <h3 class="font-bold text-xl text-gray-800 mt-2">{{ promo.code }}</h3>
                            </div>
                            <div class="flex gap-1">
                                <button 
                                    @click="openModal(promo)" 
                                    class="p-1.5 text-blue-600 hover:bg-blue-100 rounded-lg transition-colors text-sm"
                                >
                                    ✏️
                                </button>
                                <button 
                                    @click="deletePromo(promo.id)" 
                                    class="p-1.5 text-red-600 hover:bg-red-100 rounded-lg transition-colors text-sm"
                                >
                                    🗑️
                                </button>
                            </div>
                        </div>
                        
                        <p class="text-sm text-gray-500 mb-3">{{ promo.desc }}</p>
                        
                        <div class="grid grid-cols-2 gap-2 text-sm">
                            <span class="flex items-center gap-1">
                                <span class="text-gray-500">🎯</span>
                                <span 
                                    class="text-xs px-2 py-0.5 rounded-full"
                                    :class="getTargetTypeClass(promo.targetType)"
                                >
                                    {{ getTargetTypeLabel(promo.targetType) }}
                                </span>
                            </span>
                            <span class="flex items-center gap-1">
                                <span class="text-gray-500">💰</span>
                                <span class="text-orange-600 font-semibold">{{ promo.discount }}</span>
                            </span>
                            <span class="flex items-center gap-1">
                                <span class="text-gray-500">📅</span>
                                <span class="text-sm">HSD: {{ promo.expiry }}</span>
                            </span>
                            <span class="flex items-center gap-1">
                                <span class="text-gray-500">📊</span>
                                <span class="text-sm">{{ promo.used }}/{{ promo.limit }}</span>
                            </span>
                        </div>
                        
                        <div class="mt-3 pt-3 border-t border-gray-100">
                            <div class="w-full h-1.5 bg-gray-100 rounded-full overflow-hidden">
                                <div 
                                    class="h-full bg-orange-500 rounded-full transition-all"
                                    :style="{ width: getUsedPercentage(promo.used, promo.limit) + '%' }"
                                ></div>
                            </div>
                        </div>
                        
                        <div class="mt-3 pt-2 flex justify-end">
                            <button 
                                @click="toggleStatus(promo)"
                                :class="promo.active ? 'bg-green-100 text-green-700' : 'bg-gray-100 text-gray-500'"
                                class="text-xs px-3 py-1 rounded-full transition-colors"
                            >
                                {{ promo.active ? '✅ Kích hoạt' : '⛔ Đã tắt' }}
                            </button>
                        </div>
                    </template>

                    <!-- Pre-order Tier Card -->
                    <template v-else-if="promo.type === 'preorder_tier'">
                        <div class="flex justify-between items-start">
                            <div>
                                <span 
                                    class="text-xs px-2 py-1 rounded-full"
                                    :class="getStatusClass(promo.active)"
                                >
                                    {{ getStatusLabel(promo.active) }}
                                </span>
                                <h3 class="font-bold text-lg text-gray-800 mt-2">⏳ {{ promo.code || 'Pre-order' }}</h3>
                            </div>
                            <div class="flex gap-1">
                                <button 
                                    @click="openModal(promo)" 
                                    class="p-1.5 text-blue-600 hover:bg-blue-100 rounded-lg transition-colors text-sm"
                                >
                                    ✏️
                                </button>
                                <button 
                                    @click="deletePromo(promo.id)" 
                                    class="p-1.5 text-red-600 hover:bg-red-100 rounded-lg transition-colors text-sm"
                                >
                                    🗑️
                                </button>
                            </div>
                        </div>
                        
                        <div class="mt-3 bg-gradient-to-r from-blue-50 to-purple-50 rounded-lg p-4">
                            <div class="flex justify-between items-center mb-2">
                                <span class="text-sm font-medium">Đã đặt trước: {{ promo.currentBuyers || 0 }} lượt</span>
                                <span class="text-sm font-bold text-blue-600">
                                    Giảm hiện tại: {{ getPreorderDiscount(promo) }}
                                </span>
                            </div>
                            
                            <div class="w-full h-2 bg-gray-200 rounded-full overflow-hidden">
                                <div 
                                    class="h-full bg-gradient-to-r from-blue-500 to-purple-500 rounded-full transition-all"
                                    :style="{ width: getPreorderProgress(promo) + '%' }"
                                ></div>
                            </div>
                            
                            <div class="mt-3 grid grid-cols-3 gap-2 text-xs">
                                <div v-for="tier in promo.tiers" :key="tier.from" 
                                    class="text-center p-2 bg-white rounded border"
                                    :class="promo.currentBuyers >= tier.from && promo.currentBuyers <= tier.to ? 'border-blue-500 bg-blue-50' : 'border-gray-200'"
                                >
                                    <div class="font-bold">{{ tier.discount }}%</div>
                                    <div class="text-gray-500">#{{ tier.from }}-{{ tier.to }}</div>
                                </div>
                            </div>
                        </div>
                        
                        <div class="mt-3 flex justify-between items-center text-xs text-gray-500">
                            <span>📅 {{ formatDate(promo.startDate) }} - {{ formatDate(promo.endDate) }}</span>
                            <span v-if="promo.minOrder > 0">💰 Đơn tối thiểu: {{ formatPrice(promo.minOrder) }}</span>
                        </div>
                        
                        <div class="mt-3 pt-2 flex justify-end">
                            <button 
                                @click="toggleStatus(promo)"
                                :class="promo.active ? 'bg-green-100 text-green-700' : 'bg-gray-100 text-gray-500'"
                                class="text-xs px-3 py-1 rounded-full transition-colors"
                            >
                                {{ promo.active ? '✅ Kích hoạt' : '⛔ Đã tắt' }}
                            </button>
                        </div>
                    </template>
                </div>
                
                <!-- Empty state -->
                <div v-if="filteredPromotions.length === 0" class="col-span-full text-center py-12 text-gray-500">
                    <span class="material-symbols-outlined text-5xl mb-2">local_offer</span>
                    <p>Không có khuyến mãi nào</p>
                    <button 
                        @click="openModal()" 
                        class="mt-3 text-orange-600 hover:underline"
                    >
                        Thêm khuyến mãi đầu tiên
                    </button>
                </div>
            </div>

            <!-- Danh sách chiến dịch -->
            <div v-if="selectedTab === 'campaigns'" class="grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-2 lg:grid-cols-2 gap-6">
                <div 
                    v-for="campaign in filteredCampaigns" 
                    :key="campaign.id" 
                    class="bg-white rounded-xl overflow-hidden border border-gray-200 hover:shadow-md transition-all"
                >
                    <div class="relative h-48 bg-gray-200">
                        <img 
                            v-if="campaign.banner" 
                            :src="campaign.banner" 
                            :alt="campaign.name"
                            class="w-full h-full object-cover"
                        >
                        <div v-else class="w-full h-full flex items-center justify-center text-gray-400">
                            <span class="material-symbols-outlined text-4xl">image</span>
                        </div>
                        <div class="absolute top-3 right-3 flex gap-1">
                            <span 
                                class="text-xs px-2 py-1 rounded-full font-medium"
                                :class="getCampaignStatusClass(campaign.status)"
                            >
                                {{ getCampaignStatusLabel(campaign.status) }}
                            </span>
                            <span v-if="campaign.featured" class="text-xs px-2 py-1 rounded-full bg-yellow-100 text-yellow-700 font-medium">
                                ⭐ Nổi bật
                            </span>
                        </div>
                    </div>
                    
                    <div class="p-4">
                        <div class="flex justify-between items-start">
                            <h3 class="font-bold text-lg text-gray-800">{{ campaign.name }}</h3>
                            <div class="flex gap-1">
                                <button 
                                    @click="openCampaignModal(campaign)" 
                                    class="p-1.5 text-blue-600 hover:bg-blue-100 rounded-lg transition-colors text-sm"
                                >
                                    ✏️
                                </button>
                                <button 
                                    @click="deleteCampaign(campaign.id)" 
                                    class="p-1.5 text-red-600 hover:bg-red-100 rounded-lg transition-colors text-sm"
                                >
                                    🗑️
                                </button>
                            </div>
                        </div>
                        
                        <p class="text-sm text-gray-500 mt-1 line-clamp-2">{{ campaign.description }}</p>
                        
                        <div class="mt-3 grid grid-cols-2 gap-2 text-sm">
                            <span class="flex items-center gap-1">
                                <span class="text-gray-500">📅</span>
                                <span>{{ formatDate(campaign.startDate) }} - {{ formatDate(campaign.endDate) }}</span>
                            </span>
                            <span class="flex items-center gap-1">
                                <span class="text-gray-500">🏷️</span>
                                <span class="text-orange-600 font-semibold">{{ campaign.discount }}</span>
                            </span>
                            <span class="flex items-center gap-1">
                                <span class="text-gray-500">📦</span>
                                <span>{{ campaign.products?.length || 0 }} sản phẩm</span>
                            </span>
                            <span class="flex items-center gap-1">
                                <span class="text-gray-500">🔢</span>
                                <span>Priority {{ campaign.priority }}</span>
                            </span>
                        </div>
                        
                        <div class="mt-3 pt-3 border-t border-gray-100 flex justify-end">
                            <button 
                                @click="toggleCampaignStatus(campaign)"
                                class="text-xs px-3 py-1 rounded-full transition-colors"
                                :class="campaign.status === 'active' ? 'bg-green-100 text-green-700' : 'bg-blue-100 text-blue-700'"
                            >
                                {{ campaign.status === 'active' ? '✅ Đang diễn ra' : '🔄 Kích hoạt' }}
                            </button>
                        </div>
                    </div>
                </div>
                
                <!-- Empty state cho campaigns -->
                <div v-if="filteredCampaigns.length === 0" class="col-span-full text-center py-12 text-gray-500">
                    <span class="material-symbols-outlined text-5xl mb-2">campaign</span>
                    <p>Không có chiến dịch nào</p>
                    <button 
                        @click="openCampaignModal()" 
                        class="mt-3 text-blue-600 hover:underline"
                    >
                        Thêm chiến dịch đầu tiên
                    </button>
                </div>
            </div>
        </div>

        <!-- Modal Thêm/Sửa khuyến mãi (Voucher + Pre-order) -->
        <div 
            v-if="showModal" 
            class="fixed inset-0 bg-black/50 flex items-center justify-center z-50 p-4" 
            @click.self="closeModal"
        >
            <div class="bg-white rounded-xl max-w-2xl w-full p-6 shadow-xl max-h-[90vh] overflow-y-auto">
                <div class="flex justify-between items-center mb-4">
                    <h3 class="text-xl font-bold text-gray-800">
                        {{ editingPromo ? 'Sửa khuyến mãi' : 'Thêm khuyến mãi' }}
                    </h3>
                    <button 
                        @click="closeModal" 
                        class="text-gray-400 hover:text-gray-600 transition-colors text-xl"
                    >
                        ✕
                    </button>
                </div>

                <!-- Chọn loại khuyến mãi -->
                <div class="mb-4">
                    <label class="text-sm block mb-1 text-gray-700 font-medium">Loại khuyến mãi</label>
                    <select 
                        v-model="form.type" 
                        class="w-full border border-gray-300 rounded-lg px-3 py-2 focus:outline-none focus:border-orange-500"
                        @change="editingPromo = null"
                    >
                        <option value="voucher">🎫 Mã giảm giá</option>
                        <option value="preorder_tier">⏳ Pre-order theo lượt</option>
                    </select>
                </div>

                <!-- Form Voucher -->
                <template v-if="form.type === 'voucher'">
                    <div class="space-y-4">
                        <div>
                            <label class="text-sm block mb-1 text-gray-700 font-medium">Mã code *</label>
                            <input 
                                v-model="form.code" 
                                class="w-full border border-gray-300 rounded-lg px-3 py-2 uppercase focus:outline-none focus:border-orange-500"
                                placeholder="NHAPMA"
                            >
                        </div>
                        
                        <div>
                            <label class="text-sm block mb-1 text-gray-700 font-medium">Áp dụng cho</label>
                            <select 
                                v-model="form.targetType" 
                                class="w-full border border-gray-300 rounded-lg px-3 py-2 focus:outline-none focus:border-orange-500"
                            >
                                <option value="retail">🛒 Bán lẻ</option>
                                <option value="wholesale">🏭 Bán sỉ</option>
                                <option value="preorder">⏳ Pre-order</option>
                                <option value="all">📦 Tất cả</option>
                            </select>
                        </div>
                        
                        <div>
                            <label class="text-sm block mb-1 text-gray-700 font-medium">Loại giảm giá</label>
                            <select 
                                v-model="form.discountType" 
                                class="w-full border border-gray-300 rounded-lg px-3 py-2 focus:outline-none focus:border-orange-500"
                            >
                                <option value="fixed">Giảm trực tiếp (₫)</option>
                                <option value="percent">Giảm theo %</option>
                                <option value="freeship">Miễn phí ship</option>
                            </select>
                        </div>
                        
                        <div v-if="form.discountType !== 'freeship'">
                            <label class="text-sm block mb-1 text-gray-700 font-medium">Giá trị giảm</label>
                            <input 
                                v-model="form.discount" 
                                class="w-full border border-gray-300 rounded-lg px-3 py-2 focus:outline-none focus:border-orange-500"
                                :placeholder="form.discountType === 'percent' ? '10' : '50000'"
                            >
                            <p class="text-xs text-gray-500 mt-1">
                                {{ form.discountType === 'percent' ? 'Nhập số phần trăm (VD: 10)' : 'Nhập số tiền (VD: 50000)' }}
                            </p>
                        </div>
                        
                        <div>
                            <label class="text-sm block mb-1 text-gray-700 font-medium">Điều kiện (đơn tối thiểu)</label>
                            <input 
                                v-model="form.minOrder" 
                                type="number" 
                                class="w-full border border-gray-300 rounded-lg px-3 py-2 focus:outline-none focus:border-orange-500"
                                placeholder="500000"
                            >
                        </div>
                        
                        <div>
                            <label class="text-sm block mb-1 text-gray-700 font-medium">Số lượng mã</label>
                            <input 
                                v-model="form.limit" 
                                type="number" 
                                class="w-full border border-gray-300 rounded-lg px-3 py-2 focus:outline-none focus:border-orange-500"
                                placeholder="100"
                            >
                        </div>
                        
                        <div>
                            <label class="text-sm block mb-1 text-gray-700 font-medium">Ngày kết thúc</label>
                            <input 
                                v-model="form.expiry" 
                                type="date" 
                                class="w-full border border-gray-300 rounded-lg px-3 py-2 focus:outline-none focus:border-orange-500"
                            >
                        </div>
                        
                        <label class="flex items-center gap-2 cursor-pointer">
                            <input type="checkbox" v-model="form.active" class="w-4 h-4 text-orange-600 rounded">
                            <span class="text-sm text-gray-700">Kích hoạt ngay</span>
                        </label>
                    </div>
                </template>

                <!-- Form Pre-order Tier -->
                <template v-if="form.type === 'preorder_tier'">
                    <div class="space-y-4">
                        <div>
                            <label class="text-sm block mb-1 text-gray-700 font-medium">Tên chương trình *</label>
                            <input 
                                v-model="preorderForm.name" 
                                class="w-full border border-gray-300 rounded-lg px-3 py-2 focus:outline-none focus:border-orange-500"
                                placeholder="Pre-order Sale 2025"
                            >
                        </div>

                        <div>
                            <label class="text-sm block mb-1 text-gray-700 font-medium">Sản phẩm áp dụng</label>
                            <select 
                                v-model="preorderForm.productId" 
                                class="w-full border border-gray-300 rounded-lg px-3 py-2 focus:outline-none focus:border-orange-500"
                            >
                                <option :value="null">Tất cả sản phẩm pre-order</option>
                                <!-- Thêm option sản phẩm từ database -->
                            </select>
                        </div>

                        <div>
                            <label class="text-sm block mb-1 text-gray-700 font-medium">Đơn hàng tối thiểu</label>
                            <input 
                                v-model="preorderForm.minOrder" 
                                type="number" 
                                class="w-full border border-gray-300 rounded-lg px-3 py-2 focus:outline-none focus:border-orange-500"
                                placeholder="0"
                            >
                        </div>

                        <div class="grid grid-cols-2 gap-4">
                            <div>
                                <label class="text-sm block mb-1 text-gray-700 font-medium">Ngày bắt đầu</label>
                                <input 
                                    v-model="preorderForm.startDate" 
                                    type="date" 
                                    class="w-full border border-gray-300 rounded-lg px-3 py-2 focus:outline-none focus:border-orange-500"
                                >
                            </div>
                            <div>
                                <label class="text-sm block mb-1 text-gray-700 font-medium">Ngày kết thúc</label>
                                <input 
                                    v-model="preorderForm.endDate" 
                                    type="date" 
                                    class="w-full border border-gray-300 rounded-lg px-3 py-2 focus:outline-none focus:border-orange-500"
                                >
                            </div>
                        </div>

                        <div>
                            <div class="flex justify-between items-center mb-2">
                                <label class="text-sm font-medium text-gray-700">Các mức giảm giá theo lượt</label>
                                <button 
                                    @click="addTier" 
                                    type="button"
                                    class="text-sm text-blue-600 hover:text-blue-700 font-medium"
                                >
                                    + Thêm mức
                                </button>
                            </div>
                            
                            <div class="space-y-2">
                                <div v-for="(tier, index) in preorderForm.tiers" :key="index" 
                                    class="flex items-center gap-2 bg-gray-50 p-3 rounded-lg">
                                    <div class="flex-1 grid grid-cols-3 gap-2">
                                        <div>
                                            <label class="text-xs text-gray-500">Từ</label>
                                            <input 
                                                v-model="tier.from" 
                                                type="number" 
                                                class="w-full border border-gray-300 rounded px-2 py-1 text-sm"
                                                min="1"
                                            >
                                        </div>
                                        <div>
                                            <label class="text-xs text-gray-500">Đến</label>
                                            <input 
                                                v-model="tier.to" 
                                                type="number" 
                                                class="w-full border border-gray-300 rounded px-2 py-1 text-sm"
                                                min="1"
                                            >
                                        </div>
                                        <div>
                                            <label class="text-xs text-gray-500">Giảm %</label>
                                            <input 
                                                v-model="tier.discount" 
                                                type="number" 
                                                class="w-full border border-gray-300 rounded px-2 py-1 text-sm"
                                                min="0"
                                                max="100"
                                            >
                                        </div>
                                    </div>
                                    <button 
                                        @click="removeTier(index)" 
                                        type="button"
                                        class="text-red-500 hover:text-red-700 text-sm p-1"
                                        :disabled="preorderForm.tiers.length <= 1"
                                    >
                                        ✕
                                    </button>
                                </div>
                            </div>
                        </div>
                        
                        <label class="flex items-center gap-2 cursor-pointer">
                            <input type="checkbox" v-model="preorderForm.active" class="w-4 h-4 text-orange-600 rounded">
                            <span class="text-sm text-gray-700">Kích hoạt ngay</span>
                        </label>
                    </div>
                </template>
                
                <div class="flex justify-end gap-3 mt-6">
                    <button 
                        @click="closeModal" 
                        class="px-4 py-2 border border-gray-300 rounded-lg text-gray-600 hover:bg-gray-50 transition-colors"
                    >
                        Hủy
                    </button>
                    <button 
                        @click="savePromo" 
                        class="px-4 py-2 bg-orange-600 text-white rounded-lg hover:bg-orange-700 transition-colors"
                        :disabled="isSubmitting"
                    >
                        {{ isSubmitting ? 'Đang lưu...' : 'Lưu' }}
                    </button>
                </div>
            </div>
        </div>

        <!-- Modal Campaign -->
        <div 
            v-if="showCampaignModal" 
            class="fixed inset-0 bg-black/50 flex items-center justify-center z-50 p-4" 
            @click.self="closeModal"
        >
            <div class="bg-white rounded-xl max-w-2xl w-full p-6 shadow-xl max-h-[90vh] overflow-y-auto">
                <div class="flex justify-between items-center mb-4">
                    <h3 class="text-xl font-bold text-gray-800">
                        {{ editingCampaign ? 'Sửa chiến dịch' : 'Thêm chiến dịch mới' }}
                    </h3>
                    <button 
                        @click="closeModal" 
                        class="text-gray-400 hover:text-gray-600 transition-colors text-xl"
                    >
                        ✕
                    </button>
                </div>
                
                <div class="space-y-4">
                    <div>
                        <label class="text-sm block mb-1 text-gray-700 font-medium">Tên chiến dịch *</label>
                        <input 
                            v-model="campaignForm.name" 
                            class="w-full border border-gray-300 rounded-lg px-3 py-2 focus:outline-none focus:border-blue-500"
                            placeholder="Tên chiến dịch"
                        >
                    </div>

                    <div>
                        <label class="text-sm block mb-1 text-gray-700 font-medium">Loại chiến dịch</label>
                        <select 
                            v-model="campaignForm.type" 
                            class="w-full border border-gray-300 rounded-lg px-3 py-2 focus:outline-none focus:border-blue-500"
                        >
                            <option value="seasonal">Theo mùa</option>
                            <option value="flash_sale">Flash Sale</option>
                            <option value="anniversary">Kỷ niệm</option>
                            <option value="holiday">Ngày lễ</option>
                            <option value="product_launch">Ra mắt sản phẩm</option>
                            <option value="other">Khác</option>
                        </select>
                    </div>

                    <div>
                        <label class="text-sm block mb-1 text-gray-700 font-medium">Mô tả</label>
                        <textarea 
                            v-model="campaignForm.description" 
                            class="w-full border border-gray-300 rounded-lg px-3 py-2 focus:outline-none focus:border-blue-500"
                            rows="3"
                            placeholder="Mô tả chiến dịch"
                        ></textarea>
                    </div>

                    <div class="grid grid-cols-2 gap-4">
                        <div>
                            <label class="text-sm block mb-1 text-gray-700 font-medium">Ngày bắt đầu</label>
                            <input 
                                v-model="campaignForm.startDate" 
                                type="date" 
                                class="w-full border border-gray-300 rounded-lg px-3 py-2 focus:outline-none focus:border-blue-500"
                            >
                        </div>
                        <div>
                            <label class="text-sm block mb-1 text-gray-700 font-medium">Ngày kết thúc</label>
                            <input 
                                v-model="campaignForm.endDate" 
                                type="date" 
                                class="w-full border border-gray-300 rounded-lg px-3 py-2 focus:outline-none focus:border-blue-500"
                            >
                        </div>
                    </div>

                    <div>
                        <label class="text-sm block mb-1 text-gray-700 font-medium">Trạng thái</label>
                        <select 
                            v-model="campaignForm.status" 
                            class="w-full border border-gray-300 rounded-lg px-3 py-2 focus:outline-none focus:border-blue-500"
                        >
                            <option value="scheduled">Sắp diễn ra</option>
                            <option value="active">Đang diễn ra</option>
                            <option value="ended">Đã kết thúc</option>
                        </select>
                    </div>

                    <div>
                        <label class="text-sm block mb-1 text-gray-700 font-medium">Banner</label>
                        <input 
                            v-model="campaignForm.banner" 
                            class="w-full border border-gray-300 rounded-lg px-3 py-2 focus:outline-none focus:border-blue-500"
                            placeholder="/images/campaigns/banner.jpg"
                        >
                        <p class="text-xs text-gray-500 mt-1">Đường dẫn ảnh banner</p>
                    </div>

                    <div>
                        <label class="text-sm block mb-1 text-gray-700 font-medium">Danh sách sản phẩm (ID)</label>
                        <input 
                            v-model="campaignForm.products"
```
