```php
use App\Http\Controllers\Admin\PromotionController;
```

## 3. File Promotions.vue hoàn chỉnh

```vue
<script setup>
import { ref, computed } from 'vue';
import AdminLayout from '@/Layouts/AdminLayout.vue';
import { Head, router } from '@inertiajs/vue3';

// Nhận dữ liệu từ Controller qua props
const props = defineProps({
    // Dữ liệu khuyến mãi
    initialPromotions: {
        type: Array,
        default: () => []
    },
    initialCampaigns: {
        type: Array,
        default: () => []
    },
    // Dữ liệu từ các module khác
    banners: {
        type: Array,
        default: () => []
    },
    news: {
        type: Array,
        default: () => []
    },
    products: {
        type: Array,
        default: () => []
    },
    categories: {
        type: Array,
        default: () => []
    },
    brands: {
        type: Array,
        default: () => []
    },
    colors: {
        type: Array,
        default: () => []
    }
});

// Filter state
const activePromoType = ref('all');
const searchQuery = ref('');
const activeCampaignTab = ref('all');
const selectedTab = ref('vouchers');

// Dữ liệu
const promotions = ref(props.initialPromotions || []);
const campaigns = ref(props.initialCampaigns || []);
const banners = ref(props.banners || []);
const news = ref(props.news || []);
const products = ref(props.products || []);
const categories = ref(props.categories || []);
const brands = ref(props.brands || []);
const colors = ref(props.colors || []);

// Modal state
const showModal = ref(false);
const showCampaignModal = ref(false);
const showDeleteModal = ref(false);
const editingPromo = ref(null);
const editingCampaign = ref(null);
const isSubmitting = ref(false);
const errorMessage = ref('');
const modalMode = ref('add');

// Form data cho voucher
const form = ref({
    code: '',
    type: 'voucher',
    targetType: 'retail',
    discountType: 'fixed',
    discount: '',
    discountValue: 0,
    minOrder: 0,
    limit: 100,
    expiry: '',
    active: true,
    campaign_id: null,
    news_ids: []
});

// Form data cho pre-order tier
const preorderForm = ref({
    id: null,
    name: '',
    type: 'preorder_tier',
    targetType: 'preorder',
    product_id: null,
    tiers: [
        { from: 1, to: 10, discount: 20, label: 'Top 10' },
        { from: 11, to: 20, discount: 10, label: 'Top 20' },
        { from: 21, to: 30, discount: 5, label: 'Top 30' }
    ],
    currentBuyers: 0,
    startDate: '',
    endDate: '',
    active: true,
    minOrder: 0,
    campaign_id: null,
    news_ids: []
});

// Form data cho campaign
const campaignForm = ref({
    name: '',
    type: 'seasonal',
    description: '',
    startDate: '',
    endDate: '',
    status: 'scheduled',
    banner: '',
    products: [],
    discount: '',
    priority: 1,
    featured: false,
    news_ids: [],
    promotion_ids: []
});

// Promotion types
const promoTypes = [
    { value: 'all', label: 'Tất cả', icon: '📦' },
    { value: 'voucher', label: 'Mã giảm giá', icon: '🎫' },
    { value: 'preorder_tier', label: 'Pre-order theo lượt', icon: '⏳' }
];

// Campaign status
const campaignStatuses = [
    { value: 'all', label: 'Tất cả' },
    { value: 'active', label: 'Đang diễn ra' },
    { value: 'ended', label: 'Đã kết thúc' },
    { value: 'scheduled', label: 'Sắp diễn ra' }
];

// Computed: filtered promotions
const filteredPromotions = computed(() => {
    let filtered = promotions.value;
    
    if (activePromoType.value !== 'all') {
        filtered = filtered.filter(p => p.type === activePromoType.value);
    }
    
    if (searchQuery.value) {
        const query = searchQuery.value.toLowerCase();
        filtered = filtered.filter(p => 
            (p.code && p.code.toLowerCase().includes(query)) ||
            (p.desc && p.desc.toLowerCase().includes(query)) ||
            (p.name && p.name.toLowerCase().includes(query))
        );
    }
    
    return filtered;
});

// Computed: filtered campaigns
const filteredCampaigns = computed(() => {
    let filtered = campaigns.value;
    
    if (activeCampaignTab.value !== 'all') {
        filtered = filtered.filter(c => c.status === activeCampaignTab.value);
    }
    
    if (searchQuery.value) {
        const query = searchQuery.value.toLowerCase();
        filtered = filtered.filter(c => 
            c.name.toLowerCase().includes(query) ||
            c.description.toLowerCase().includes(query)
        );
    }
    
    return filtered;
});

// Helper functions
const getTargetTypeLabel = (type) => {
    const labels = {
        retail: 'Bán lẻ',
        wholesale: 'Bán sỉ',
        preorder: 'Pre-order',
        all: 'Tất cả'
    };
    return labels[type] || type;
};

const getTargetTypeClass = (type) => {
    const classes = {
        retail: 'bg-orange-100 text-orange-700',
        wholesale: 'bg-green-100 text-green-700',
        preorder: 'bg-blue-100 text-blue-700',
        all: 'bg-purple-100 text-purple-700'
    };
    return classes[type] || 'bg-gray-100 text-gray-600';
};

const getStatusClass = (active) => {
    return active ? 'bg-green-100 text-green-700' : 'bg-red-100 text-red-700';
};

const getStatusLabel = (active) => {
    return active ? 'Đang hoạt động' : 'Đã tắt';
};

const getCampaignStatusClass = (status) => {
    const classes = {
        active: 'bg-green-100 text-green-700',
        ended: 'bg-gray-100 text-gray-600',
        scheduled: 'bg-blue-100 text-blue-700'
    };
    return classes[status] || 'bg-gray-100 text-gray-600';
};

const getCampaignStatusLabel = (status) => {
    const labels = {
        active: 'Đang diễn ra',
        ended: 'Đã kết thúc',
        scheduled: 'Sắp diễn ra'
    };
    return labels[status] || status;
};

const getUsedPercentage = (used, limit) => {
    if (!limit || limit === 0) return 0;
    return Math.min((used / limit) * 100, 100);
};

const formatPrice = (value) => {
    if (!value) return '0₫';
    return value.toLocaleString('vi-VN') + '₫';
};

const formatDate = (date) => {
    if (!date) return '';
    const d = new Date(date);
    return d.toLocaleDateString('vi-VN', { day: '2-digit', month: '2-digit', year: 'numeric' });
};

const getCurrentTier = (promo) => {
    if (!promo.tiers || promo.currentBuyers === undefined) return null;
    return promo.tiers.find(t => promo.currentBuyers >= t.from && promo.currentBuyers <= t.to) || null;
};

const getPreorderDiscount = (promo) => {
    const tier = getCurrentTier(promo);
    return tier ? `${tier.discount}%` : '0%';
};

const getPreorderProgress = (promo) => {
    if (!promo.tiers || promo.tiers.length === 0) return 0;
    const maxBuyers = promo.tiers[promo.tiers.length - 1].to;
    const buyers = promo.currentBuyers || 0;
    return Math.min((buyers / maxBuyers) * 100, 100);
};

const getProductName = (productId) => {
    if (!productId) return 'Tất cả sản phẩm';
    const product = products.value.find(p => p.id === productId);
    return product ? product.name : 'Sản phẩm không tồn tại';
};

// Lấy banner theo campaign_id
const getBannerByCampaign = (campaignId) => {
    if (!campaignId) return null;
    return banners.value.find(b => b.campaign_id === campaignId);
};

// Lấy news theo campaign_id
const getNewsByCampaign = (campaignId) => {
    if (!campaignId) return [];
    return news.value.filter(n => n.campaign_ids && n.campaign_ids.includes(campaignId));
};

// Lấy promotion theo campaign_id
const getPromotionsByCampaign = (campaignId) => {
    if (!campaignId) return [];
    return promotions.value.filter(p => p.campaign_id === campaignId);
};

// Modal functions
const openAddModal = () => {
    modalMode.value = 'add';
    editingPromo.value = null;
    
    form.value = {
        code: '',
        type: 'voucher',
        targetType: 'all',
        discountType: 'fixed',
        discount: '',
        discountValue: 0,
        minOrder: 0,
        limit: 100,
        expiry: '',
        active: true,
        campaign_id: null,
        news_ids: []
    };
    
    preorderForm.value = {
        id: null,
        name: '',
        type: 'preorder_tier',
        targetType: 'preorder',
        product_id: null,
        tiers: [
            { from: 1, to: 10, discount: 20, label: 'Top 10' },
            { from: 11, to: 20, discount: 10, label: 'Top 20' },
            { from: 21, to: 30, discount: 5, label: 'Top 30' }
        ],
        currentBuyers: 0,
        startDate: '',
        endDate: '',
        active: true,
        minOrder: 0,
        campaign_id: null,
        news_ids: []
    };
    
    showModal.value = true;
};

const openEditModal = (promo) => {
    if (!promo) return;
    
    modalMode.value = 'edit';
    editingPromo.value = promo;
    
    if (promo.type === 'preorder_tier') {
        preorderForm.value = {
            id: promo.id,
            name: promo.code || promo.name || '',
            type: 'preorder_tier',
            targetType: 'preorder',
            product_id: promo.product_id || null,
            tiers: promo.tiers || [
                { from: 1, to: 10, discount: 20, label: 'Top 10' },
                { from: 11, to: 20, discount: 10, label: 'Top 20' },
                { from: 21, to: 30, discount: 5, label: 'Top 30' }
            ],
            currentBuyers: promo.currentBuyers || 0,
            startDate: promo.startDate || '',
            endDate: promo.endDate || promo.expiry || '',
            active: promo.active !== undefined ? promo.active : true,
            minOrder: promo.minOrder || 0,
            campaign_id: promo.campaign_id || null,
            news_ids: promo.news_ids || []
        };
        form.value.type = 'preorder_tier';
    } else {
        form.value = {
            code: promo.code || '',
            type: 'voucher',
            targetType: promo.targetType || 'all',
            discountType: promo.discountType || 'fixed',
            discount: promo.discountValue ? promo.discountValue.toString() : '',
            discountValue: promo.discountValue || 0,
            minOrder: promo.minOrder || 0,
            limit: promo.limit || 100,
            expiry: promo.expiry || '',
            active: promo.active !== undefined ? promo.active : true,
            campaign_id: promo.campaign_id || null,
            news_ids: promo.news_ids || []
        };
    }
    
    showModal.value = true;
};

// Save promotion
const savePromo = async () => {
    isSubmitting.value = true;
    errorMessage.value = '';
    
    try {
        if (form.value.type === 'voucher') {
            if (!form.value.code) {
                errorMessage.value = 'Vui lòng nhập mã giảm giá';
                return;
            }
            
            const discountValue = parseInt(form.value.discount) || 0;
            const discountText = form.value.discountType === 'percent' 
                ? form.value.discount + '%' 
                : form.value.discountType === 'freeship' 
                    ? 'Miễn phí ship' 
                    : formatPrice(discountValue);
            
            const promoData = {
                code: form.value.code.toUpperCase(),
                type: 'voucher',
                targetType: form.value.targetType,
                discountType: form.value.discountType,
                discount: discountText,
                discountValue: discountValue,
                minOrder: parseInt(form.value.minOrder) || 0,
                limit: parseInt(form.value.limit) || 100,
                expiry: form.value.expiry,
                active: form.value.active,
                campaign_id: form.value.campaign_id,
                news_ids: form.value.news_ids,
                desc: `${discountText} cho đơn từ ${formatPrice(form.value.minOrder)}`
            };
            
            if (editingPromo.value) {
                const index = promotions.value.findIndex(p => p.id === editingPromo.value.id);
                if (index !== -1) {
                    promotions.value[index] = {
                        ...promoData,
                        id: editingPromo.value.id,
                        used: editingPromo.value.used || 0
                    };
                }
                await router.put(`/admin/promotions/${editingPromo.value.id}`, promoData);
                alert('Cập nhật mã giảm giá thành công!');
            } else {
                const newPromo = {
                    ...promoData,
                    id: Date.now(),
                    used: 0
                };
                promotions.value.push(newPromo);
                await router.post('/admin/promotions', promoData);
                alert('Thêm mã giảm giá thành công!');
            }
        }
        
        if (form.value.type === 'preorder_tier') {
            if (!preorderForm.value.name) {
                errorMessage.value = 'Vui lòng nhập tên chương trình';
                return;
            }
            if (!preorderForm.value.product_id) {
                errorMessage.value = 'Vui lòng chọn sản phẩm áp dụng';
                return;
            }
            
            const tierData = {
                name: preorderForm.value.name,
                type: 'preorder_tier',
                targetType: 'preorder',
                product_id: preorderForm.value.product_id,
                tiers: preorderForm.value.tiers,
                startDate: preorderForm.value.startDate,
                endDate: preorderForm.value.endDate,
                active: preorderForm.value.active,
                minOrder: parseInt(preorderForm.value.minOrder) || 0,
                campaign_id: preorderForm.value.campaign_id,
                news_ids: preorderForm.value.news_ids,
                currentBuyers: preorderForm.value.currentBuyers || 0,
                code: preorderForm.value.name,
                desc: `Giảm giá theo số lượt đặt trước cho sản phẩm ${getProductName(preorderForm.value.product_id)}`
            };
            
            if (editingPromo.value) {
                const index = promotions.value.findIndex(p => p.id === editingPromo.value.id);
                if (index !== -1) {
                    promotions.value[index] = {
                        ...tierData,
                        id: editingPromo.value.id
                    };
                }
                await router.put(`/admin/promotions/${editingPromo.value.id}`, tierData);
                alert('Cập nhật chương trình pre-order thành công!');
            } else {
                const newPromo = {
                    ...tierData,
                    id: Date.now()
                };
                promotions.value.push(newPromo);
                await router.post('/admin/promotions/preorder', tierData);
                alert('Thêm chương trình pre-order thành công!');
            }
        }
        
        showModal.value = false;
        editingPromo.value = null;
    } catch (error) {
        console.error('Lỗi:', error);
        errorMessage.value = error.response?.data?.message || 'Có lỗi xảy ra';
    } finally {
        isSubmitting.value = false;
    }
};

// Delete promotion
const deletePromo = async (id) => {
    const promo = promotions.value.find(p => p.id === id);
    if (!confirm(`Bạn có chắc chắn muốn xóa khuyến mãi này?`)) {
        return;
    }
    
    try {
        await router.delete(`/admin/promotions/${id}`);
        promotions.value = promotions.value.filter(p => p.id !== id);
        alert('Xóa thành công!');
    } catch (error) {
        console.error('Lỗi:', error);
        alert('Có lỗi xảy ra khi xóa');
    }
};

// Toggle promotion status
const toggleStatus = async (promo) => {
    try {
        await router.put(`/admin/promotions/${promo.id}/toggle`, {
            active: !promo.active
        });
        promo.active = !promo.active;
        alert(promo.active ? 'Đã kích hoạt!' : 'Đã tắt!');
    } catch (error) {
        console.error('Lỗi:', error);
        alert('Có lỗi xảy ra');
    }
};

// Campaign functions
const openCampaignModal = (campaign = null) => {
    editingCampaign.value = campaign;
    
    if (campaign) {
        campaignForm.value = { 
            ...campaign,
            promotion_ids: campaign.promotion_ids || [],
            news_ids: campaign.news_ids || []
        };
    } else {
        campaignForm.value = {
            name: '',
            type: 'seasonal',
            description: '',
            startDate: '',
            endDate: '',
            status: 'scheduled',
            banner: '',
            products: [],
            discount: '',
            priority: 1,
            featured: false,
            news_ids: [],
            promotion_ids: []
        };
    }
    showCampaignModal.value = true;
};

const saveCampaign = async () => {
    if (!campaignForm.value.name) {
        alert('Vui lòng nhập tên chiến dịch');
        return;
    }
    
    isSubmitting.value = true;
    
    try {
        const data = {
            ...campaignForm.value,
            products: Array.isArray(campaignForm.value.products) 
                ? campaignForm.value.products 
                : campaignForm.value.products.split(',').map(p => parseInt(p.trim())).filter(p => !isNaN(p))
        };
        
        if (editingCampaign.value) {
            const index = campaigns.value.findIndex(c => c.id === editingCampaign.value.id);
            if (index !== -1) {
                campaigns.value[index] = { ...data, id: editingCampaign.value.id };
            }
            await router.put(`/admin/campaigns/${editingCampaign.value.id}`, data);
            alert('Cập nhật chiến dịch thành công!');
        } else {
            const newCampaign = { ...data, id: Date.now() };
            campaigns.value.push(newCampaign);
            await router.post('/admin/campaigns', data);
            alert('Thêm chiến dịch thành công!');
        }
        showCampaignModal.value = false;
    } catch (error) {
        console.error('Lỗi:', error);
        alert('Có lỗi xảy ra');
    } finally {
        isSubmitting.value = false;
    }
};

const deleteCampaign = async (id) => {
    if (!confirm('Bạn có chắc chắn muốn xóa chiến dịch này?')) return;
    
    try {
        await router.delete(`/admin/campaigns/${id}`);
        campaigns.value = campaigns.value.filter(c => c.id !== id);
        alert('Xóa chiến dịch thành công!');
    } catch (error) {
        console.error('Lỗi:', error);
        alert('Có lỗi xảy ra khi xóa');
    }
};

const toggleCampaignStatus = async (campaign) => {
    const newStatus = campaign.status === 'active' ? 'ended' : 'active';
    try {
        await router.put(`/admin/campaigns/${campaign.id}/status`, { status: newStatus });
        campaign.status = newStatus;
        alert(`Chiến dịch đã chuyển sang trạng thái: ${getCampaignStatusLabel(newStatus)}`);
    } catch (error) {
        console.error('Lỗi:', error);
        alert('Có lỗi xảy ra');
    }
};

const closeModal = () => {
    showModal.value = false;
    showCampaignModal.value = false;
    showDeleteModal.value = false;
    editingPromo.value = null;
    editingCampaign.value = null;
    errorMessage.value = '';
    isSubmitting.value = false;
};

const addTier = () => {
    const tiers = preorderForm.value.tiers;
    const lastTier = tiers[tiers.length - 1];
    const newFrom = lastTier ? lastTier.to + 1 : 1;
    const newTo = newFrom + 9;
    preorderForm.value.tiers.push({
        from: newFrom,
        to: newTo,
        discount: 5,
        label: `Top ${newTo}`
    });
};

const removeTier = (index) => {
    if (preorderForm.value.tiers.length > 1) {
        preorderForm.value.tiers.splice(index, 1);
    }
};
</script>

<template>
    <Head title="Quản lý khuyến mãi - BigBag Admin" />
    
    <AdminLayout>
        <div class="p-4 md:p-8">
            <!-- Header -->
            <div class="flex flex-col sm:flex-row justify-between items-start sm:items-center gap-4 mb-6">
                <div>
                    <h1 class="text-2xl md:text-3xl font-bold text-gray-800">Khuyến mãi & Chiến dịch</h1>
                    <p class="text-sm text-gray-500 mt-1">Quản lý mã giảm giá, pre-order và chiến dịch</p>
                </div>
                <div class="flex gap-2 flex-wrap">
                    <button @click="openAddModal()" class="bg-orange-600 text-white px-4 py-2 rounded-xl flex items-center gap-2 hover:bg-orange-700 transition-colors text-sm">
                        <span class="material-symbols-outlined text-lg">add</span>
                        Thêm khuyến mãi
                    </button>
                    <button @click="openCampaignModal()" class="bg-blue-600 text-white px-4 py-2 rounded-xl flex items-center gap-2 hover:bg-blue-700 transition-colors text-sm">
                        <span class="material-symbols-outlined text-lg">campaign</span>
                        Thêm chiến dịch
                    </button>
                </div>
            </div>

            <!-- Search Bar -->
            <div class="mb-6">
                <div class="relative max-w-md">
                    <span class="material-symbols-outlined absolute left-3 top-1/2 -translate-y-1/2 text-gray-400 text-lg">search</span>
                    <input 
                        v-model="searchQuery" 
                        type="text" 
                        placeholder="Tìm kiếm..." 
                        class="pl-10 pr-4 py-2.5 bg-white border border-gray-300 rounded-full w-full focus:outline-none focus:border-orange-500 focus:ring-2 focus:ring-orange-500/20 text-sm"
                    >
                </div>
            </div>

            <!-- Tabs chính -->
            <div class="flex gap-1 border-b border-gray-200 mb-6 overflow-x-auto">
                <button @click="selectedTab = 'vouchers'" class="px-4 py-2.5 text-sm font-medium transition-all whitespace-nowrap" :class="selectedTab === 'vouchers' ? 'text-orange-600 border-b-2 border-orange-600' : 'text-gray-500 hover:text-gray-700'">
                    🎫 Mã giảm giá
                </button>
                <button @click="selectedTab = 'preorder'" class="px-4 py-2.5 text-sm font-medium transition-all whitespace-nowrap" :class="selectedTab === 'preorder' ? 'text-orange-600 border-b-2 border-orange-600' : 'text-gray-500 hover:text-gray-700'">
                    ⏳ Pre-order Tier
                </button>
                <button @click="selectedTab = 'campaigns'" class="px-4 py-2.5 text-sm font-medium transition-all whitespace-nowrap" :class="selectedTab === 'campaigns' ? 'text-orange-600 border-b-2 border-orange-600' : 'text-gray-500 hover:text-gray-700'">
                    🎯 Chiến dịch
                </button>
            </div>

            <!-- Tab nhỏ cho voucher và preorder -->
            <div v-if="selectedTab === 'vouchers' || selectedTab === 'preorder'" class="flex gap-2 mb-6 border-b border-gray-200">
                <button v-for="type in promoTypes" :key="type.value" @click="activePromoType = type.value" class="px-4 py-2 text-sm font-medium transition-all" :class="activePromoType === type.value ? 'text-orange-600 border-b-2 border-orange-600' : 'text-gray-500 hover:text-gray-700'">
                    {{ type.icon }} {{ type.label }}
                </button>
            </div>

            <!-- Tab campaign status -->
            <div v-if="selectedTab === 'campaigns'" class="flex gap-2 mb-6 border-b border-gray-200">
                <button v-for="status in campaignStatuses" :key="status.value" @click="activeCampaignTab = status.value" class="px-4 py-2 text-sm font-medium transition-all" :class="activeCampaignTab === status.value ? 'text-orange-600 border-b-2 border-orange-600' : 'text-gray-500 hover:text-gray-700'">
                    {{ status.label }}
                </button>
            </div>

            <!-- Danh sách khuyến mãi (Voucher + Pre-order) -->
            <div v-if="selectedTab === 'vouchers' || selectedTab === 'preorder'" class="grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-2 lg:grid-cols-3 gap-6">
                <div v-for="promo in filteredPromotions" :key="promo.id" class="bg-white rounded-xl p-5 border border-gray-200 hover:shadow-md transition-all">
                    <!-- Voucher Card -->
                    <template v-if="promo.type === 'voucher'">
                        <div class="flex justify-between items-start">
                            <div>
                                <span class="text-xs px-2 py-1 rounded-full" :class="getStatusClass(promo.active)">
                                    {{ getStatusLabel(promo.active) }}
                                </span>
                                <h3 class="font-bold text-xl text-gray-800 mt-2">{{ promo.code }}</h3>
                            </div>
                            <div class="flex gap-1">
                                <button @click="openEditModal(promo)" class="p-1.5 text-blue-600 hover:bg-blue-100 rounded-lg transition-colors text-sm">✏️</button>
                                <button @click="deletePromo(promo.id)" class="p-1.5 text-red-600 hover:bg-red-100 rounded-lg transition-colors text-sm">🗑️</button>
                            </div>
                        </div>
                        
                        <p class="text-sm text-gray-500 mb-3">{{ promo.desc }}</p>
                        
                        <div class="grid grid-cols-2 gap-2 text-sm">
                            <span class="flex items-center gap-1">
                                <span class="text-gray-500">🎯</span>
                                <span class="text-xs px-2 py-0.5 rounded-full" :class="getTargetTypeClass(promo.targetType)">
                                    {{ getTargetTypeLabel(promo.targetType) }}
                                </span>
                            </span>
                            <span class="flex items-center gap-1">
                                <span class="text-gray-500">💰</span>
                                <span class="text-orange-600 font-semibold">{{ promo.discount }}</span>
                            </span>
                            <span class="flex items-center gap-1">
                                <span class="text-gray-500">📅</span>
                                <span class="text-sm">HSD: {{ promo.expiry }}</span>
                            </span>
                            <span class="flex items-center gap-1">
                                <span class="text-gray-500">📊</span>
                                <span class="text-sm">{{ promo.used }}/{{ promo.limit }}</span>
                            </span>
                        </div>
                        
                        <div class="mt-3 pt-3 border-t border-gray-100">
                            <div class="w-full h-1.5 bg-gray-100 rounded-full overflow-hidden">
                                <div class="h-full bg-orange-500 rounded-full transition-all" :style="{ width: getUsedPercentage(promo.used, promo.limit) + '%' }"></div>
                            </div>
                        </div>
                        
                        <div class="mt-3 pt-2 flex justify-end">
                            <button @click="toggleStatus(promo)" :class="promo.active ? 'bg-green-100 text-green-700' : 'bg-gray-100 text-gray-500'" class="text-xs px-3 py-1 rounded-full transition-colors">
                                {{ promo.active ? '✅ Kích hoạt' : '⛔ Đã tắt' }}
                            </button>
                        </div>
                    </template>

                    <!-- Pre-order Tier Card -->
                    <template v-else-if="promo.type === 'preorder_tier'">
                        <div class="flex justify-between items-start">
                            <div>
                                <span class="text-xs px-2 py-1 rounded-full" :class="getStatusClass(promo.active)">
                                    {{ getStatusLabel(promo.active) }}
                                </span>
                                <h3 class="font-bold text-lg text-gray-800 mt-2">⏳ {{ promo.code || 'Pre-order' }}</h3>
                                <p class="text-xs text-gray-500">Sản phẩm: {{ getProductName(promo.product_id) }}</p>
                            </div>
                            <div class="flex gap-1">
                                <button @click="openEditModal(promo)" class="p-1.5 text-blue-600 hover:bg-blue-100 rounded-lg transition-colors text-sm">✏️</button>
                                <button @click="deletePromo(promo.id)" class="p-1.5 text-red-600 hover:bg-red-100 rounded-lg transition-colors text-sm">🗑️</button>
                            </div>
                        </div>
                        
                        <div class="mt-3 bg-gradient-to-r from-blue-50 to-purple-50 rounded-lg p-4">
                            <div class="flex justify-between items-center mb-2">
                                <span class="text-sm font-medium">Đã đặt trước: {{ promo.currentBuyers || 0 }} lượt</span>
                                <span class="text-sm font-bold text-blue-600">
                                    Giảm hiện tại: {{ getPreorderDiscount(promo) }}
                                </span>
                            </div>
                            
                            <div class="w-full h-2 bg-gray-200 rounded-full overflow-hidden">
                                <div class="h-full bg-gradient-to-r from-blue-500 to-purple-500 rounded-full transition-all" :style="{ width: getPreorderProgress(promo) + '%' }"></div>
                            </div>
                            
                            <div class="mt-3 grid grid-cols-3 gap-2 text-xs">
                                <div v-for="tier in promo.tiers" :key="tier.from" class="text-center p-2 bg-white rounded border" :class="promo.currentBuyers >= tier.from && promo.currentBuyers <= tier.to ? 'border-blue-500 bg-blue-50' : 'border-gray-200'">
                                    <div class="font-bold">{{ tier.discount }}%</div>
                                    <div class="text-gray-500">#{{ tier.from }}-{{ tier.to }}</div>
                                </div>
                            </div>
                        </div>
                        
                        <div class="mt-3 flex justify-between items-center text-xs text-gray-500">
                            <span>📅 {{ formatDate(promo.startDate) }} - {{ formatDate(promo.endDate) }}</span>
                            <span v-if="promo.minOrder > 0">💰 Đơn tối thiểu: {{ formatPrice(promo.minOrder) }}</span>
                        </div>
                        
                        <div class="mt-3 pt-2 flex justify-end">
                            <button @click="toggleStatus(promo)" :class="promo.active ? 'bg-green-100 text-green-700' : 'bg-gray-100 text-gray-500'" class="text-xs px-3 py-1 rounded-full transition-colors">
                                {{ promo.active ? '✅ Kích hoạt' : '⛔ Đã tắt' }}
                            </button>
                        </div>
                    </template>
                </div>
                
                <div v-if="filteredPromotions.length === 0" class="col-span-full text-center py-12 text-gray-500">
                    <span class="material-symbols-outlined text-5xl mb-2">local_offer</span>
                    <p>Không có khuyến mãi nào</p>
                    <button @click="openAddModal()" class="mt-3 text-orange-600 hover:underline">Thêm khuyến mãi đầu tiên</button>
                </div>
            </div>

            <!-- Danh sách chiến dịch -->
            <div v-if="selectedTab === 'campaigns'" class="grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-2 lg:grid-cols-2 gap-6">
                <div v-for="campaign in filteredCampaigns" :key="campaign.id" class="bg-white rounded-xl overflow-hidden border border-gray-200 hover:shadow-md transition-all">
                    <div class="relative h-48 bg-gray-200">
                        <img v-if="campaign.banner" :src="campaign.banner" :alt="campaign.name" class="w-full h-full object-cover">
                        <div v-else class="w-full h-full flex items-center justify-center text-gray-400">
                            <span class="material-symbols-outlined text-4xl">image</span>
                        </div>
                        <div class="absolute top-3 right-3 flex gap-1">
                            <span class="text-xs px-2 py-1 rounded-full font-medium" :class="getCampaignStatusClass(campaign.status)">
                                {{ getCampaignStatusLabel(campaign.status) }}
                            </span>
                            <span v-if="campaign.featured" class="text-xs px-2 py-1 rounded-full bg-yellow-100 text-yellow-700 font-medium">⭐ Nổi bật</span>
                        </div>
                    </div>
                    
                    <div class="p-4">
                        <div class="flex justify-between items-start">
                            <h3 class="font-bold text-lg text-gray-800">{{ campaign.name }}</h3>
                            <div class="flex gap-1">
                                <button @click="openCampaignModal(campaign)" class="p-1.5 text-blue-600 hover:bg-blue-100 rounded-lg transition-colors text-sm">✏️</button>
                                <button @click="deleteCampaign(campaign.id)" class="p-1.5 text-red-600 hover:bg-red-100 rounded-lg transition-colors text-sm">🗑️</button>
                            </div>
                        </div>
                        
                        <p class="text-sm text-gray-500 mt-1 line-clamp-2">{{ campaign.description }}</p>
                        
                        <div class="mt-3 grid grid-cols-2 gap-2 text-sm">
                            <span class="flex items-center gap-1">
                                <span class="text-gray-500">📅</span>
                                <span>{{ formatDate(campaign.startDate) }} - {{ formatDate(campaign.endDate) }}</span>
                            </span>
                            <span class="flex items-center gap-1">
                                <span class="text-gray-500">🏷️</span>
                                <span class="text-orange-600 font-semibold">{{ campaign.discount }}</span>
                            </span>
                            <span class="flex items-center gap-1">
                                <span class="text-gray-500">📦</span>
                                <span>{{ campaign.products?.length || 0 }} sản phẩm</span>
                            </span>
                            <span class="flex items-center gap-1">
                                <span class="text-gray-500">🔢</span>
                                <span>Priority {{ campaign.priority }}</span>
                            </span>
                        </div>
                        
                        <!-- Hiển thị Banner liên kết -->
                        <div v-if="getBannerByCampaign(campaign.id)" class="mt-2 text-xs text-gray-500">
                            🖼️ Banner: <a :href="getBannerByCampaign(campaign.id).link" target="_blank" class="text-blue-600 hover:underline">{{ getBannerByCampaign(campaign.id).image }}</a>
                        </div>
                        
                        <!-- Hiển thị News liên kết -->
                        <div v-if="getNewsByCampaign(campaign.id).length > 0" class="mt-1 text-xs text-gray-500">
                            📰 Tin tức: {{ getNewsByCampaign(campaign.id).map(n => n.title).join(', ') }}
                        </div>
                        
                        <!-- Hiển thị Promotions liên kết -->
                        <div v-if="getPromotionsByCampaign(campaign.id).length > 0" class="mt-1 text-xs text-gray-500">
                            🎫 Khuyến mãi: {{ getPromotionsByCampaign(campaign.id).map(p => p.code || p.name).join(', ') }}
                        </div>
                        
                        <div class="mt-3 pt-3 border-t border-gray-100 flex justify-end">
                            <button @click="toggleCampaignStatus(campaign)" class="text-xs px-3 py-1 rounded-full transition-colors" :class="campaign.status === 'active' ? 'bg-green-100 text-green-700' : 'bg-blue-100 text-blue-700'">
                                {{ campaign.status === 'active' ? '✅ Đang diễn ra' : '🔄 Kích hoạt' }}
                            </button>
                        </div>
                    </div>
                </div>
                
                <div v-if="filteredCampaigns.length === 0" class="col-span-full text-center py-12 text-gray-500">
                    <span class="material-symbols-outlined text-5xl mb-2">campaign</span>
                    <p>Không có chiến dịch nào</p>
                    <button @click="openCampaignModal()" class="mt-3 text-blue-600 hover:underline">Thêm chiến dịch đầu tiên</button>
                </div>
            </div>
        </div>

        <!-- Modal Thêm/Sửa khuyến mãi -->
        <div v-if="showModal" class="fixed inset-0 bg-black/50 flex items-center justify-center z-50 p-4" @click.self="closeModal">
            <div class="bg-white rounded-xl max-w-2xl w-full p-6 shadow-xl max-h-[90vh] overflow-y-auto">
                <div class="flex justify-between items-center mb-4">
                    <h3 class="text-xl font-bold text-gray-800">{{ modalMode === 'edit' ? 'Sửa khuyến mãi' : 'Thêm khuyến mãi' }}</h3>
                    <button @click="closeModal" class="text-gray-400 hover:text-gray-600 transition-colors text-xl">✕</button>
                </div>

                <!-- Chọn loại khuyến mãi -->
                <div class="mb-4">
                    <label class="text-sm block mb-1 text-gray-700 font-medium">Loại khuyến mãi</label>
                    <select v-model="form.type" class="w-full border border-gray-300 rounded-lg px-3 py-2 focus:outline-none focus:border-orange-500" @change="editingPromo = null">
                        <option value="voucher">🎫 Mã giảm giá</option>
                        <option value="preorder_tier">⏳ Pre-order theo lượt</option>
                    </select>
                </div>

                <!-- Form Voucher -->
                <template v-if="form.type === 'voucher'">
                    <div class="space-y-4">
                        <div>
                            <label class="text-sm block mb-1 text-gray-700 font-medium">Mã code *</label>
                            <input v-model="form.code" class="w-full border border-gray-300 rounded-lg px-3 py-2 uppercase focus:outline-none focus:border-orange-500" placeholder="NHAPMA">
                        </div>
                        
                        <div>
                            <label class="text-sm block mb-1 text-gray-700 font-medium">Áp dụng cho</label>
                            <select v-model="form.targetType" class="w-full border border-gray-300 rounded-lg px-3 py-2 focus:outline-none focus:border-orange-500">
                                <option value="retail">🛒 Bán lẻ</option>
                                <option value="wholesale">🏭 Bán sỉ</option>
                                <option value="preorder">⏳ Pre-order</option>
                                <option value="all">📦 Tất cả</option>
                            </select>
                        </div>
                        
                        <div>
                            <label class="text-sm block mb-1 text-gray-700 font-medium">Loại giảm giá</label>
                            <select v-model="form.discountType" class="w-full border border-gray-300 rounded-lg px-3 py-2 focus:outline-none focus:border-orange-500">
                                <option value="fixed">Giảm trực tiếp (₫)</option>
                                <option value="percent">Giảm theo %</option>
                                <option value="freeship">Miễn phí ship</option>
                            </select>
                        </div>
                        
                        <div v-if="form.discountType !== 'freeship'">
                            <label class="text-sm block mb-1 text-gray-700 font-medium">Giá trị giảm</label>
                            <input v-model="form.discount" class="w-full border border-gray-300 rounded-lg px-3 py-2 focus:outline-none focus:border-orange-500" :placeholder="form.discountType === 'percent' ? '10' : '50000'">
                            <p class="text-xs text-gray-500 mt-1">{{ form.discountType === 'percent' ? 'Nhập số phần trăm (VD: 10)' : 'Nhập số tiền (VD: 50000)' }}</p>
                        </div>
                        
                        <div>
                            <label class="text-sm block mb-1 text-gray-700 font-medium">Điều kiện (đơn tối thiểu)</label>
                            <input v-model="form.minOrder" type="number" class="w-full border border-gray-300 rounded-lg px-3 py-2 focus:outline-none focus:border-orange-500" placeholder="500000">
                        </div>
                        
                        <div>
                            <label class="text-sm block mb-1 text-gray-700 font-medium">Số lượng mã</label>
                            <input v-model="form.limit" type="number" class="w-full border border-gray-300 rounded-lg px-3 py-2 focus:outline-none focus:border-orange-500" placeholder="100">
                        </div>
                        
                        <div>
                            <label class="text-sm block mb-1 text-gray-700 font-medium">Ngày kết thúc</label>
                            <input v-model="form.expiry" type="date" class="w-full border border-gray-300 rounded-lg px-3 py-2 focus:outline-none focus:border-orange-500">
                        </div>

                        <div>
                            <label class="text-sm block mb-1 text-gray-700 font-medium">Liên kết chiến dịch</label>
                            <select v-model="form.campaign_id" class="w-full border border-gray-300 rounded-lg px-3 py-2 focus:outline-none focus:border-orange-500">
                                <option :value="null">-- Không liên kết --</option>
                                <option v-for="camp in campaigns" :key="camp.id" :value="camp.id">{{ camp.name }}</option>
                            </select>
                        </div>

                        <div>
                            <label class="text-sm block mb-1 text-gray-700 font-medium">Liên kết tin tức</label>
                            <select v-model="form.news_ids" multiple class="w-full border border-gray-300 rounded-lg px-3 py-2 focus:outline-none focus:border-orange-500 min-h-[80px]">
                                <option v-for="item in news" :key="item.id" :value="item.id">{{ item.title }}</option>
                            </select>
                            <p class="text-xs text-gray-500 mt-1">Giữ Ctrl/Cmd để chọn nhiều</p>
                        </div>
                        
                        <label class="flex items-center gap-2 cursor-pointer">
                            <input type="checkbox" v-model="form.active" class="w-4 h-4 text-orange-600 rounded">
                            <span class="text-sm text-gray-700">Kích hoạt ngay</span>
                        </label>
                    </div>
                </template>

                <!-- Form Pre-order Tier -->
                <template v-if="form.type === 'preorder_tier'">
                    <div class="space-y-4">
                        <div>
                            <label class="text-sm block mb-1 text-gray-700 font-medium">Tên chương trình *</label>
                            <input v-model="preorderForm.name" class="w-full border border-gray-300 rounded-lg px-3 py-2 focus:outline-none focus:border-orange-500" placeholder="Pre-order Sale 2025">
                        </div>

                        <div>
                            <label class="text-sm block mb-1 text-gray-700 font-medium">Sản phẩm áp dụng *</label>
                            <select v-model="preorderForm.product_id" class="w-full border border-gray-300 rounded-lg px-3 py-2 focus:outline-none focus:border-orange-500">
                                <option :value="null">-- Chọn sản phẩm --</option>
                                <option v-for="product in products" :key="product.id" :value="product.id">{{ product.name }}</option>
                            </select>
                            <p class="text-xs text-gray-500 mt-1">Mỗi sản phẩm có số lượt đặt trước riêng</p>
                        </div>

                        <div>
                            <label class="text-sm block mb-1 text-gray-700 font-medium">Đơn hàng tối thiểu</label>
                            <input v-model="preorderForm.minOrder" type="number" class="w-full border border-gray-300 rounded-lg px-3 py-2 focus:outline-none focus:border-orange-500" placeholder="0">
                        </div>

                        <div class="grid grid-cols-2 gap-4">
                            <div>
                                <label class="text-sm block mb-1 text-gray-700 font-medium">Ngày bắt đầu</label>
                                <input v-model="preorderForm.startDate" type="date" class="w-full border border-gray-300 rounded-lg px-3 py-2 focus:outline-none focus:border-orange-500">
                            </div>
                            <div>
                                <label class="text-sm block mb-1 text-gray-700 font-medium">Ngày kết thúc</label>
                                <input v-model="preorderForm.endDate" type="date" class="w-full border border-gray-300 rounded-lg px-3 py-2 focus:outline-none focus:border-orange-500">
                            </div>
                        </div>

                        <div>
                            <div class="flex justify-between items-center mb-2">
                                <label class="text-sm font-medium text-gray-700">Các mức giảm giá theo lượt</label>
                                <button @click="addTier" type="button" class="text-sm text-blue-600 hover:text-blue-700 font-medium">+ Thêm mức</button>
                            </div>
                            
                            <div class="space-y-2">
                                <div v-for="(tier, index) in preorderForm.tiers" :key="index" class="flex items-center gap-2 bg-gray-50 p-3 rounded-lg">
                                    <div class="flex-1 grid grid-cols-3 gap-2">
                                        <div>
                                            <label class="text-xs text-gray-500">Từ</label>
                                            <input v-model="tier.from" type="number" class="w-full border border-gray-300 rounded px-2 py-1 text-sm" min="1">
                                        </div>
                                        <div>
                                            <label class="text-xs text-gray-500">Đến</label>
                                            <input v-model="tier.to" type="number" class="w-full border border-gray-300 rounded px-2 py-1 text-sm" min="1">
                                        </div>
                                        <div>
                                            <label class="text-xs text-gray-500">Giảm %</label>
                                            <input v-model="tier.discount" type="number" class="w-full border border-gray-300 rounded px-2 py-1 text-sm" min="0" max="100">
                                        </div>
                                    </div>
                                    <button @click="removeTier(index)" type="button" class="text-red-500 hover:text-red-700 text-sm p-1" :disabled="preorderForm.tiers.length <= 1">✕</button>
                                </div>
                            </div>
                        </div>

                        <div>
                            <label class="text-sm block mb-1 text-gray-700 font-medium">Liên kết chiến dịch</label>
                            <select v-model="preorderForm.campaign_id" class="w-full border border-gray-300 rounded-lg px-3 py-2 focus:outline-none focus:border-orange-500">
                                <option :value="null">-- Không liên kết --</option>
                                <option v-for="camp in campaigns" :key="camp.id" :value="camp.id">{{ camp.name }}</option>
                            </select>
                        </div>

                        <div>
                            <label class="text-sm block mb-1 text-gray-700 font-medium">Liên kết tin tức</label>
                            <select v-model="preorderForm.news_ids" multiple class="w-full border border-gray-300 rounded-lg px-3 py-2 focus:outline-none focus:border-orange-500 min-h-[80px]">
                                <option v-for="item in news" :key="item.id" :value="item.id">{{ item.title }}</option>
                            </select>
                            <p class="text-xs text-gray-500 mt-1">Giữ Ctrl/Cmd để chọn nhiều</p>
                        </div>
                        
                        <label class="flex items-center gap-2 cursor-pointer">
                            <input type="checkbox" v-model="preorderForm.active" class="w-4 h-4 text-orange-600 rounded">
                            <span class="text-sm text-gray-700">Kích hoạt ngay</span>
                        </label>
                    </div>
                </template>

                <!-- Error message -->
                <div v-if="errorMessage" class="mt-4 p-3 bg-red-50 border border-red-200 rounded-lg">
                    <p class="text-sm text-red-600">{{ errorMessage }}</p>
                </div>
                
                <div class="flex justify-end gap-3 mt-6">
                    <button @click="closeModal" class="px-4 py-2 border border-gray-300 rounded-lg text-gray-600 hover:bg-gray-50 transition-colors">Hủy</button>
                    <button @click="savePromo" class="px-4 py-2 bg-orange-600 text-white rounded-lg hover:bg-orange-700 transition-colors" :disabled="isSubmitting">
                        {{ isSubmitting ? 'Đang lưu...' : 'Lưu' }}
                    </button>
                </div>
            </div>
        </div>

        <!-- Modal Campaign -->
        <div v-if="showCampaignModal" class="fixed inset-0 bg-black/50 flex items-center justify-center z-50 p-4" @click.self="closeModal">
            <div class="bg-white rounded-xl max-w-2xl w-full p-6 shadow-xl max-h-[90vh] overflow-y-auto">
                <div class="flex justify-between items-center mb-4">
                    <h3 class="text-xl font-bold text-gray-800">{{ editingCampaign ? 'Sửa chiến dịch' : 'Thêm chiến dịch mới' }}</h3>
                    <button @click="closeModal" class="text-gray-400 hover:text-gray-600 transition-colors text-xl">✕</button>
                </div>
                
                <div class="space-y-4">
                    <div>
                        <label class="text-sm block mb-1 text-gray-700 font-medium">Tên chiến dịch *</label>
                        <input v-model="campaignForm.name" class="w-full border border-gray-300 rounded-lg px-3 py-2 focus:outline-none focus:border-blue-500" placeholder="Tên chiến dịch">
                    </div>

                    <div>
                        <label class="text-sm block mb-1 text-gray-700 font-medium">Loại chiến dịch</label>
                        <select v-model="campaignForm.type" class="w-full border border-gray-300 rounded-lg px-3 py-2 focus:outline-none focus:border-blue-500">
                            <option value="seasonal">Theo mùa</option>
                            <option value="flash_sale">Flash Sale</option>
                            <option value="anniversary">Kỷ niệm</option>
                            <option value="holiday">Ngày lễ</option>
                            <option value="product_launch">Ra mắt sản phẩm</option>
                            <option value="other">Khác</option>
                        </select>
                    </div>

                    <div>
                        <label class="text-sm block mb-1 text-gray-700 font-medium">Mô tả</label>
                        <textarea v-model="campaignForm.description" class="w-full border border-gray-300 rounded-lg px-3 py-2 focus:outline-none focus:border-blue-500" rows="3" placeholder="Mô tả chiến dịch"></textarea>
                    </div>

                    <div class="grid grid-cols-2 gap-4">
                        <div>
                            <label class="text-sm block mb-1 text-gray-700 font-medium">Ngày bắt đầu</label>
                            <input v-model="campaignForm.startDate" type="date" class="w-full border border-gray-300 rounded-lg px-3 py-2 focus:outline-none focus:border-blue-500">
                        </div>
                        <div>
                            <label class="text-sm block mb-1 text-gray-700 font-medium">Ngày kết thúc</label>
                            <input v-model="campaignForm.endDate" type="date" class="w-full border border-gray-300 rounded-lg px-3 py-2 focus:outline-none focus:border-blue-500">
                        </div>
                    </div>

                    <div>
                        <label class="text-sm block mb-1 text-gray-700 font-medium">Trạng thái</label>
                        <select v-model="campaignForm.status" class="w-full border border-gray-300 rounded-lg px-3 py-2 focus:outline-none focus:border-blue-500">
                            <option value="scheduled">Sắp diễn ra</option>
                            <option value="active">Đang diễn ra</option>
                            <option value="ended">Đã kết thúc</option>
                        </select>
                    </div>

                    <div>
                        <label class="text-sm block mb-1 text-gray-700 font-medium">Banner (URL ảnh)</label>
                        <input v-model="campaignForm.banner" class="w-full border border-gray-300 rounded-lg px-3 py-2 focus:outline-none focus:border-blue-500" placeholder="/images/campaigns/banner.jpg">
                        <p class="text-xs text-gray-500 mt-1">Đường dẫn ảnh banner</p>
                    </div>

                    <div>
                        <label class="text-sm block mb-1 text-gray-700 font-medium">Danh sách sản phẩm (ID)</label>
                        <input v-model="campaignForm.products" class="w-full border border-gray-300 rounded-lg px-3 py-2 focus:outline-none focus:border-blue-500" placeholder="101, 102, 103">
                        <p class="text-xs text-gray-500 mt-1">Nhập ID sản phẩm cách nhau bằng dấu phẩy</p>
                    </div>

                    <div>
                        <label class="text-sm block mb-1 text-gray-700 font-medium">Mức giảm giá</label>
                        <input v-model="campaignForm.discount" class="w-full border border-gray-300 rounded-lg px-3 py-2 focus:outline-none focus:border-blue-500" placeholder="20%">
                    </div>

                    <div>
                        <label class="text-sm block mb-1 text-gray-700 font-medium">Liên kết khuyến mãi</label>
                        <select v-model="campaignForm.promotion_ids" multiple class="w-full border border-gray-300 rounded-lg px-3 py-2 focus:outline-none focus:border-blue-500 min-h-[80px]">
                            <option v-for="promo in promotions" :key="promo.id" :value="promo.id">{{ promo.code || promo.name }}</option>
                        </select>
                        <p class="text-xs text-gray-500 mt-1">Giữ Ctrl/Cmd để chọn nhiều</p>
                    </div>

                    <div>
                        <label class="text-sm block mb-1 text-gray-700 font-medium">Liên kết tin tức</label>
                        <select v-model="campaignForm.news_ids" multiple class="w-full border border-gray-300 rounded-lg px-3 py-2 focus:outline-none focus:border-blue-500 min-h-[80px]">
                            <option v-for="item in news" :key="item.id" :value="item.id">{{ item.title }}</option>
                        </select>
                        <p class="text-xs text-gray-500 mt-1">Giữ Ctrl/Cmd để chọn nhiều</p>
                    </div>

                    <div class="grid grid-cols-2 gap-4">
                        <div>
                            <label class="text-sm block mb-1 text-gray-700 font-medium">Độ ưu tiên</label>
                            <input v-model="campaignForm.priority" type="number" class="w-full border border-gray-300 rounded-lg px-3 py-2 focus:outline-none focus:border-blue-500" min="1">
                            <p class="text-xs text-gray-500 mt-1">Số càng nhỏ càng ưu tiên</p>
                        </div>
                        <div class="flex items-center pt-6">
                            <label class="flex items-center gap-2 cursor-pointer">
                                <input type="checkbox" v-model="campaignForm.featured" class="w-4 h-4 text-blue-600 rounded">
                                <span class="text-sm text-gray-700">⭐ Nổi bật</span>
                            </label>
                        </div>
                    </div>
                </div>
                
                <div class="flex justify-end gap-3 mt-6">
                    <button @click="closeModal" class="px-4 py-2 border border-gray-300 rounded-lg text-gray-600 hover:bg-gray-50 transition-colors">Hủy</button>
                    <button @click="saveCampaign" class="px-4 py-2 bg-blue-600 text-white rounded-lg hover:bg-blue-700 transition-colors" :disabled="isSubmitting">
                        {{ isSubmitting ? 'Đang lưu...' : 'Lưu' }}
                    </button>
                </div>
            </div>
        </div>
    </AdminLayout>
</template>

<style scoped>
.line-clamp-2 {
    display: -webkit-box;
    -webkit-line-clamp: 2;
    -webkit-box-orient: vertical;
    overflow: hidden;
}
</style>
```

## 4. Cập nhật routes cho Promotions

Thêm vào file `web.php` trong phần Admin:

```php
// Promotions Management
Route::prefix('promotions')->group(function () {
    Route::get('/', [PromotionController::class, 'index'])->name('promotions.index');
});
```

Và thêm import ở đầu file:

```php
use App\Http\Controllers\Admin\PromotionController;
```

## Tóm tắt các thay đổi:

1. **PromotionController**: Truyền dữ liệu từ các module Banner, News, Products vào view
2. **Promotions.vue**: Nhận dữ liệu từ props và hiển thị liên kết
3. **Routes**: Thêm route cho Promotions
4. **Liên kết dữ liệu**:
   - `getBannerByCampaign()`: Lấy banner theo campaign_id
   - `getNewsByCampaign()`: Lấy news theo campaign_id
   - `getPromotionsByCampaign()`: Lấy promotions theo campaign_id

## Assistant:
07/07/2026 02:18

Tôi thấy có 2 vấn đề chính:

1. **Lỗi 403 Forbidden** khi truy cập ảnh trong `storage/banners/`
2. **Lỗi 404 Not Found** cho route `campaigns`

Hãy fix từng vấn đề:

## 1. Fix lỗi 403 Forbidden cho ảnh trong storage

### Tạo symbolic link cho storage:

```bash
php artisan storage:link
```

### Cập nhật filesystem configuration (config/filesystems.php):

```php
'disks' => [
    // ...
    'public' => [
        'driver' => 'local',
        'root' => storage_path('app/public'),
        'url' => env('APP_URL').'/storage',
        'visibility' => 'public',
    ],
    // ...
],
```

### Tạo middleware để serve file storage (nếu cần):

```php
// app/Http/Middleware/StorageAccess.php
<?php

namespace App\Http\Middleware;

use Closure;
use Illuminate\Http\Request;
use Illuminate\Support\Facades\Storage;

class StorageAccess
{
    public function handle(Request $request, Closure $next)
    {
        $path = $request->path();
        
        // Cho phép truy cập storage
        if (str_starts_with($path, 'storage/')) {
            return $next($request);
        }
        
        return $next($request);
    }
}
```

### Hoặc thêm route để serve ảnh:

```php
// routes/web.php
Route::get('/storage/{path}', function ($path) {
    $fullPath = storage_path('app/public/' . $path);
    
    if (!file_exists($fullPath)) {
        abort(404);
    }
    
    return response()->file($fullPath);
})->where('path', '.*');
```

## 2. Fix lỗi 404 Not Found cho campaigns

Cập nhật file `routes/web.php` - thêm routes cho Campaigns:

```php
<?php

use App\Http\Controllers\Admin\DashboardController;
use App\Http\Controllers\Admin\OrderController as AdminOrderController;
use App\Http\Controllers\Admin\ProductController as AdminProductController;
use App\Http\Controllers\Admin\CustomerController as AdminCustomerController;

use Illuminate\Support\Facades\File;
use Inertia\Inertia;

// ==================== ROUTE ĐỂ PHỤC VỤ ẢNH ====================
Route::get('/image/{filename}', function ($filename) {
    $path = base_path('image/' . $filename);
    if (!File::exists($path)) {
        abort(404);
    }

    $file = File::get($path);
    $type = File::mimeType($path);

    return response($file, 200)->header('Content-Type', $type);
})->where('filename', '.*');

// ==================== WEB ROUTES (Frontend - Public) ====================

Route::get('/', [HomeController::class, 'index'])->name('home');

Route::get('/tim-kiem', function (Request $request) {

})->name('search');

// Product routes - PUBLIC

Route::get('/danh-muc/{slug}', [WebCategoryController::class, 'show'])->name('category');

})->name('cart')->middleware('auth');

});
```

## 3. Tạo CampaignController

```php
<?php

namespace App\Http\Controllers\Admin;

use App\Http\Controllers\Controller;
use App\Models\Campaign;
use Illuminate\Http\Request;
use Inertia\Inertia;
use Illuminate\Support\Facades\Log;

class CampaignController extends Controller
{
    public function index()
    {
        return Inertia::render('Admin/Campaigns', [
            'campaigns' => Campaign::with(['banners', 'promotions', 'news'])->get()
        ]);
    }

    public function getCampaigns()
    {
        return response()->json(Campaign::with(['banners', 'promotions', 'news'])->get());
    }

    public function store(Request $request)
    {
        try {
            $validated = $request->validate([
                'name' => 'required|string|max:255',
                'type' => 'nullable|string|max:50',
                'description' => 'nullable|string',
                'startDate' => 'nullable|date',
                'endDate' => 'nullable|date|after:startDate',
                'status' => 'nullable|in:scheduled,active,ended',
                'banner' => 'nullable|string|max:255',
                'products' => 'nullable|array',
                'discount' => 'nullable|string|max:50',
                'priority' => 'nullable|integer|min:0',
                'featured' => 'boolean',
                'news_ids' => 'nullable|array',
                'promotion_ids' => 'nullable|array'
            ]);

            // Xử lý products nếu là string
            if (isset($validated['products']) && is_string($validated['products'])) {
                $validated['products'] = explode(',', $validated['products']);
                $validated['products'] = array_map('trim', $validated['products']);
                $validated['products'] = array_filter($validated['products']);
            }

            $campaign = Campaign::create([
                'name' => $validated['name'],
                'type' => $validated['type'] ?? 'other',
                'description' => $validated['description'] ?? '',
                'start_date' => $validated['startDate'] ?? null,
                'end_date' => $validated['endDate'] ?? null,
                'status' => $validated['status'] ?? 'scheduled',
                'banner' => $validated['banner'] ?? '',
                'products' => $validated['products'] ?? [],
                'discount' => $validated['discount'] ?? '',
                'priority' => $validated['priority'] ?? 0,
                'featured' => $validated['featured'] ?? false,
                'news_ids' => $validated['news_ids'] ?? [],
                'promotion_ids' => $validated['promotion_ids'] ?? []
            ]);

            return response()->json([
                'success' => true,
                'message' => 'Thêm chiến dịch thành công!',
                'data' => $campaign
            ]);
        } catch (\Exception $e) {
            Log::error('Lỗi tạo chiến dịch: ' . $e->getMessage());
            return response()->json([
                'success' => false,
                'message' => 'Có lỗi xảy ra: ' . $e->getMessage()
            ], 500);
        }
    }

    public function update(Request $request, $id)
    {
        try {
            $campaign = Campaign::findOrFail($id);
            
            $validated = $request->validate([
                'name' => 'required|string|max:255',
                'type' => 'nullable|string|max:50',
                'description' => 'nullable|string',
                'startDate' => 'nullable|date',
                'endDate' => 'nullable|date|after:startDate',
                'status' => 'nullable|in:scheduled,active,ended',
                'banner' => 'nullable|string|max:255',
                'products' => 'nullable|array',
                'discount' => 'nullable|string|max:50',
                'priority' => 'nullable|integer|min:0',
                'featured' => 'boolean',
                'news_ids' => 'nullable|array',
                'promotion_ids' => 'nullable|array'
            ]);

            // Xử lý products nếu là string
            if (isset($validated['products']) && is_string($validated['products'])) {
                $validated['products'] = explode(',', $validated['products']);
                $validated['products'] = array_map('trim', $validated['products']);
                $validated['products'] = array_filter($validated['products']);
            }

            $campaign->update([
                'name' => $validated['name'],
                'type' => $validated['type'] ?? 'other',
                'description' => $validated['description'] ?? '',
                'start_date' => $validated['startDate'] ?? null,
                'end_date' => $validated['endDate'] ?? null,
                'status' => $validated['status'] ?? 'scheduled',
                'banner' => $validated['banner'] ?? '',
                'products' => $validated['products'] ?? [],
                'discount' => $validated['discount'] ?? '',
                'priority' => $validated['priority'] ?? 0,
                'featured' => $validated['featured'] ?? false,
                'news_ids' => $validated['news_ids'] ?? [],
                'promotion_ids' => $validated['promotion_ids'] ?? []
            ]);

            return response()->json([
                'success' => true,
                'message' => 'Cập nhật chiến dịch thành công!',
                'data' => $campaign
            ]);
        } catch (\Exception $e) {
            Log::error('Lỗi cập nhật chiến dịch: ' . $e->getMessage());
            return response()->json([
                'success' => false,
                'message' => 'Có lỗi xảy ra: ' . $e->getMessage()
            ], 500);
        }
    }

    public function destroy($id)
    {
        try {
            $campaign = Campaign::findOrFail($id);
            $campaign->delete();
            
            return response()->json([
                'success' => true,
                'message' => 'Xóa chiến dịch thành công!'
            ]);
        } catch (\Exception $e) {
            Log::error('Lỗi xóa chiến dịch: ' . $e->getMessage());
            return response()->json([
                'success' => false,
                'message' => 'Có lỗi xảy ra: ' . $e->getMessage()
            ], 500);
        }
    }

    public function updateStatus(Request $request, $id)
    {
        try {
            $campaign = Campaign::findOrFail($id);
            $request->validate([
                'status' => 'required|in:scheduled,active,ended'
            ]);
            
            $campaign->update(['status' => $request->status]);
            
            return response()->json([
                'success' => true,
                'message' => 'Cập nhật trạng thái thành công!'
            ]);
        } catch (\Exception $e) {
            return response()->json([
                'success' => false,
                'message' => $e->getMessage()
            ], 500);
        }
    }
}
```

## 4. Fix lỗi component Link

Trong file `Reports.vue` (hoặc file đang báo lỗi), thay `<Link>` bằng `<a>` hoặc import component Link từ Inertia:

```vue
<script setup>
import { Link } from '@inertiajs/vue3';
// hoặc
import { router } from '@inertiajs/vue3';
</script>

<template>
    <!-- Nếu dùng Link -->
    <Link href="/admin/dashboard">Dashboard</Link>
    
    <!-- Hoặc dùng a -->
    <a href="/admin/dashboard">Dashboard</a>
</template>
```

## 5. Chạy các lệnh sau:

```bash
# Tạo symbolic link cho storage
php artisan storage:link

# Clear cache
php artisan cache:clear
php artisan config:clear
php artisan route:clear
php artisan view:clear

# Tạo model Campaign (nếu chưa có)
php artisan make:model Campaign -m
```

## 6. Migration cho Campaign (nếu chưa có):

```php
<?php

use Illuminate\Database\Migrations\Migration;
use Illuminate\Database\Schema\Blueprint;
use Illuminate\Support\Facades\Schema;

return new class extends Migration
{
    public function up()
    {
        Schema::create('campaigns', function (Blueprint $table) {
            $table->id();
            $table->string('name');
            $table->string('type')->default('other');
            $table->text('description')->nullable();
            $table->date('start_date')->nullable();
            $table->date('end_date')->nullable();
            $table->enum('status', ['scheduled', 'active', 'ended'])->default('scheduled');
            $table->string('banner')->nullable();
            $table->json('products')->nullable();
            $table->string('discount')->nullable();
            $table->integer('priority')->default(0);
            $table->boolean('featured')->default(false);
            $table->json('news_ids')->nullable();
            $table->json('promotion_ids')->nullable();
            $table->timestamps();
        });
    }

    public function down()
    {
        Schema::dropIfExists('campaigns');
    }
};
```

Sau đó chạy migration:

```bash
php artisan migrate
```

Sau khi thực hiện các bước trên, các lỗi sẽ được fix.
