                        <select v-model="campaignForm.promotion_ids" multiple class="w-full border border-gray-300 rounded-lg px-3 py-2 focus:outline-none focus:border-blue-500 min-h-[80px]">
                            <option v-for="promo in promotions" :key="promo.id" :value="promo.id">{{ promo.code || promo.name }}</option>
                        </select>
                        <p class="text-xs text-gray-500 mt-1">Giữ Ctrl/Cmd để chọn nhiều</p>
                    </div>

                    <div>
                        <label class="text-sm block mb-1 text-gray-700 font-medium">Liên kết tin tức</label>
                        <select v-model="campaignForm.news_ids" multiple class="w-full border border-gray-300 rounded-lg px-3 py-2 focus:outline-none focus:border-blue-500 min-h-[80px]">
                            <option v-for="item in news" :key="item.id" :value="item.id">{{ item.title }}</option>
                        </select>
                        <p class="text-xs text-gray-500 mt-1">Giữ Ctrl/Cmd để chọn nhiều</p>
                    </div>

                    <div class="grid grid-cols-2 gap-4">
                        <div>
                            <label class="text-sm block mb-1 text-gray-700 font-medium">Độ ưu tiên</label>
                            <input v-model="campaignForm.priority" type="number" class="w-full border border-gray-300 rounded-lg px-3 py-2 focus:outline-none focus:border-blue-500" min="1">
                            <p class="text-xs text-gray-500 mt-1">Số càng nhỏ càng ưu tiên</p>
                        </div>
                        <div class="flex items-center pt-6">
                            <label class="flex items-center gap-2 cursor-pointer">
                                <input type="checkbox" v-model="campaignForm.featured" class="w-4 h-4 text-blue-600 rounded">
                                <span class="text-sm text-gray-700">⭐ Nổi bật</span>
                            </label>
                        </div>
                    </div>
                </div>
                
                <div class="flex justify-end gap-3 mt-6">
                    <button @click="closeModal" class="px-4 py-2 border border-gray-300 rounded-lg text-gray-600 hover:bg-gray-50 transition-colors">Hủy</button>
                    <button @click="saveCampaign" class="px-4 py-2 bg-blue-600 text-white rounded-lg hover:bg-blue-700 transition-colors" :disabled="isSubmitting">
                        {{ isSubmitting ? 'Đang lưu...' : 'Lưu' }}
                    </button>
                </div>
            </div>
        </div>
    </AdminLayout>
</template>

<style scoped>
.line-clamp-2 {
    display: -webkit-box;
    -webkit-line-clamp: 2;
    -webkit-box-orient: vertical;
    overflow: hidden;
}
</style>


## Assistant:
07/07/2026 02:23

Dựa trên cấu trúc bạn đã cung cấp, tôi thấy bạn có:

1. **Campaign Model** với `start_time`, `end_time`, và relation với `CampaignConfig`
2. **CampaignConfig Model** với `quantity`, `discount_percent`
3. **CampaignProduct** là Pivot table cho product_variant

Bây giờ tôi sẽ chỉnh lại toàn bộ để phù hợp với cấu trúc hiện tại của bạn:

## 1. Cập nhật Models

### Campaign.php (giữ nguyên và thêm các field cần thiết)

```php
<?php

namespace App\Models;

use Illuminate\Database\Eloquent\Factories\HasFactory;
use Illuminate\Database\Eloquent\Model;

class Campaign extends Model
{
    use HasFactory;

    protected $fillable = [
        'start_time', 
        'end_time',
        'name',
        'type',
        'description',
        'status',
        'banner',
        'priority',
        'featured'
    ];

    protected $casts = [
        'start_time' => 'datetime',
        'end_time' => 'datetime',
        'featured' => 'boolean',
    ];

    public function productVariants()
    {
        return $this->belongsToMany(ProductVariant::class, 'campaign_products');
    }

    public function configs()
    {
        return $this->hasMany(CampaignConfig::class);
    }

    public function orders()
    {
        return $this->hasMany(Order::class);
    }

    public function banners()
    {
        return $this->hasMany(Banner::class);
    }

    public function getNameAttribute()
    {
        if ($this->start_time && $this->end_time) {
            $start = $this->start_time->format('d/m/Y');
            $end = $this->end_time->format('d/m/Y');
            return "Chiến dịch {$start} - {$end}";
        }
        return 'Chiến dịch';
    }

    // Thêm các accessor để tương thích với frontend
    public function getStartDateAttribute()
    {
        return $this->start_time ? $this->start_time->format('Y-m-d') : null;
    }

    public function getEndDateAttribute()
    {
        return $this->end_time ? $this->end_time->format('Y-m-d') : null;
    }

    public function getDiscountAttribute()
    {
        $config = $this->configs()->first();
        return $config ? $config->discount_percent . '%' : '0%';
    }

    public function getProductsAttribute()
    {
        return $this->productVariants->pluck('id')->toArray();
    }
}
```

### CampaignConfig.php (giữ nguyên)

```php
<?php

namespace App\Models;

use Illuminate\Database\Eloquent\Factories\HasFactory;
use Illuminate\Database\Eloquent\Model;

class CampaignConfig extends Model
{
    use HasFactory;

    protected $fillable = ['campaign_id', 'quantity', 'discount_percent'];

    protected $casts = [
        'discount_percent' => 'decimal:2',
    ];

    public function campaign()
    {
        return $this->belongsTo(Campaign::class);
    }
}
```

### CampaignProduct.php (giữ nguyên)

```php
<?php

namespace App\Models;

use Illuminate\Database\Eloquent\Factories\HasFactory;
use Illuminate\Database\Eloquent\Relations\Pivot;

class CampaignProduct extends Pivot
{
    use HasFactory;

    protected $table = 'campaign_products';
    public $incrementing = true;

    protected $fillable = ['product_variant_id', 'campaign_id'];
}
```

## 2. Cập nhật PromotionController

```php
<?php

namespace App\Http\Controllers\Admin;

use App\Http\Controllers\Controller;
use App\Models\Banner;
use App\Models\Campaign;
use App\Models\CampaignConfig;
use App\Models\News;
use App\Models\Product;
use App\Models\ProductVariant;
use App\Models\Category;
use App\Models\Brand;
use App\Models\Color;
use Illuminate\Http\Request;
use Inertia\Inertia;
use Illuminate\Support\Facades\Log;

class PromotionController extends Controller
{
    public function index()
    {
        // Lấy campaigns với relations
        $campaigns = Campaign::with(['banners', 'configs', 'productVariants'])->get();
        
        // Format campaigns cho frontend
        $formattedCampaigns = $campaigns->map(function ($campaign) {
            return [
                'id' => $campaign->id,
                'name' => $campaign->name,
                'type' => $campaign->type ?? 'seasonal',
                'description' => $campaign->description ?? '',
                'startDate' => $campaign->start_date,
                'endDate' => $campaign->end_date,
                'status' => $campaign->status ?? 'scheduled',
                'banner' => $campaign->banner ?? '',
                'products' => $campaign->productVariants->pluck('id')->toArray(),
                'discount' => $campaign->discount,
                'priority' => $campaign->priority ?? 0,
                'featured' => $campaign->featured ?? false,
                'configs' => $campaign->configs,
                'banners' => $campaign->banners,
            ];
        });

        // Lấy các dữ liệu khác
        $banners = Banner::with('campaign')->orderBy('order', 'asc')->get();
        $news = News::with(['productVariant', 'author'])->get();
        $products = Product::with(['category', 'brand', 'variants.color'])->latest()->get();
        $productVariants = ProductVariant::with(['product', 'color'])->get();
        $categories = Category::orderBy('name')->get(['id', 'name']);
        $brands = Brand::orderBy('name')->get(['id', 'name']);
        $colors = Color::orderBy('name')->get(['id', 'name', 'code']);

        return Inertia::render('Admin/Promotions', [
            'initialPromotions' => [], // Chưa có bảng promotions
            'initialCampaigns' => $formattedCampaigns,
            'banners' => $banners,
            'news' => $news,
            'products' => $products,
            'productVariants' => $productVariants,
            'categories' => $categories,
            'brands' => $brands,
            'colors' => $colors,
        ]);
    }

    public function storeCampaign(Request $request)
    {
        try {
            $validated = $request->validate([
                'name' => 'nullable|string|max:255',
                'type' => 'nullable|string|max:50',
                'description' => 'nullable|string',
                'startDate' => 'nullable|date',
                'endDate' => 'nullable|date|after:startDate',
                'status' => 'nullable|in:scheduled,active,ended',
                'banner' => 'nullable|string|max:255',
                'products' => 'nullable|array',
                'discount' => 'nullable|string|max:50',
                'priority' => 'nullable|integer|min:0',
                'featured' => 'boolean',
                'quantity' => 'nullable|integer|min:0',
                'discount_percent' => 'nullable|numeric|min:0|max:100',
            ]);

            // Tạo campaign
            $campaign = Campaign::create([
                'start_time' => $validated['startDate'] ?? null,
                'end_time' => $validated['endDate'] ?? null,
                'type' => $validated['type'] ?? 'seasonal',
                'description' => $validated['description'] ?? '',
                'status' => $validated['status'] ?? 'scheduled',
                'banner' => $validated['banner'] ?? '',
                'priority' => $validated['priority'] ?? 0,
                'featured' => $validated['featured'] ?? false,
            ]);

            // Tạo campaign config
            if (isset($validated['quantity']) || isset($validated['discount_percent'])) {
                CampaignConfig::create([
                    'campaign_id' => $campaign->id,
                    'quantity' => $validated['quantity'] ?? 0,
                    'discount_percent' => $validated['discount_percent'] ?? 0,
                ]);
            }

            // Gắn sản phẩm
            if (!empty($validated['products'])) {
                $campaign->productVariants()->attach($validated['products']);
            }

            return response()->json([
                'success' => true,
                'message' => 'Thêm chiến dịch thành công!',
                'data' => $campaign->load(['banners', 'configs', 'productVariants'])
            ]);

        } catch (\Exception $e) {
            Log::error('Lỗi tạo chiến dịch: ' . $e->getMessage());
            return response()->json([
                'success' => false,
                'message' => 'Có lỗi xảy ra: ' . $e->getMessage()
            ], 500);
        }
    }

    public function updateCampaign(Request $request, $id)
    {
        try {
            $campaign = Campaign::findOrFail($id);

            $validated = $request->validate([
                'name' => 'nullable|string|max:255',
                'type' => 'nullable|string|max:50',
                'description' => 'nullable|string',
                'startDate' => 'nullable|date',
                'endDate' => 'nullable|date|after:startDate',
                'status' => 'nullable|in:scheduled,active,ended',
                'banner' => 'nullable|string|max:255',
                'products' => 'nullable|array',
                'discount' => 'nullable|string|max:50',
                'priority' => 'nullable|integer|min:0',
                'featured' => 'boolean',
                'quantity' => 'nullable|integer|min:0',
                'discount_percent' => 'nullable|numeric|min:0|max:100',
            ]);

            // Cập nhật campaign
            $campaign->update([
                'start_time' => $validated['startDate'] ?? $campaign->start_time,
                'end_time' => $validated['endDate'] ?? $campaign->end_time,
                'type' => $validated['type'] ?? $campaign->type,
                'description' => $validated['description'] ?? $campaign->description,
                'status' => $validated['status'] ?? $campaign->status,
                'banner' => $validated['banner'] ?? $campaign->banner,
                'priority' => $validated['priority'] ?? $campaign->priority,
                'featured' => $validated['featured'] ?? $campaign->featured,
            ]);

            // Cập nhật hoặc tạo campaign config
            if (isset($validated['quantity']) || isset($validated['discount_percent'])) {
                $config = $campaign->configs()->first();
                if ($config) {
                    $config->update([
                        'quantity' => $validated['quantity'] ?? $config->quantity,
                        'discount_percent' => $validated['discount_percent'] ?? $config->discount_percent,
                    ]);
                } else {
                    CampaignConfig::create([
                        'campaign_id' => $campaign->id,
                        'quantity' => $validated['quantity'] ?? 0,
                        'discount_percent' => $validated['discount_percent'] ?? 0,
                    ]);
                }
            }

            // Cập nhật sản phẩm
            if (isset($validated['products'])) {
                $campaign->productVariants()->sync($validated['products']);
            }

            return response()->json([
                'success' => true,
                'message' => 'Cập nhật chiến dịch thành công!',
                'data' => $campaign->load(['banners', 'configs', 'productVariants'])
            ]);

        } catch (\Exception $e) {
            Log::error('Lỗi cập nhật chiến dịch: ' . $e->getMessage());
            return response()->json([
                'success' => false,
                'message' => 'Có lỗi xảy ra: ' . $e->getMessage()
            ], 500);
        }
    }

    public function destroyCampaign($id)
    {
        try {
            $campaign = Campaign::findOrFail($id);
            
            // Xóa configs
            $campaign->configs()->delete();
            
            // Detach products
            $campaign->productVariants()->detach();
            
            // Xóa campaign
            $campaign->delete();

            return response()->json([
                'success' => true,
                'message' => 'Xóa chiến dịch thành công!'
            ]);

        } catch (\Exception $e) {
            Log::error('Lỗi xóa chiến dịch: ' . $e->getMessage());
            return response()->json([
                'success' => false,
                'message' => 'Có lỗi xảy ra: ' . $e->getMessage()
            ], 500);
        }
    }

    public function updateCampaignStatus(Request $request, $id)
    {
        try {
            $campaign = Campaign::findOrFail($id);
            $request->validate([
                'status' => 'required|in:scheduled,active,ended'
            ]);
            
            $campaign->update(['status' => $request->status]);
            
            return response()->json([
                'success' => true,
                'message' => 'Cập nhật trạng thái thành công!'
            ]);

        } catch (\Exception $e) {
            return response()->json([
                'success' => false,
                'message' => $e->getMessage()
            ], 500);
        }
    }

    // Lấy danh sách product variants
    public function getProductVariants()
    {
        return response()->json(
            ProductVariant::with(['product', 'color'])->get()
        );
    }
}
```

## 3. Cập nhật Routes

```php
// routes/web.php - Thêm vào phần Admin

use App\Http\Controllers\Admin\PromotionController;

// Promotions Management
Route::prefix('promotions')->group(function () {
    Route::get('/', [PromotionController::class, 'index'])->name('promotions.index');
    Route::post('/campaign', [PromotionController::class, 'storeCampaign'])->name('promotions.campaign.store');
    Route::put('/campaign/{id}', [PromotionController::class, 'updateCampaign'])->name('promotions.campaign.update');
    Route::delete('/campaign/{id}', [PromotionController::class, 'destroyCampaign'])->name('promotions.campaign.destroy');
    Route::put('/campaign/{id}/status', [PromotionController::class, 'updateCampaignStatus'])->name('promotions.campaign.update-status');
    Route::get('/product-variants', [PromotionController::class, 'getProductVariants'])->name('promotions.product-variants');
});
```

## 4. Cập nhật Promotions.vue (phần campaign)

```vue
<script setup>
import { ref, computed } from 'vue';
import AdminLayout from '@/Layouts/AdminLayout.vue';
import { Head, router } from '@inertiajs/vue3';

// Props
const props = defineProps({
    initialPromotions: { type: Array, default: () => [] },
    initialCampaigns: { type: Array, default: () => [] },
    banners: { type: Array, default: () => [] },
    news: { type: Array, default: () => [] },
    products: { type: Array, default: () => [] },
    productVariants: { type: Array, default: () => [] },
    categories: { type: Array, default: () => [] },
    brands: { type: Array, default: () => [] },
    colors: { type: Array, default: () => [] }
});

// State
const promotions = ref(props.initialPromotions || []);
const campaigns = ref(props.initialCampaigns || []);
const banners = ref(props.banners || []);
const news = ref(props.news || []);
const products = ref(props.products || []);
const productVariants = ref(props.productVariants || []);

// Modal state
const showCampaignModal = ref(false);
const editingCampaign = ref(null);
const isSubmitting = ref(false);
const errorMessage = ref('');

// Form data cho campaign (phù hợp với cấu trúc hiện tại)
const campaignForm = ref({
    id: null,
    name: '',
    type: 'seasonal',
    description: '',
    startDate: '',
    endDate: '',
    status: 'scheduled',
    banner: '',
    products: [],
    discount: '',
    priority: 0,
    featured: false,
    quantity: 0,
    discount_percent: 0
});

// Filter state
const searchQuery = ref('');
const activeCampaignTab = ref('all');

// Campaign status
const campaignStatuses = [
    { value: 'all', label: 'Tất cả' },
    { value: 'active', label: 'Đang diễn ra' },
    { value: 'ended', label: 'Đã kết thúc' },
    { value: 'scheduled', label: 'Sắp diễn ra' }
];

// Computed: filtered campaigns
const filteredCampaigns = computed(() => {
    let filtered = campaigns.value;
    
    if (activeCampaignTab.value !== 'all') {
        filtered = filtered.filter(c => c.status === activeCampaignTab.value);
    }
    
    if (searchQuery.value) {
        const query = searchQuery.value.toLowerCase();
        filtered = filtered.filter(c => 
            c.name?.toLowerCase().includes(query) ||
            c.description?.toLowerCase().includes(query)
        );
    }
    
    return filtered;
});

// Helper functions
const getCampaignStatusClass = (status) => {
    const classes = {
        active: 'bg-green-100 text-green-700',
        ended: 'bg-gray-100 text-gray-600',
        scheduled: 'bg-blue-100 text-blue-700'
    };
    return classes[status] || 'bg-gray-100 text-gray-600';
};

const getCampaignStatusLabel = (status) => {
    const labels = {
        active: 'Đang diễn ra',
        ended: 'Đã kết thúc',
        scheduled: 'Sắp diễn ra'
    };
    return labels[status] || status;
};

const formatDate = (date) => {
    if (!date) return '';
    const d = new Date(date);
    return d.toLocaleDateString('vi-VN', { day: '2-digit', month: '2-digit', year: 'numeric' });
};

const formatPrice = (value) => {
    if (!value) return '0₫';
    return value.toLocaleString('vi-VN') + '₫';
};

const getProductName = (productId) => {
    if (!productId) return 'Tất cả sản phẩm';
    const variant = productVariants.value.find(p => p.id === productId);
    if (variant) {
        return variant.product?.name || 'Sản phẩm không tồn tại';
    }
    return 'Sản phẩm không tồn tại';
};

// Lấy banner theo campaign_id
const getBannerByCampaign = (campaignId) => {
    if (!campaignId) return null;
    return banners.value.find(b => b.campaign_id === campaignId);
};

// Campaign functions
const openCampaignModal = (campaign = null) => {
    editingCampaign.value = campaign;
    
    if (campaign) {
        campaignForm.value = {
            id: campaign.id,
            name: campaign.name || '',
            type: campaign.type || 'seasonal',
            description: campaign.description || '',
            startDate: campaign.startDate || '',
            endDate: campaign.endDate || '',
            status: campaign.status || 'scheduled',
            banner: campaign.banner || '',
            products: campaign.products || [],
            discount: campaign.discount || '',
            priority: campaign.priority || 0,
            featured: campaign.featured || false,
            quantity: campaign.configs?.[0]?.quantity || 0,
            discount_percent: campaign.configs?.[0]?.discount_percent || 0
        };
    } else {
        campaignForm.value = {
            id: null,
            name: '',
            type: 'seasonal',
            description: '',
            startDate: '',
            endDate: '',
            status: 'scheduled',
            banner: '',
            products: [],
            discount: '',
            priority: 0,
            featured: false,
            quantity: 0,
            discount_percent: 0
        };
    }
    showCampaignModal.value = true;
};

const saveCampaign = async () => {
    isSubmitting.value = true;
    errorMessage.value = '';
    
    try {
        const data = {
            ...campaignForm.value,
            products: Array.isArray(campaignForm.value.products) 
                ? campaignForm.value.products 
                : campaignForm.value.products.split(',').map(p => parseInt(p.trim())).filter(p => !isNaN(p))
        };
        
        // Xử lý products để lấy product_variant ids
        if (data.products && data.products.length > 0) {
            // Nếu là array các product ids, cần chuyển thành variant ids
            // Hoặc có thể lưu trực tiếp
        }
        
        if (editingCampaign.value) {
            await router.put(`/admin/promotions/campaign/${editingCampaign.value.id}`, data);
            alert('Cập nhật chiến dịch thành công!');
        } else {
            await router.post('/admin/promotions/campaign', data);
            alert('Thêm chiến dịch thành công!');
        }
        
        showCampaignModal.value = false;
        // Reload data
        router.reload({ only: ['initialCampaigns'] });
        
    } catch (error) {
        console.error('Lỗi:', error);
        errorMessage.value = error.response?.data?.message || 'Có lỗi xảy ra';
    } finally {
        isSubmitting.value = false;
    }
};

const deleteCampaign = async (id) => {
    if (!confirm('Bạn có chắc chắn muốn xóa chiến dịch này?')) return;
    
    try {
        await router.delete(`/admin/promotions/campaign/${id}`);
        campaigns.value = campaigns.value.filter(c => c.id !== id);
        alert('Xóa chiến dịch thành công!');
    } catch (error) {
        console.error('Lỗi:', error);
        alert('Có lỗi xảy ra khi xóa');
    }
};

const toggleCampaignStatus = async (campaign) => {
    const newStatus = campaign.status === 'active' ? 'ended' : 'active';
    try {
        await router.put(`/admin/promotions/campaign/${campaign.id}/status`, { status: newStatus });
        campaign.status = newStatus;
        alert(`Chiến dịch đã chuyển sang trạng thái: ${getCampaignStatusLabel(newStatus)}`);
    } catch (error) {
        console.error('Lỗi:', error);
        alert('Có lỗi xảy ra');
    }
};

const closeModal = () => {
    showCampaignModal.value = false;
    editingCampaign.value = null;
    errorMessage.value = '';
    isSubmitting.value = false;
};

// Xử lý chọn sản phẩm
const toggleProductSelection = (productId) => {
    const index = campaignForm.value.products.indexOf(productId);
    if (index > -1) {
        campaignForm.value.products.splice(index, 1);
    } else {
        campaignForm.value.products.push(productId);
    }
};

// Kiểm tra sản phẩm đã chọn
const isProductSelected = (productId) => {
    return campaignForm.value.products.includes(productId);
};
</script>

<template>
    <Head title="Quản lý khuyến mãi - BigBag Admin" />
    
    <AdminLayout>
        <div class="p-4 md:p-8">
            <!-- Header -->
            <div class="flex flex-col sm:flex-row justify-between items-start sm:items-center gap-4 mb-6">
                <div>
                    <h1 class="text-2xl md:text-3xl font-bold text-gray-800">Khuyến mãi & Chiến dịch</h1>
                    <p class="text-sm text-gray-500 mt-1">Quản lý mã giảm giá, pre-order và chiến dịch</p>
                </div>
                <div class="flex gap-2 flex-wrap">
                    <button @click="openCampaignModal()" class="bg-blue-600 text-white px-4 py-2 rounded-xl flex items-center gap-2 hover:bg-blue-700 transition-colors text-sm">
                        <span class="material-symbols-outlined text-lg">add</span>
                        Thêm chiến dịch
                    </button>
                </div>
            </div>

            <!-- Search Bar -->
            <div class="mb-6">
                <div class="relative max-w-md">
                    <span class="material-symbols-outlined absolute left-3 top-1/2 -translate-y-1/2 text-gray-400 text-lg">search</span>
                    <input 
                        v-model="searchQuery" 
                        type="text" 
                        placeholder="Tìm kiếm chiến dịch..." 
                        class="pl-10 pr-4 py-2.5 bg-white border border-gray-300 rounded-full w-full focus:outline-none focus:border-blue-500 focus:ring-2 focus:ring-blue-500/20 text-sm"
                    >
                </div>
            </div>

            <!-- Tab campaign status -->
            <div class="flex gap-2 mb-6 border-b border-gray-200">
                <button 
                    v-for="status in campaignStatuses" 
                    :key="status.value" 
                    @click="activeCampaignTab = status.value" 
                    class="px-4 py-2 text-sm font-medium transition-all"
                    :class="activeCampaignTab === status.value ? 'text-blue-600 border-b-2 border-blue-600' : 'text-gray-500 hover:text-gray-700'"
                >
                    {{ status.label }}
                </button>
            </div>

            <!-- Danh sách chiến dịch -->
            <div class="grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-2 lg:grid-cols-2 gap-6">
                <div v-for="campaign in filteredCampaigns" :key="campaign.id" class="bg-white rounded-xl overflow-hidden border border-gray-200 hover:shadow-md transition-all">
                    <div class="relative h-48 bg-gray-200">
                        <img v-if="campaign.banner" :src="campaign.banner" :alt="campaign.name" class="w-full h-full object-cover">
                        <div v-else class="w-full h-full flex items-center justify-center text-gray-400">
                            <span class="material-symbols-outlined text-4xl">image</span>
                        </div>
                        <div class="absolute top-3 right-3 flex gap-1">
                            <span class="text-xs px-2 py-1 rounded-full font-medium" :class="getCampaignStatusClass(campaign.status)">
                                {{ getCampaignStatusLabel(campaign.status) }}
                            </span>
                            <span v-if="campaign.featured" class="text-xs px-2 py-1 rounded-full bg-yellow-100 text-yellow-700 font-medium">⭐ Nổi bật</span>
                        </div>
                    </div>
                    
                    <div class="p-4">
                        <div class="flex justify-between items-start">
                            <div>
                                <h3 class="font-bold text-lg text-gray-800">{{ campaign.name }}</h3>
                                <p class="text-xs text-gray-500 mt-1">Loại: {{ campaign.type || 'Seasonal' }}</p>
                            </div>
                            <div class="flex gap-1">
                                <button @click="openCampaignModal(campaign)" class="p-1.5 text-blue-600 hover:bg-blue-100 rounded-lg transition-colors text-sm">✏️</button>
                                <button @click="deleteCampaign(campaign.id)" class="p-1.5 text-red-600 hover:bg-red-100 rounded-lg transition-colors text-sm">🗑️</button>
                            </div>
                        </div>
                        
                        <p class="text-sm text-gray-500 mt-1 line-clamp-2">{{ campaign.description }}</p>
                        
                        <div class="mt-3 grid grid-cols-2 gap-2 text-sm">
                            <span class="flex items-center gap-1">
                                <span class="text-gray-500">📅</span>
                                <span>{{ formatDate(campaign.startDate) }} - {{ formatDate(campaign.endDate) }}</span>
                            </span>
                            <span class="flex items-center gap-1">
                                <span class="text-gray-500">🏷️</span>
                                <span class="text-blue-600 font-semibold">{{ campaign.discount || '0%' }}</span>
                            </span>
                            <span class="flex items-center gap-1">
                                <span class="text-gray-500">📦</span>
                                <span>{{ campaign.products?.length || 0 }} sản phẩm</span>
                            </span>
                            <span class="flex items-center gap-1">
                                <span class="text-gray-500">🔢</span>
                                <span>Priority {{ campaign.priority }}</span>
                            </span>
                        </div>
                        
                        <!-- Hiển thị chi tiết config -->
                        <div v-if="campaign.configs && campaign.configs.length > 0" class="mt-2 text-xs text-gray-500">
                            ⚙️ Giảm {{ campaign.configs[0].discount_percent }}% cho đơn hàng ≥ {{ campaign.configs[0].quantity }} sản phẩm
                        </div>
                        
                        <!-- Hiển thị Banner liên kết -->
                        <div v-if="getBannerByCampaign(campaign.id)" class="mt-1 text-xs text-gray-500">
                            🖼️ Banner: <a :href="getBannerByCampaign(campaign.id).link" target="_blank" class="text-blue-600 hover:underline">{{ getBannerByCampaign(campaign.id).image }}</a>
                        </div>
                        
                        <div class="mt-3 pt-3 border-t border-gray-100 flex justify-end">
                            <button @click="toggleCampaignStatus(campaign)" class="text-xs px-3 py-1 rounded-full transition-colors" :class="campaign.status === 'active' ? 'bg-green-100 text-green-700' : 'bg-blue-100 text-blue-700'">
                                {{ campaign.status === 'active' ? '✅ Đang diễn ra' : '🔄 Kích hoạt' }}
                            </button>
                        </div>
                    </div>
                </div>
                
                <div v-if="filteredCampaigns.length === 0" class="col-span-full text-center py-12 text-gray-500">
                    <span class="material-symbols-outlined text-5xl mb-2">campaign</span>
                    <p>Không có chiến dịch nào</p>
                    <button @click="openCampaignModal()" class="mt-3 text-blue-600 hover:underline">Thêm chiến dịch đầu tiên</button>
                </div>
            </div>
        </div>

        <!-- Modal Campaign -->
        <div v-if="showCampaignModal" class="fixed inset-0 bg-black/50 flex items-center justify-center z-50 p-4" @click.self="closeModal">
            <div class="bg-white rounded-xl max-w-2xl w-full p-6 shadow-xl max-h-[90vh] overflow-y-auto">
                <div class="flex justify-between items-center mb-4">
                    <h3 class="text-xl font-bold text-gray-800">{{ editingCampaign ? 'Sửa chiến dịch' : 'Thêm chiến dịch mới' }}</h3>
                    <button @click="closeModal" class="text-gray-400 hover:text-gray-600 transition-colors text-xl">✕</button>
                </div>
                
                <div class="space-y-4">
                    <div>
                        <label class="text-sm block mb-1 text-gray-700 font-medium">Tên chiến dịch</label>
                        <input v-model="campaignForm.name" class="w-full border border-gray-300 rounded-lg px-3 py-2 focus:outline-none focus:border-blue-500" placeholder="Tên chiến dịch">
                    </div>

                    <div>
                        <label class="text-sm block mb-1 text-gray-700 font-medium">Loại chiến dịch</label>
                        <select v-model="campaignForm.type" class="w-full border border-gray-300 rounded-lg px-3 py-2 focus:outline-none focus:border-blue-500">
                            <option value="seasonal">Theo mùa</option>
                            <option value="flash_sale">Flash Sale</option>
                            <option value="anniversary">Kỷ niệm</option>
                            <option value="holiday">Ngày lễ</option>
                            <option value="product_launch">Ra mắt sản phẩm</option>
                            <option value="other">Khác</option>
                        </select>
                    </div>

                    <div>
                        <label class="text-sm block mb-1 text-gray-700 font-medium">Mô tả</label>
                        <textarea v-model="campaignForm.description" class="w-full border border-gray-300 rounded-lg px-3 py-2 focus:outline-none focus:border-blue-500" rows="3" placeholder="Mô tả chiến dịch"></textarea>
                    </div>

                    <div class="grid grid-cols-2 gap-4">
                        <div>
                            <label class="text-sm block mb-1 text-gray-700 font-medium">Ngày bắt đầu</label>
                            <input v-model="campaignForm.startDate" type="date" class="w-full border border-gray-300 rounded-lg px-3 py-2 focus:outline-none focus:border-blue-500">
                        </div>
                        <div>
                            <label class="text-sm block mb-1 text-gray-700 font-medium">Ngày kết thúc</label>
                            <input v-model="campaignForm.endDate" type="date" class="w-full border border-gray-300 rounded-lg px-3 py-2 focus:outline-none focus:border-blue-500">
                        </div>
                    </div>

                    <div>
                        <label class="text-sm block mb-1 text-gray-700 font-medium">Trạng thái</label>
                        <select v-model="campaignForm.status" class="w-full border border-gray-300 rounded-lg px-3 py-2 focus:outline-none focus:border-blue-500">
                            <option value="scheduled">Sắp diễn ra</option>
                            <option value="active">Đang diễn ra</option>
                            <option value="ended">Đã kết thúc</option>
                        </select>
                    </div>

                    <div>
                        <label class="text-sm block mb-1 text-gray-700 font-medium">Banner (URL ảnh)</label>
                        <input v-model="campaignForm.banner" class="w-full border border-gray-300 rounded-lg px-3 py-2 focus:outline-none focus:border-blue-500" placeholder="/images/campaigns/banner.jpg">
                        <p class="text-xs text-gray-500 mt-1">Đường dẫn ảnh banner</p>
                    </div>

                    <!-- Cấu hình giảm giá -->
                    <div class="grid grid-cols-2 gap-4">
                        <div>
                            <label class="text-sm block mb-1 text-gray-700 font-medium">Số lượng tối thiểu</label>
                            <input v-model="campaignForm.quantity" type="number" class="w-full border border-gray-300 rounded-lg px-3 py-2 focus:outline-none focus:border-blue-500" min="0" placeholder="0">
                            <p class="text-xs text-gray-500 mt-1">Số sản phẩm tối thiểu để áp dụng</p>
                        </div>
                        <div>
                            <label class="text-sm block mb-1 text-gray-700 font-medium">Giảm giá (%)</label>
                            <input v-model="campaignForm.discount_percent" type="number" class="w-full border border-gray-300 rounded-lg px-3 py-2 focus:outline-none focus:border-blue-500" min="0" max="100" placeholder="0">
                            <p class="text-xs text-gray-500 mt-1">Phần trăm giảm giá</p>
                        </div>
                    </div>

                    <div>
                        <label class="text-sm block mb-1 text-gray-700 font-medium">Danh sách sản phẩm áp dụng</label>
                        <div class="border border-gray-300 rounded-lg p-2 max-h-48 overflow-y-auto">
                            <div v-for="variant in productVariants" :key="variant.id" class="flex items-center gap-2 py-1 hover:bg-gray-50 px-2 rounded">
                                <input 
                                    type="checkbox" 
                                    :id="'variant-' + variant.id" 
                                    :value="variant.id"
                                    :checked="isProductSelected(variant.id)"
                                    @change="toggleProductSelection(variant.id)"
                                    class="w-4 h-4 text-blue-600 rounded"
                                >
                                <label :for="'variant-' + variant.id" class="text-sm cursor-pointer">
                                    {{ variant.product?.name || 'Sản phẩm' }} 
                                    <span class="text-gray-400 text-xs">({{ variant.color?.name || 'Không màu' }})</span>
                                    <span class="text-gray-400 text-xs">- {{ formatPrice(variant.price) }}</span>
                                </label>
                            </div>
                        </div>
                        <p class="text-xs text-gray-500 mt-1">Chọn các biến thể sản phẩm áp dụng chiến dịch</p>
                    </div>

                    <div class="grid grid-cols-2 gap-4">
                        <div>
                            <label class="text-sm block mb-1 text-gray-700 font-medium">Độ ưu tiên</label>
                            <input v-model="campaignForm.priority" type="number" class="w-full border border-gray-300 rounded-lg px-3 py-2 focus:outline-none focus:border-blue-500" min="0">
                            <p class="text-xs text-gray-500 mt-1">Số càng nhỏ càng ưu tiên</p>
                        </div>
                        <div class="flex items-center pt-6">
                            <label class="flex items-center gap-2 cursor-pointer">
                                <input type="checkbox" v-model="campaignForm.featured" class="w-4 h-4 text-blue-600 rounded">
                                <span class="text-sm text-gray-700">⭐ Nổi bật</span>
                            </label>
                        </div>
                    </div>

                    <div v-if="errorMessage" class="p-3 bg-red-50 border border-red-200 rounded-lg">
                        <p class="text-sm text-red-600">{{ errorMessage }}</p>
                    </div>
                </div>
                
                <div class="flex justify-end gap-3 mt-6">
                    <button @click="closeModal" class="px-4 py-2 border border-gray-300 rounded-lg text-gray-600 hover:bg-gray-50 transition-colors">Hủy</button>
                    <button @click="saveCampaign" class="px-4 py-2 bg-blue-600 text-white rounded-lg hover:bg-blue-700 transition-colors" :disabled="isSubmitting">
                        {{ isSubmitting ? 'Đang lưu...' : 'Lưu' }}
                    </button>
                </div>
            </div>
        </div>
    </AdminLayout>
</template>

<style scoped>
.line-clamp-2 {
    display: -webkit-box;
    -webkit-line-clamp: 2;
    -webkit-box-orient: vertical;
    overflow: hidden;
}
</style>
```

## 5. Tóm tắt các thay đổi

1. **Model Campaign**: Thêm các accessor để tương thích với frontend
2. **PromotionController**: 
   - Format dữ liệu campaign cho frontend
   - Xử lý lưu campaign với config và product variants
3. **Routes**: Thêm các route CRUD cho campaign
4. **Promotions.vue**: 
   - Cập nhật form phù hợp với cấu trúc Campaign + CampaignConfig
   - Thêm chọn product variants
   - Hiển thị thông tin config trong card campaign
