## Assistant:
07/07/2026 02:40

Tôi thấy bạn đã có sidebar với menu "Khuyến mãi". Bây giờ tôi sẽ cập nhật lại toàn bộ để chỉ quản lý **Chiến dịch** (Campaign) và sửa lại route cho đúng.

## 1. Cập nhật Routes (web.php)

```php
// routes/web.php - Phần Admin

use App\Http\Controllers\Admin\PromotionController;

// Promotions (Campaigns)
Route::prefix('promotions')->group(function () {
    Route::get('/', [PromotionController::class, 'index'])->name('promotions.index');
    Route::post('/', [PromotionController::class, 'store'])->name('promotions.store');
    Route::put('/{id}', [PromotionController::class, 'update'])->name('promotions.update');
    Route::delete('/{id}', [PromotionController::class, 'destroy'])->name('promotions.destroy');
    Route::put('/{id}/status', [PromotionController::class, 'updateStatus'])->name('promotions.update-status');
});
```

## 2. PromotionController (hoàn chỉnh)

```php
<?php

namespace App\Http\Controllers\Admin;

use App\Http\Controllers\Controller;
use App\Models\Banner;
use App\Models\Campaign;
use App\Models\CampaignConfig;
use App\Models\ProductVariant;
use Illuminate\Http\Request;
use Inertia\Inertia;
use Illuminate\Support\Facades\Log;

class PromotionController extends Controller
{
    public function index()
    {
        // Lấy tất cả campaigns với relations
        $campaigns = Campaign::with(['banners', 'configs', 'productVariants', 'productVariants.product', 'productVariants.color'])
            ->latest()
            ->get();

        // Format dữ liệu cho frontend
        $formattedCampaigns = $campaigns->map(function ($campaign) {
            $config = $campaign->configs->first();
            
            return [
                'id' => $campaign->id,
                'name' => $campaign->name,
                'type' => $campaign->type ?? 'seasonal',
                'description' => $campaign->description ?? '',
                'startDate' => $campaign->start_date,
                'endDate' => $campaign->end_date,
                'status' => $campaign->status ?? 'scheduled',
                'banner' => $campaign->banner ?? '',
                'priority' => $campaign->priority ?? 0,
                'featured' => $campaign->featured ?? false,
                'quantity' => $config ? (int) $config->quantity : 0,
                'discount' => $config ? (float) $config->discount_percent . '%' : '0%',
                'discountPercent' => $config ? (float) $config->discount_percent : 0,
                'products' => $campaign->productVariants->pluck('id')->toArray(),
                'productVariants' => $campaign->productVariants->map(function ($variant) {
                    return [
                        'id' => $variant->id,
                        'name' => $variant->product->name ?? 'Sản phẩm',
                        'color' => $variant->color->name ?? 'Không màu',
                        'price' => $variant->price ?? 0,
                    ];
                }),
                'banners' => $campaign->banners,
            ];
        });

        // Lấy dữ liệu cho select
        $banners = Banner::with('campaign')->orderBy('order', 'asc')->get();
        $productVariants = ProductVariant::with(['product', 'color'])->latest()->get();

        return Inertia::render('Admin/Promotions', [
            'campaigns' => $formattedCampaigns,
            'banners' => $banners,
            'productVariants' => $productVariants,
        ]);
    }

    public function store(Request $request)
    {
        try {
            $validated = $request->validate([
                'name' => 'nullable|string|max:255',
                'type' => 'nullable|string|max:50',
                'description' => 'nullable|string',
                'startDate' => 'nullable|date',
                'endDate' => 'nullable|date|after:startDate',
                'status' => 'nullable|in:scheduled,active,ended',
                'banner' => 'nullable|string|max:255',
                'priority' => 'nullable|integer|min:0',
                'featured' => 'boolean',
                'quantity' => 'nullable|integer|min:0',
                'discountPercent' => 'nullable|numeric|min:0|max:100',
                'products' => 'nullable|array',
            ]);

            // Tạo campaign
            $campaign = Campaign::create([
                'name' => $validated['name'] ?? null,
                'type' => $validated['type'] ?? 'seasonal',
                'description' => $validated['description'] ?? '',
                'start_time' => $validated['startDate'] ?? null,
                'end_time' => $validated['endDate'] ?? null,
                'status' => $validated['status'] ?? 'scheduled',
                'banner' => $validated['banner'] ?? '',
                'priority' => $validated['priority'] ?? 0,
                'featured' => $validated['featured'] ?? false,
            ]);

            // Tạo campaign config
            if (isset($validated['quantity']) || isset($validated['discountPercent'])) {
                CampaignConfig::create([
                    'campaign_id' => $campaign->id,
                    'quantity' => $validated['quantity'] ?? 0,
                    'discount_percent' => $validated['discountPercent'] ?? 0,
                ]);
            }

            // Gắn sản phẩm
            if (!empty($validated['products'])) {
                $campaign->productVariants()->attach($validated['products']);
            }

            return response()->json([
                'success' => true,
                'message' => 'Thêm chiến dịch thành công!',
                'data' => $campaign->load(['banners', 'configs', 'productVariants'])
            ]);

        } catch (\Exception $e) {
            Log::error('Lỗi tạo chiến dịch: ' . $e->getMessage());
            return response()->json([
                'success' => false,
                'message' => 'Có lỗi xảy ra: ' . $e->getMessage()
            ], 500);
        }
    }

    public function update(Request $request, $id)
    {
        try {
            $campaign = Campaign::findOrFail($id);

            $validated = $request->validate([
                'name' => 'nullable|string|max:255',
                'type' => 'nullable|string|max:50',
                'description' => 'nullable|string',
                'startDate' => 'nullable|date',
                'endDate' => 'nullable|date|after:startDate',
                'status' => 'nullable|in:scheduled,active,ended',
                'banner' => 'nullable|string|max:255',
                'priority' => 'nullable|integer|min:0',
                'featured' => 'boolean',
                'quantity' => 'nullable|integer|min:0',
                'discountPercent' => 'nullable|numeric|min:0|max:100',
                'products' => 'nullable|array',
            ]);

            // Cập nhật campaign
            $campaign->update([
                'name' => $validated['name'] ?? $campaign->name,
                'type' => $validated['type'] ?? $campaign->type,
                'description' => $validated['description'] ?? $campaign->description,
                'start_time' => $validated['startDate'] ?? $campaign->start_time,
                'end_time' => $validated['endDate'] ?? $campaign->end_time,
                'status' => $validated['status'] ?? $campaign->status,
                'banner' => $validated['banner'] ?? $campaign->banner,
                'priority' => $validated['priority'] ?? $campaign->priority,
                'featured' => $validated['featured'] ?? $campaign->featured,
            ]);

            // Cập nhật config
            if (isset($validated['quantity']) || isset($validated['discountPercent'])) {
                $config = $campaign->configs()->first();
                if ($config) {
                    $config->update([
                        'quantity' => $validated['quantity'] ?? $config->quantity,
                        'discount_percent' => $validated['discountPercent'] ?? $config->discount_percent,
                    ]);
                } else {
                    CampaignConfig::create([
                        'campaign_id' => $campaign->id,
                        'quantity' => $validated['quantity'] ?? 0,
                        'discount_percent' => $validated['discountPercent'] ?? 0,
                    ]);
                }
            }

            // Cập nhật sản phẩm
            if (isset($validated['products'])) {
                $campaign->productVariants()->sync($validated['products']);
            }

            return response()->json([
                'success' => true,
                'message' => 'Cập nhật chiến dịch thành công!',
                'data' => $campaign->load(['banners', 'configs', 'productVariants'])
            ]);

        } catch (\Exception $e) {
            Log::error('Lỗi cập nhật chiến dịch: ' . $e->getMessage());
            return response()->json([
                'success' => false,
                'message' => 'Có lỗi xảy ra: ' . $e->getMessage()
            ], 500);
        }
    }

    public function destroy($id)
    {
        try {
            $campaign = Campaign::findOrFail($id);
            
            // Xóa configs
            $campaign->configs()->delete();
            
            // Detach products
            $campaign->productVariants()->detach();
            
            // Xóa campaign
            $campaign->delete();

            return response()->json([
                'success' => true,
                'message' => 'Xóa chiến dịch thành công!'
            ]);

        } catch (\Exception $e) {
            Log::error('Lỗi xóa chiến dịch: ' . $e->getMessage());
            return response()->json([
                'success' => false,
                'message' => 'Có lỗi xảy ra: ' . $e->getMessage()
            ], 500);
        }
    }

    public function updateStatus(Request $request, $id)
    {
        try {
            $campaign = Campaign::findOrFail($id);
            $request->validate([
                'status' => 'required|in:scheduled,active,ended'
            ]);
            
            $campaign->update(['status' => $request->status]);
            
            return response()->json([
                'success' => true,
                'message' => 'Cập nhật trạng thái thành công!'
            ]);

        } catch (\Exception $e) {
            return response()->json([
                'success' => false,
                'message' => $e->getMessage()
            ], 500);
        }
    }
}
```

## 3. Promotions.vue (hoàn chỉnh - chỉ quản lý chiến dịch)

```vue
<script setup>
import { ref, computed } from 'vue';
import AdminLayout from '@/Layouts/AdminLayout.vue';
import { Head, router } from '@inertiajs/vue3';

// Props
const props = defineProps({
    campaigns: {
        type: Array,
        default: () => []
    },
    banners: {
        type: Array,
        default: () => []
    },
    productVariants: {
        type: Array,
        default: () => []
    }
});

// State
const campaigns = ref(props.campaigns || []);
const banners = ref(props.banners || []);
const productVariants = ref(props.productVariants || []);

// Search & Filter
const searchQuery = ref('');
const activeStatusTab = ref('all');

// Modal
const showModal = ref(false);
const editingCampaign = ref(null);
const isSubmitting = ref(false);
const errorMessage = ref('');

// Status options
const statusOptions = [
    { value: 'all', label: 'Tất cả' },
    { value: 'active', label: 'Đang diễn ra' },
    { value: 'ended', label: 'Đã kết thúc' },
    { value: 'scheduled', label: 'Sắp diễn ra' }
];

// Form
const form = ref({
    id: null,
    name: '',
    type: 'seasonal',
    description: '',
    startDate: '',
    endDate: '',
    status: 'scheduled',
    banner: '',
    priority: 0,
    featured: false,
    quantity: 0,
    discountPercent: 0,
    products: []
});

// Computed
const filteredCampaigns = computed(() => {
    let filtered = campaigns.value;
    
    if (activeStatusTab.value !== 'all') {
        filtered = filtered.filter(c => c.status === activeStatusTab.value);
    }
    
    if (searchQuery.value) {
        const query = searchQuery.value.toLowerCase();
        filtered = filtered.filter(c => 
            (c.name && c.name.toLowerCase().includes(query)) ||
            (c.description && c.description.toLowerCase().includes(query))
        );
    }
    
    return filtered;
});

// Helper functions
const formatDate = (date) => {
    if (!date) return '';
    const d = new Date(date);
    return d.toLocaleDateString('vi-VN', { day: '2-digit', month: '2-digit', year: 'numeric' });
};

const formatPrice = (value) => {
    if (!value) return '0₫';
    return value.toLocaleString('vi-VN') + '₫';
};

const getStatusClass = (status) => {
    const classes = {
        active: 'bg-green-100 text-green-700',
        ended: 'bg-gray-100 text-gray-600',
        scheduled: 'bg-blue-100 text-blue-700'
    };
    return classes[status] || 'bg-gray-100 text-gray-600';
};

const getStatusLabel = (status) => {
    const labels = {
        active: 'Đang diễn ra',
        ended: 'Đã kết thúc',
        scheduled: 'Sắp diễn ra'
    };
    return labels[status] || status;
};

const getBannerByCampaign = (campaignId) => {
    if (!campaignId) return null;
    return banners.value.find(b => b.campaign_id === campaignId);
};

// Modal functions
const openModal = (campaign = null) => {
    editingCampaign.value = campaign;
    errorMessage.value = '';
    
    if (campaign) {
        form.value = {
            id: campaign.id,
            name: campaign.name || '',
            type: campaign.type || 'seasonal',
            description: campaign.description || '',
            startDate: campaign.startDate || '',
            endDate: campaign.endDate || '',
            status: campaign.status || 'scheduled',
            banner: campaign.banner || '',
            priority: campaign.priority || 0,
            featured: campaign.featured || false,
            quantity: campaign.quantity || 0,
            discountPercent: campaign.discountPercent || 0,
            products: campaign.products || []
        };
    } else {
        form.value = {
            id: null,
            name: '',
            type: 'seasonal',
            description: '',
            startDate: '',
            endDate: '',
            status: 'scheduled',
            banner: '',
            priority: 0,
            featured: false,
            quantity: 0,
            discountPercent: 0,
            products: []
        };
    }
    showModal.value = true;
};

const closeModal = () => {
    showModal.value = false;
    editingCampaign.value = null;
    errorMessage.value = '';
    isSubmitting.value = false;
};

// Save campaign
const saveCampaign = async () => {
    if (!form.value.name) {
        errorMessage.value = 'Vui lòng nhập tên chiến dịch';
        return;
    }
    
    if (form.value.discountPercent < 0 || form.value.discountPercent > 100) {
        errorMessage.value = 'Giảm giá phải từ 0% đến 100%';
        return;
    }
    
    if (form.value.quantity < 0) {
        errorMessage.value = 'Số lượng tối thiểu không được âm';
        return;
    }
    
    isSubmitting.value = true;
    errorMessage.value = '';
    
    try {
        const data = {
            ...form.value,
            discountPercent: parseFloat(form.value.discountPercent) || 0,
            quantity: parseInt(form.value.quantity) || 0,
            products: Array.isArray(form.value.products) ? form.value.products : []
        };
        
        if (editingCampaign.value) {
            await router.put(`/admin/promotions/${editingCampaign.value.id}`, data);
            alert('Cập nhật chiến dịch thành công!');
        } else {
            await router.post('/admin/promotions', data);
            alert('Thêm chiến dịch thành công!');
        }
        
        closeModal();
        router.reload({ only: ['campaigns'] });
        
    } catch (error) {
        console.error('Lỗi:', error);
        errorMessage.value = error.response?.data?.message || 'Có lỗi xảy ra';
    } finally {
        isSubmitting.value = false;
    }
};

// Delete campaign
const deleteCampaign = async (id) => {
    const campaign = campaigns.value.find(c => c.id === id);
    if (!confirm(`Bạn có chắc chắn muốn xóa chiến dịch "${campaign?.name}"?`)) {
        return;
    }
    
    try {
        await router.delete(`/admin/promotions/${id}`);
        campaigns.value = campaigns.value.filter(c => c.id !== id);
        alert('Xóa chiến dịch thành công!');
    } catch (error) {
        console.error('Lỗi:', error);
        alert('Có lỗi xảy ra khi xóa');
    }
};

// Toggle status
const toggleStatus = async (campaign) => {
    const newStatus = campaign.status === 'active' ? 'ended' : 'active';
    try {
        await router.put(`/admin/promotions/${campaign.id}/status`, { status: newStatus });
        campaign.status = newStatus;
        alert(`Chiến dịch đã chuyển sang trạng thái: ${getStatusLabel(newStatus)}`);
    } catch (error) {
        console.error('Lỗi:', error);
        alert('Có lỗi xảy ra');
    }
};

// Toggle product selection
const toggleProduct = (variantId) => {
    const index = form.value.products.indexOf(variantId);
    if (index > -1) {
        form.value.products.splice(index, 1);
    } else {
        form.value.products.push(variantId);
    }
};

const isProductSelected = (variantId) => {
    return form.value.products.includes(variantId);
};
</script>

<template>
    <Head title="Quản lý chiến dịch - BigBag Admin" />
    
    <AdminLayout>
        <div class="p-4 md:p-8">
            <!-- Header -->
            <div class="flex flex-col sm:flex-row justify-between items-start sm:items-center gap-4 mb-6">
                <div>
                    <h1 class="text-2xl md:text-3xl font-bold text-gray-800">Chiến dịch khuyến mãi</h1>
                    <p class="text-sm text-gray-500 mt-1">Quản lý các chiến dịch giảm giá theo số lượng sản phẩm</p>
                </div>
                <button @click="openModal()" class="bg-orange-600 text-white px-5 py-2.5 rounded-xl flex items-center gap-2 hover:bg-orange-700 transition-colors text-sm">
                    <span class="material-symbols-outlined text-lg">add</span>
                    Thêm chiến dịch
                </button>
            </div>

            <!-- Search -->
            <div class="mb-6">
                <div class="relative max-w-md">
                    <span class="material-symbols-outlined absolute left-3 top-1/2 -translate-y-1/2 text-gray-400 text-lg">search</span>
                    <input 
                        v-model="searchQuery" 
                        type="text" 
                        placeholder="Tìm kiếm chiến dịch..." 
                        class="pl-10 pr-4 py-2.5 bg-white border border-gray-300 rounded-full w-full focus:outline-none focus:border-orange-500 focus:ring-2 focus:ring-orange-500/20 text-sm"
                    >
                </div>
            </div>

            <!-- Tabs -->
            <div class="flex gap-2 mb-6 border-b border-gray-200">
                <button 
                    v-for="status in statusOptions" 
                    :key="status.value"
                    @click="activeStatusTab = status.value"
                    class="px-5 py-2.5 text-sm font-medium transition-all"
                    :class="activeStatusTab === status.value ? 'text-orange-600 border-b-2 border-orange-600' : 'text-gray-500 hover:text-gray-700'"
                >
                    {{ status.label }}
                    <span class="ml-1 text-xs bg-gray-100 px-2 py-0.5 rounded-full">
                        {{ campaigns.filter(c => status.value === 'all' || c.status === status.value).length }}
                    </span>
                </button>
            </div>

            <!-- Campaign List -->
            <div class="grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-2 gap-6">
                <div v-for="campaign in filteredCampaigns" :key="campaign.id" class="bg-white rounded-xl overflow-hidden border border-gray-200 hover:shadow-lg transition-all duration-300">
                    <!-- Banner -->
                    <div class="relative h-48 bg-gradient-to-r from-gray-100 to-gray-200">
                        <img 
                            v-if="campaign.banner" 
                            :src="campaign.banner" 
                            :alt="campaign.name" 
                            class="w-full h-full object-cover"
                            @error="campaign.banner = null"
                        >
                        <div v-else class="w-full h-full flex items-center justify-center text-gray-400">
                            <span class="material-symbols-outlined text-5xl">campaign</span>
                        </div>
                        
                        <!-- Status badge -->
                        <div class="absolute top-3 right-3 flex gap-1">
                            <span class="text-xs px-3 py-1 rounded-full font-medium" :class="getStatusClass(campaign.status)">
                                {{ getStatusLabel(campaign.status) }}
                            </span>
                            <span v-if="campaign.featured" class="text-xs px-3 py-1 rounded-full bg-yellow-100 text-yellow-700 font-medium">
                                ⭐ Nổi bật
                            </span>
                        </div>
                    </div>

                    <!-- Content -->
                    <div class="p-5">
                        <div class="flex justify-between items-start">
                            <div class="flex-1">
                                <h3 class="font-bold text-lg text-gray-800">{{ campaign.name }}</h3>
                                <p class="text-xs text-gray-500 mt-0.5">Loại: {{ campaign.type || 'Seasonal' }}</p>
                            </div>
                            <div class="flex gap-1 ml-2">
                                <button @click="openModal(campaign)" class="p-1.5 text-blue-600 hover:bg-blue-100 rounded-lg transition-colors" title="Sửa">
                                    <span class="material-symbols-outlined text-sm">edit</span>
                                </button>
                                <button @click="deleteCampaign(campaign.id)" class="p-1.5 text-red-600 hover:bg-red-100 rounded-lg transition-colors" title="Xóa">
                                    <span class="material-symbols-outlined text-sm">delete</span>
                                </button>
                            </div>
                        </div>

                        <p class="text-sm text-gray-500 mt-2 line-clamp-2">{{ campaign.description || 'Không có mô tả' }}</p>

                        <!-- Info -->
                        <div class="mt-4 grid grid-cols-2 gap-3">
                            <div class="bg-orange-50 rounded-lg p-3">
                                <p class="text-xs text-gray-500">Giảm giá</p>
                                <p class="text-lg font-bold text-orange-600">{{ campaign.discount || '0%' }}</p>
                            </div>
                            <div class="bg-blue-50 rounded-lg p-3">
                                <p class="text-xs text-gray-500">Số lượng tối thiểu</p>
                                <p class="text-lg font-bold text-blue-600">{{ campaign.quantity || 0 }}</p>
                            </div>
                        </div>

                        <!-- Date -->
                        <div class="mt-3 flex items-center gap-2 text-sm text-gray-500">
                            <span class="material-symbols-outlined text-sm">calendar_today</span>
                            <span>{{ formatDate(campaign.startDate) }} - {{ formatDate(campaign.endDate) }}</span>
                        </div>

                        <!-- Products count -->
                        <div class="mt-1 flex items-center gap-2 text-sm text-gray-500">
                            <span class="material-symbols-outlined text-sm">inventory_2</span>
                            <span>{{ campaign.products?.length || 0 }} sản phẩm áp dụng</span>
                        </div>

                        <!-- Banner link -->
                        <div v-if="getBannerByCampaign(campaign.id)" class="mt-1 flex items-center gap-2 text-sm text-gray-500">
                            <span class="material-symbols-outlined text-sm">image</span>
                            <span>Có banner liên kết</span>
                        </div>

                        <!-- Actions -->
                        <div class="mt-4 pt-4 border-t border-gray-100 flex justify-end">
                            <button 
                                @click="toggleStatus(campaign)" 
                                class="text-xs px-4 py-2 rounded-full transition-colors font-medium"
                                :class="campaign.status === 'active' ? 'bg-green-100 text-green-700 hover:bg-green-200' : 'bg-blue-100 text-blue-700 hover:bg-blue-200'"
                            >
                                {{ campaign.status === 'active' ? '✅ Đang diễn ra' : '🔄 Kích hoạt' }}
                            </button>
                        </div>
                    </div>
                </div>

                <!-- Empty state -->
                <div v-if="filteredCampaigns.length === 0" class="col-span-full text-center py-16 text-gray-500">
                    <span class="material-symbols-outlined text-6xl mb-4 block">campaign</span>
                    <p class="text-lg font-medium">Không có chiến dịch nào</p>
                    <p class="text-sm mt-1">Hãy tạo chiến dịch khuyến mãi đầu tiên</p>
                    <button @click="openModal()" class="mt-4 text-orange-600 hover:underline font-medium">Thêm chiến dịch</button>
                </div>
            </div>
        </div>

        <!-- Modal -->
        <div v-if="showModal" class="fixed inset-0 bg-black/50 flex items-center justify-center z-50 p-4" @click.self="closeModal">
            <div class="bg-white rounded-xl max-w-2xl w-full p-6 shadow-xl max-h-[90vh] overflow-y-auto">
                <div class="flex justify-between items-center mb-4">
                    <h3 class="text-xl font-bold text-gray-800">
                        {{ editingCampaign ? 'Sửa chiến dịch' : 'Thêm chiến dịch mới' }}
                    </h3>
                    <button @click="closeModal" class="text-gray-400 hover:text-gray-600 transition-colors text-xl">✕</button>
                </div>

                <div class="space-y-4">
                    <!-- Name -->
                    <div>
                        <label class="text-sm block mb-1 text-gray-700 font-medium">Tên chiến dịch *</label>
                        <input 
                            v-model="form.name" 
                            type="text" 
                            class="w-full border border-gray-300 rounded-lg px-4 py-2.5 focus:outline-none focus:border-orange-500 focus:ring-2 focus:ring-orange-500/20"
                            placeholder="VD: Sale Tết 2025"
                        >
                    </div>

                    <!-- Type -->
                    <div>
                        <label class="text-sm block mb-1 text-gray-700 font-medium">Loại chiến dịch</label>
                        <select 
                            v-model="form.type" 
                            class="w-full border border-gray-300 rounded-lg px-4 py-2.5 focus:outline-none focus:border-orange-500 focus:ring-2 focus:ring-orange-500/20"
                        >
                            <option value="seasonal">Theo mùa</option>
                            <option value="flash_sale">Flash Sale</option>
                            <option value="anniversary">Kỷ niệm</option>
                            <option value="holiday">Ngày lễ</option>
                            <option value="product_launch">Ra mắt sản phẩm</option>
                            <option value="other">Khác</option>
                        </select>
                    </div>

                    <!-- Description -->
                    <div>
                        <label class="text-sm block mb-1 text-gray-700 font-medium">Mô tả</label>
                        <textarea 
                            v-model="form.description" 
                            rows="3" 
                            class="w-full border border-gray-300 rounded-lg px-4 py-2.5 focus:outline-none focus:border-orange-500 focus:ring-2 focus:ring-orange-500/20 resize-none"
                            placeholder="Mô tả chiến dịch..."
                        ></textarea>
                    </div>

                    <!-- Date -->
                    <div class="grid grid-cols-2 gap-4">
                        <div>
                            <label class="text-sm block mb-1 text-gray-700 font-medium">Ngày bắt đầu</label>
                            <input 
                                v-model="form.startDate" 
                                type="date" 
                                class="w-full border border-gray-300 rounded-lg px-4 py-2.5 focus:outline-none focus:border-orange-500 focus:ring-2 focus:ring-orange-500/20"
                            >
                        </div>
                        <div>
                            <label class="text-sm block mb-1 text-gray-700 font-medium">Ngày kết thúc</label>
                            <input 
                                v-model="form.endDate" 
                                type="date" 
                                class="w-full border border-gray-300 rounded-lg px-4 py-2.5 focus:outline-none focus:border-orange-500 focus:ring-2 focus:ring-orange-500/20"
                            >
                        </div>
                    </div>

                    <!-- Status -->
                    <div>
                        <label class="text-sm block mb-1 text-gray-700 font-medium">Trạng thái</label>
                        <select 
                            v-model="form.status" 
                            class="w-full border border-gray-300 rounded-lg px-4 py-2.5 focus:outline-none focus:border-orange-500 focus:ring-2 focus:ring-orange-500/20"
                        >
                            <option value="scheduled">Sắp diễn ra</option>
                            <option value="active">Đang diễn ra</option>
                            <option value="ended">Đã kết thúc</option>
                        </select>
                    </div>

                    <!-- Banner -->
                    <div>
                        <label class="text-sm block mb-1 text-gray-700 font-medium">Banner (URL)</label>
                        <input 
                            v-model="form.banner" 
                            type="text" 
                            class="w-full border border-gray-300 rounded-lg px-4 py-2.5 focus:outline-none focus:border-orange-500 focus:ring-2 focus:ring-orange-500/20"
                            placeholder="https://example.com/banner.jpg"
                        >
                        <p class="text-xs text-gray-500 mt-1">Đường dẫn ảnh banner cho chiến dịch</p>
                    </div>

                    <!-- Discount config -->
                    <div class="grid grid-cols-2 gap-4">
                        <div>
                            <label class="text-sm block mb-1 text-gray-700 font-medium">Số lượng tối thiểu</label>
                            <input 
                                v-model.number="form.quantity" 
                                type="number" 
                                min="0"
                                class="w-full border border-gray-300 rounded-lg px-4 py-2.5 focus:outline-none focus:border-orange-500 focus:ring-2 focus:ring-orange-500/20"
                                placeholder="0"
                            >
                            <p class="text-xs text-gray-500 mt-1">Số sản phẩm tối thiểu để áp dụng</p>
                        </div>
                        <div>
                            <label class="text-sm block mb-1 text-gray-700 font-medium">Giảm giá (%)</label>
                            <input 
                                v-model.number="form.discountPercent" 
                                type="number" 
                                min="0" 
                                max="100"
                                class="w-full border border-gray-300 rounded-lg px-4 py-2.5 focus:outline-none focus:border-orange-500 focus:ring-2 focus:ring-orange-500/20"
                                placeholder="0"
                            >
                            <p class="text-xs text-gray-500 mt-1">Phần trăm giảm giá (0-100%)</p>
                        </div>
                    </div>

                    <!-- Products -->
                    <div>
                        <label class="text-sm block mb-1 text-gray-700 font-medium">Sản phẩm áp dụng</label>
                        <div class="border border-gray-300 rounded-lg p-3 max-h-48 overflow-y-auto">
                            <div v-for="variant in productVariants" :key="variant.id" class="flex items-center gap-3 py-1.5 hover:bg-gray-50 px-2 rounded">
                                <input 
                                    type="checkbox" 
                                    :id="'variant-' + variant.id"
                                    :checked="isProductSelected(variant.id)"
                                    @change="toggleProduct(variant.id)"
                                    class="w-4 h-4 text-orange-600 rounded focus:ring-orange-500"
                                >
                                <label :for="'variant-' + variant.id" class="text-sm cursor-pointer flex-1">
                                    <span class="font-medium">{{ variant.product?.name || 'Sản phẩm' }}</span>
                                    <span class="text-gray-400 text-xs ml-1">
                                        ({{ variant.color?.name || 'Không màu' }})
                                    </span>
                                    <span class="text-gray-400 text-xs ml-1">
                                        - {{ formatPrice(variant.price) }}
                                    </span>
                                </label>
                            </div>
                            <div v-if="productVariants.length === 0" class="text-center py-4 text-gray-400 text-sm">
                                Không có sản phẩm nào
                            </div>
                        </div>
                        <p class="text-xs text-gray-500 mt-1">Chọn các biến thể sản phẩm áp dụng chiến dịch</p>
                    </div>

                    <!-- Priority & Featured -->
                    <div class="grid grid-cols-2 gap-4">
                        <div>
                            <label class="text-sm block mb-1 text-gray-700 font-medium">Độ ưu tiên</label>
                            <input 
                                v-model.number="form.priority" 
                                type="number" 
                                min="0"
                                class="w-full border border-gray-300 rounded-lg px-4 py-2.5 focus:outline-none focus:border-orange-500 focus:ring-2 focus:ring-orange-500/20"
                                placeholder="0"
                            >
                            <p class="text-xs text-gray-500 mt-1">Số càng nhỏ càng ưu tiên</p>
                        </div>
                        <div class="flex items-center pt-6">
                            <label class="flex items-center gap-2 cursor-pointer">
                                <input 
                                    type="checkbox" 
                                    v-model="form.featured" 
                                    class="w-5 h-5 text-orange-600 rounded focus:ring-orange-500"
                                >
                                <span class="text-sm text-gray-700">⭐ Nổi bật</span>
                            </label>
                        </div>
                    </div>

                    <!-- Error -->
                    <div v-if="errorMessage" class="p-3 bg-red-50 border border-red-200 rounded-lg">
                        <p class="text-sm text-red-600">{{ errorMessage }}</p>
                    </div>
                </div>

                <!-- Actions -->
                <div class="flex justify-end gap-3 mt-6 pt-4 border-t border-gray-100">
                    <button 
                        @click="closeModal" 
                        class="px-5 py-2.5 border border-gray-300 rounded-lg text-gray-600 hover:bg-gray-50 transition-colors"
                        :disabled="isSubmitting"
                    >
                        Hủy
                    </button>
                    <button 
                        @click="saveCampaign" 
                        class="px-5 py-2.5 bg-orange-600 text-white rounded-lg hover:bg-orange-700 transition-colors flex items-center gap-2"
                        :disabled="isSubmitting"
                    >
                        <span v-if="isSubmitting" class="inline-block w-4 h-4 border-2 border-white border-t-transparent rounded-full animate-spin"></span>
                        {{ isSubmitting ? 'Đang lưu...' : 'Lưu chiến dịch' }}
                    </button>
                </div>
            </div>
        </div>
    </AdminLayout>
</template>

<style scoped>
.line-clamp-2 {
    display: -webkit-box;
    -webkit-line-clamp: 2;
    -webkit-box-orient: vertical;
    overflow: hidden;
}

@keyframes spin {
    from { transform: rotate(0deg); }
    to { transform: rotate(360deg); }
}
.animate-spin {
    animation: spin 1s linear infinite;
}
</style>
```

## 4. Cập nhật Sidebar menu

Trong file `AdminLayout.vue` (hoặc file sidebar của bạn), menu "Khuyến mãi" đã có sẵn:

```html
<!-- Khuyến mãi -->
<Link :href="route('admin.promotions.index')" class="flex items-center gap-3 px-4 py-3 rounded-lg transition-all" :class="isActive('admin.promotions.index') ? 'sidebar-item-active text-primary' : 'text-on-surface-variant hover:bg-hover-bg hover:text-primary'">
    <span class="material-symbols-outlined">local_offer</span>
    <span class="flex-1 text-sm font-medium">Khuyến mãi</span>
</Link>
```

## Tóm tắt

1. **Chỉ quản lý Chiến dịch** - Đã bỏ mã giảm giá và pre-order
2. **Cấu hình giảm giá** - Theo số lượng sản phẩm tối thiểu và % giảm
3. **Chọn sản phẩm** - Chọn biến thể sản phẩm áp dụng
4. **Trạng thái** - Sắp diễn ra, Đang diễn ra, Đã kết thúc
5. **Giao diện đẹp** - Card hiển thị thông tin rõ ràng
6. **Menu sidebar** - Đã có sẵn "Khuyến mãi" trong menu của bạn

## Assistant:
07/07/2026 02:43

Lỗi cho thấy bảng `campaigns` của bạn chưa có cột `name`. Vì model `Campaign` của bạn có `$fillable = ['start_time', 'end_time']` nên khi insert thêm các trường khác sẽ bị lỗi.

## Sửa file migration và model Campaign

### 1. Cập nhật Model Campaign

```php
<?php

namespace App\Models;

use Illuminate\Database\Eloquent\Factories\HasFactory;
use Illuminate\Database\Eloquent\Model;

class Campaign extends Model
{
    use HasFactory;

    protected $fillable = [
        'name',
        'type', 
        'description',
        'start_time',
        'end_time',
        'status',
        'banner',
        'priority',
        'featured'
    ];

    protected $casts = [
        'start_time' => 'datetime',
        'end_time' => 'datetime',
        'featured' => 'boolean',
    ];

    public function productVariants()
    {
        return $this->belongsToMany(ProductVariant::class, 'campaign_products');
    }

    public function configs()
    {
        return $this->hasMany(CampaignConfig::class);
    }

    public function orders()
    {
        return $this->hasMany(Order::class);
    }

    public function banners()
    {
        return $this->hasMany(Banner::class);
    }

    public function getNameAttribute()
    {
        if ($this->attributes['name'] ?? false) {
            return $this->attributes['name'];
        }
        if ($this->start_time && $this->end_time) {
            $start = $this->start_time->format('d/m/Y');
            $end = $this->end_time->format('d/m/Y');
            return "Chiến dịch {$start} - {$end}";
        }
        return 'Chiến dịch';
    }

    public function getStartDateAttribute()
    {
        return $this->start_time ? $this->start_time->format('Y-m-d') : null;
    }

    public function getEndDateAttribute()
    {
        return $this->end_time ? $this->end_time->format('Y-m-d') : null;
    }

    public function getDiscountAttribute()
    {
        $config = $this->configs()->first();
        return $config ? $config->discount_percent . '%' : '0%';
    }

    public function getMinQuantityAttribute()
    {
        $config = $this->configs()->first();
        return $config ? $config->quantity : 0;
    }

    public function getProductIdsAttribute()
    {
        return $this->productVariants->pluck('id')->toArray();
    }
}
```

### 2. Tạo migration để thêm các cột còn thiếu

```bash
php artisan make:migration add_fields_to_campaigns_table
```

```php
<?php

use Illuminate\Database\Migrations\Migration;
use Illuminate\Database\Schema\Blueprint;
use Illuminate\Support\Facades\Schema;

return new class extends Migration
{
    public function up(): void
    {
        Schema::table('campaigns', function (Blueprint $table) {
            // Thêm các cột nếu chưa có
            if (!Schema::hasColumn('campaigns', 'name')) {
                $table->string('name')->nullable()->after('id');
            }
            if (!Schema::hasColumn('campaigns', 'type')) {
                $table->string('type')->default('seasonal')->after('name');
            }
            if (!Schema::hasColumn('campaigns', 'description')) {
                $table->text('description')->nullable()->after('type');
            }
            if (!Schema::hasColumn('campaigns', 'status')) {
                $table->enum('status', ['scheduled', 'active', 'ended'])->default('scheduled')->after('end_time');
            }
            if (!Schema::hasColumn('campaigns', 'banner')) {
                $table->string('banner')->nullable()->after('status');
            }
            if (!Schema::hasColumn('campaigns', 'priority')) {
                $table->integer('priority')->default(0)->after('banner');
            }
            if (!Schema::hasColumn('campaigns', 'featured')) {
                $table->boolean('featured')->default(false)->after('priority');
            }
        });
    }

    public function down(): void
    {
        Schema::table('campaigns', function (Blueprint $table) {
            $columns = ['name', 'type', 'description', 'status', 'banner', 'priority', 'featured'];
            foreach ($columns as $column) {
                if (Schema::hasColumn('campaigns', $column)) {
                    $table->dropColumn($column);
                }
            }
        });
    }
};
```

```php
<?php

use Illuminate\Database\Migrations\Migration;
use Illuminate\Database\Schema\Blueprint;
use Illuminate\Support\Facades\Schema;

return new class extends Migration
{
    public function up(): void
    {
        Schema::dropIfExists('campaigns');
        
        Schema::create('campaigns', function (Blueprint $table) {
            $table->id();
            $table->string('name')->nullable();
            $table->string('type')->default('seasonal');
            $table->text('description')->nullable();
            $table->dateTime('start_time')->nullable();
            $table->dateTime('end_time')->nullable();
            $table->enum('status', ['scheduled', 'active', 'ended'])->default('scheduled');
            $table->string('banner')->nullable();
            $table->integer('priority')->default(0);
            $table->boolean('featured')->default(false);
            $table->timestamps();
        });
    }

    public function down(): void
    {
        Schema::dropIfExists('campaigns');
    }
};
```

```php
};
```

### 7. Cập nhật PromotionController để xử lý lỗi tốt hơn

```php
<?php

namespace App\Http\Controllers\Admin;

use App\Http\Controllers\Controller;
use App\Models\Banner;
use App\Models\Campaign;
use App\Models\CampaignConfig;
use App\Models\ProductVariant;
use Illuminate\Http\Request;
use Inertia\Inertia;
use Illuminate\Support\Facades\Log;
use Illuminate\Support\Facades\DB;

class PromotionController extends Controller
{
    public function index()
    {
        try {
            $campaigns = Campaign::with(['banners', 'configs', 'productVariants', 'productVariants.product', 'productVariants.color'])
                ->latest()
                ->get();

            $formattedCampaigns = $campaigns->map(function ($campaign) {
                $config = $campaign->configs->first();
                
                return [
                    'id' => $campaign->id,
                    'name' => $campaign->name ?? 'Chiến dịch #' . $campaign->id,
                    'type' => $campaign->type ?? 'seasonal',
                    'description' => $campaign->description ?? '',
                    'startDate' => $campaign->start_date,
                    'endDate' => $campaign->end_date,
                    'status' => $campaign->status ?? 'scheduled',
                    'banner' => $campaign->banner ?? '',
                    'priority' => $campaign->priority ?? 0,
                    'featured' => $campaign->featured ?? false,
                    'quantity' => $config ? (int) $config->quantity : 0,
                    'discount' => $config ? (float) $config->discount_percent . '%' : '0%',
                    'discountPercent' => $config ? (float) $config->discount_percent : 0,
                    'products' => $campaign->productVariants->pluck('id')->toArray(),
                    'productVariants' => $campaign->productVariants->map(function ($variant) {
                        return [
                            'id' => $variant->id,
                            'name' => $variant->product->name ?? 'Sản phẩm',
                            'color' => $variant->color->name ?? 'Không màu',
                            'price' => $variant->price ?? 0,
                        ];
                    }),
                    'banners' => $campaign->banners,
                ];
            });

            $banners = Banner::with('campaign')->orderBy('order', 'asc')->get();
            $productVariants = ProductVariant::with(['product', 'color'])->latest()->get();

            return Inertia::render('Admin/Promotions', [
                'campaigns' => $formattedCampaigns,
                'banners' => $banners,
                'productVariants' => $productVariants,
            ]);

        } catch (\Exception $e) {
            Log::error('Lỗi load trang chiến dịch: ' . $e->getMessage());
            return Inertia::render('Admin/Promotions', [
                'campaigns' => [],
                'banners' => [],
                'productVariants' => [],
                'error' => 'Có lỗi xảy ra khi tải dữ liệu: ' . $e->getMessage()
            ]);
        }
    }

    public function store(Request $request)
    {
        try {
            DB::beginTransaction();

            $validated = $request->validate([
                'name' => 'nullable|string|max:255',
                'type' => 'nullable|string|max:50',
                'description' => 'nullable|string',
                'startDate' => 'nullable|date',
                'endDate' => 'nullable|date|after:startDate',
                'status' => 'nullable|in:scheduled,active,ended',
                'banner' => 'nullable|string|max:255',
                'priority' => 'nullable|integer|min:0',
                'featured' => 'boolean',
                'quantity' => 'nullable|integer|min:0',
                'discountPercent' => 'nullable|numeric|min:0|max:100',
                'products' => 'nullable|array',
            ]);

            // Tạo campaign
            $campaign = Campaign::create([
                'name' => $validated['name'] ?? 'Chiến dịch ' . now()->format('d/m/Y'),
                'type' => $validated['type'] ?? 'seasonal',
                'description' => $validated['description'] ?? '',
                'start_time' => $validated['startDate'] ?? null,
                'end_time' => $validated['endDate'] ?? null,
                'status' => $validated['status'] ?? 'scheduled',
                'banner' => $validated['banner'] ?? '',
                'priority' => $validated['priority'] ?? 0,
                'featured' => $validated['featured'] ?? false,
            ]);

            // Tạo campaign config
            if (isset($validated['quantity']) || isset($validated['discountPercent'])) {
                CampaignConfig::create([
                    'campaign_id' => $campaign->id,
                    'quantity' => $validated['quantity'] ?? 0,
                    'discount_percent' => $validated['discountPercent'] ?? 0,
                ]);
            }

            // Gắn sản phẩm
            if (!empty($validated['products'])) {
                $campaign->productVariants()->attach($validated['products']);
            }

            DB::commit();

            return response()->json([
                'success' => true,
                'message' => 'Thêm chiến dịch thành công!',
                'data' => $campaign->load(['banners', 'configs', 'productVariants'])
            ]);

        } catch (\Exception $e) {
            DB::rollBack();
            Log::error('Lỗi tạo chiến dịch: ' . $e->getMessage());
            return response()->json([
                'success' => false,
                'message' => 'Có lỗi xảy ra: ' . $e->getMessage()
            ], 500);
        }
    }

    public function update(Request $request, $id)
    {
        try {
            DB::beginTransaction();

            $campaign = Campaign::findOrFail($id);

            $validated = $request->validate([
                'name' => 'nullable|string|max:255',
                'type' => 'nullable|string|max:50',
                'description' => 'nullable|string',
                'startDate' => 'nullable|date',
                'endDate' => 'nullable|date|after:startDate',
                'status' => 'nullable|in:scheduled,active,ended',
                'banner' => 'nullable|string|max:255',
                'priority' => 'nullable|integer|min:0',
                'featured' => 'boolean',
                'quantity' => 'nullable|integer|min:0',
                'discountPercent' => 'nullable|numeric|min:0|max:100',
                'products' => 'nullable|array',
            ]);

            // Cập nhật campaign
            $campaign->update([
                'name' => $validated['name'] ?? $campaign->name,
                'type' => $validated['type'] ?? $campaign->type,
                'description' => $validated['description'] ?? $campaign->description,
                'start_time' => $validated['startDate'] ?? $campaign->start_time,
                'end_time' => $validated['endDate'] ?? $campaign->end_time,
                'status' => $validated['status'] ?? $campaign->status,
                'banner' => $validated['banner'] ?? $campaign->banner,
                'priority' => $validated['priority'] ?? $campaign->priority,
                'featured' => $validated['featured'] ?? $campaign->featured,
            ]);

            // Cập nhật config
            if (isset($validated['quantity']) || isset($validated['discountPercent'])) {
                $config = $campaign->configs()->first();
                if ($config) {
                    $config->update([
                        'quantity' => $validated['quantity'] ?? $config->quantity,
                        'discount_percent' => $validated['discountPercent'] ?? $config->discount_percent,
                    ]);
                } else {
                    CampaignConfig::create([
                        'campaign_id' => $campaign->id,
                        'quantity' => $validated['quantity'] ?? 0,
                        'discount_percent' => $validated['discountPercent'] ?? 0,
                    ]);
                }
            }

            // Cập nhật sản phẩm
            if (isset($validated['products'])) {
                $campaign->productVariants()->sync($validated['products']);
            }

            DB::commit();

            return response()->json([
                'success' => true,
                'message' => 'Cập nhật chiến dịch thành công!',
                'data' => $campaign->load(['banners', 'configs', 'productVariants'])
            ]);

        } catch (\Exception $e) {
            DB::rollBack();
            Log::error('Lỗi cập nhật chiến dịch: ' . $e->getMessage());
            return response()->json([
                'success' => false,
                'message' => 'Có lỗi xảy ra: ' . $e->getMessage()
            ], 500);
        }
    }

    public function destroy($id)
    {
        try {
            DB::beginTransaction();
            
            $campaign = Campaign::findOrFail($id);
            
            $campaign->configs()->delete();
            $campaign->productVariants()->detach();
            $campaign->delete();

            DB::commit();

            return response()->json([
                'success' => true,
                'message' => 'Xóa chiến dịch thành công!'
            ]);

        } catch (\Exception $e) {
            DB::rollBack();
            Log::error('Lỗi xóa chiến dịch: ' . $e->getMessage());
            return response()->json([
                'success' => false,
                'message' => 'Có lỗi xảy ra: ' . $e->getMessage()
            ], 500);
        }
    }

    public function updateStatus(Request $request, $id)
    {
        try {
            $campaign = Campaign::findOrFail($id);
            $request->validate([
                'status' => 'required|in:scheduled,active,ended'
            ]);
            
            $campaign->update(['status' => $request->status]);
            
            return response()->json([
                'success' => true,
                'message' => 'Cập nhật trạng thái thành công!'
            ]);

        } catch (\Exception $e) {
            return response()->json([
                'success' => false,
                'message' => $e->getMessage()
            ], 500);
        }
    }
}
```

## Các bước thực hiện:

1. **Chạy migration**:
```bash
php artisan migrate
```

2. **Nếu gặp lỗi, xóa bảng và tạo lại**:
```bash
php artisan migrate:fresh
```

3. **Kiểm tra lại**:
- Vào trang Khuyến mãi
- Thử thêm một chiến dịch mới

Sau khi chạy migration, bảng `campaigns` sẽ có đầy đủ các cột cần thiết và lỗi sẽ được fix.

## Assistant:
07/07/2026 02:53

Lỗi cho thấy cột `order` đã tồn tại trong bảng `banners`. Bạn cần sửa migration để kiểm tra xem cột đã tồn tại chưa trước khi thêm.

## Cách fix:

### 1. Sửa migration `2026_07_05_215611_add_order_column_to_banners_table`

```php
<?php

use Illuminate\Database\Migrations\Migration;
use Illuminate\Database\Schema\Blueprint;
use Illuminate\Support\Facades\Schema;

return new class extends Migration
{
    public function up(): void
    {
        // Kiểm tra xem cột order đã tồn tại chưa
        if (!Schema::hasColumn('banners', 'order')) {
            Schema::table('banners', function (Blueprint $table) {
                $table->integer('order')->default(0)->after('status');
            });
        }
    }

    public function down(): void
    {
        if (Schema::hasColumn('banners', 'order')) {
            Schema::table('banners', function (Blueprint $table) {
                $table->dropColumn('order');
            });
        }
    }
};
```

### 2. Hoặc bỏ qua migration này (nếu cột đã có)

```bash
php artisan migrate:rollback --step=1
```

Sau đó chạy lại migration:

```bash
php artisan migrate
```

### 3. Nếu vẫn lỗi, xóa migration file và tạo lại

```bash
# Xóa file migration
rm database/migrations/2026_07_05_215611_add_order_column_to_banners_table.php

# Tạo migration mới
php artisan make:migration add_order_column_to_banners_table
```

```php
<?php

use Illuminate\Database\Migrations\Migration;
use Illuminate\Database\Schema\Blueprint;
use Illuminate\Support\Facades\Schema;

return new class extends Migration
{
    public function up(): void
    {
        if (!Schema::hasColumn('banners', 'order')) {
            Schema::table('banners', function (Blueprint $table) {
                $table->integer('order')->default(0)->after('status');
            });
        }
    }

    public function down(): void
    {
        if (Schema::hasColumn('banners', 'order')) {
            Schema::table('banners', function (Blueprint $table) {
                $table->dropColumn('order');
            });
        }
    }
};
```

### 4. Chạy lại migration

```bash
php artisan migrate
```

### 5. Kiểm tra trạng thái migrations

```bash
php artisan migrate:status
```

### 6. Nếu vẫn gặp vấn đề, có thể reset và chạy lại toàn bộ

```bash
php artisan migrate:fresh --seed
```

**Lưu ý**: Lệnh `migrate:fresh` sẽ xóa tất cả dữ liệu trong database và chạy lại migration từ đầu. Chỉ dùng khi bạn không có dữ liệu quan trọng hoặc đã có backup.
